subject: URGENT: Delegates Needed for SLCo Convention TOMORROW
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Becky Edwards for U
body:
Every voter deserves a voice, and we need your help to make them heard. | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/f47b581ab8bc/urgent-delegates-needed-for-slco-convention-tomorrow?e=10c1db3257)
---
| | [ ](https://beckyforutah.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=cb6d6dad27d2e4a00e5c44525&id=525c1fd0bf&e=10c1db3257)
---
| Friends,

Do you live in Salt Lake County and are interested in**becoming a state delegate?** You’re in luck!

The SLCo Republican Convention is tomorrow, and if you’re a Salt Lake County resident living outside of West Valley City, **you are eligible** to run as a state delegate for your community.

The Salt Lake County convention will be held **tomorrow, April 8th, at Kearns High School from 10 am-4 pm.** Registration begins at**7:30 AM.** We hope to see you there!

If you are interested in running or have questions about becoming a state delegate, **contact**[**debbie@beckyforutah.com**](mailto:debbie@beckyforutah.com)**for more details. **

— #TeamBecky
---

name: Tom Fitton
subject: Historic Court Victory
body:
Court Throws Out CA’s Race/LGBT Quotas

[INSIDE JW]

Judicial Watch Victory: Historic Court Ruling against Race, Ethnic,
LGBT Quotas

[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=58530&L=27076&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvdmlkZW9zL2NvdXJ0LXZpY3RvcnktYWdhaW5zdC10aGUtbGVmdC8/dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1kZXBsb3llciZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj13ZWVrbHkrdXBkYXRlJnV0bV90ZXJtPW1lbWJlcnM=]

We won a significant victory last week in the California Superior
Court when it declared that the state’s racial, ethnic, and LGBT
quota for corporate boards of California-based corporations violates
the California Constitution.

This week the court released its full opinion
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=58530&L=27067&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9jdW1lbnRzL2NyZXN0LXYtcGFkaWxsYS1vcmRlci0zNzUxMy0yLz91dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXdlZWtseSt1cGRhdGUmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycw==].
It found that only in “very particular cases should discrimination
be remedied by more discrimination.”

The ruling
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=58530&L=27048&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9jdW1lbnRzL2NyZXN0LXYtcGFkaWxsYS1jb3VydC1ydWxpbmctMzc1MTMvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249d2Vla2x5K3VwZGF0ZSZ1dG1fdGVybT1tZW1iZXJz]
and opinion come in the case (_Robin Crest, et al. v. Alex Padilla, in
his official capacity as Secretary of State of the State of
California_
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=58530&L=20709&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9jdW1lbnRzL2NyZXN0LXYtcGFkaWxsYS1jb21wbGFpbnQtMzc1MTMvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249d2Vla2x5K3VwZGF0ZSZ1dG1fdGVybT1tZW1iZXJz]
(No.20STCV37513)) granting our motion for summary judgment in our
lawsuit. We sued on behalf of taxpayers who are asking the court to
declare the quota scheme unconstitutional and seeking to enjoin its
enforcement.

This historic California court decision declared unconstitutional one
of the most blatant and significant attacks in the modern era on
constitutional prohibitions against discrimination. In its ruling
today, the court upheld the core American value of equal protection
under the law. Judicial Watch’s taxpayer clients are heroes for
standing up for civil rights against the Left’s pernicious efforts
to undo anti-discrimination protections.

We filed this lawsuit
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=58530&L=26922&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvanctc3Vlcy1jYWxpLXF1b3Rhcy8/dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1kZXBsb3llciZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj13ZWVrbHkrdXBkYXRlJnV0bV90ZXJtPW1lbWJlcnM=]
on October 2,
2020, in the Superior Court of the State of California, County of Los
Angeles, on behalf of three California taxpayers (Robin Crest, Earl De
Vries and Judy DeVries) to prevent California from enforcing Assembly
Bill 979 (AB 979). The law requires that boards of directors of
California-based, publicly held domestic or foreign corporations
satisfy a racial, ethnic, and LGBT quota by the end of the 2021
calendar year.

In his opinion striking down the gender-quota law, Judge Terry A.
Green found the law “violates the Equal Protection Clause of the
California Constitution on its face.” The judge elaborated on why
the California Legislature exceeded its authority in mandating the
composition of boards:

The difficulty is that the Legislature is thinking in group terms. But
the California Constitution protects the right of individuals to equal
treatment. Before the Legislature may require that members of one
group be given certain board seats, it must first try to create
neutral conditions under which qualified individuals from any group
may succeed. That attempt was not made in this case. [Emphasis in
original]
The court concluded:

The statute treats similarly situated individuals – qualified
potential corporate board members – differently based on their
membership (or lack thereof) in certain listed racial, sexual
orientation, and gender identity groups. It requires that a certain
specific number of board seats be reserved for members of the groups
on the list – and necessarily excludes members of other groups from
those seats.

The Secretary has not identified a compelling interest to justify this
classification. The broader public benefits produced by well-run
businesses do not fit that bill.
California must treat its citizens equally as individuals under the
law, and not give discriminatory, preferential treatment to some based
on race, ethnicity or LGBT status. This court ruling marks a watershed
in the core American value of equal protection under the law for all
Americans. And it warns against the pernicious racialism of the
radical Left.

This is not our only action in this area.

We completed a trial in a separate lawsuit
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=58530&L=26924&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvY2xvc2luZy1hcmd1bWVudHMtY2EtZ2VuZGVyLXF1b3RhLz91dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXdlZWtseSt1cGRhdGUmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycw==]
in
Los Angeles County Superior Court on behalf of California taxpayers to
prevent the state from implementing a 2018 law (SB 826) requiring
publicly-held corporations headquartered in California to have at
least one director “who self-identifies her gender as a woman,
without regard to the individual’s designated sex at birth” on
their boards by December 31, 2019 (_Robin Crest et al. v. Alex
Padilla_
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=58530&L=14906&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9jdW1lbnRzL2NyZXN0LWV0LWFsLXYtcGFkaWxsYS13b21lbi1vbi1ib2FyZHMtY29tcGxhaW50LTI3NTYxLz91dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXdlZWtseSt1cGRhdGUmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycw==]
(No.19ST-CV-27561)).

In January 2021, we filed a public comment
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=58530&L=21653&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuc2VjLmdvdi9jb21tZW50cy9zci1uYXNkYXEtMjAyMC0wODEvc3JuYXNkYXEyMDIwMDgxLTgxOTE0NDEtMjI3Mjc4LnBkZj91dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXdlZWtseSt1cGRhdGUmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycw==]
with the Securities and Exchange Commission (SEC) in response to a
proposed rule change requiring race and gender quotas on the boards of
corporations listed on the Nasdaq exchange. The proposed rule would
require a self-identifying female and a self-identifying member of
certain listed racial backgrounds, or an explanation from the company
as to why it does not have at least two directors on its board who
self-identify as such.

TRIAL SET FOR HIGH SCHOOL COACH FIRED FOR OBJECTING TO BLM/CRITICAL
RACE THEORY CURRICULUM FOR DAUGHTER’S 7TH GRADE HISTORY CLASS

A trial
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=58530&L=27074&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9jdW1lbnRzL2ZseW5uLXYtZm9ycmVzdC1ldC1hbC1oZWFyaW5nLW9yZGVyLTEwMjU2LTIvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249d2Vla2x5K3VwZGF0ZSZ1dG1fdGVybT1tZW1iZXJz]
has been set for September 12, 2022, in the federal civil rights
lawsuit we filed on behalf of a Massachusetts father fired from his
position as high school football coach after raising concerns over
Black Lives Matter/critical race theory being taught in his
daughter’s seventh-grade ancient history class.

The Court has also set a hearing on Defendants’ Motion for Summary
Judgment.

We sued on behalf of David Flynn, the father of two Dedham Public
School students. He was removed from his position as head high school
football coach after exercising his right as a parent-citizen to raise
concerns about his daughter’s seventh-grade history class curriculum
being changed to include biased coursework on politics, race, gender
equality, and diversity (_Flynn v. Forrest et al._
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=58530&L=22119&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9jdW1lbnRzL2ZseW5uLXYtZm9ycmVzdC1ldC1hbC0yMS1jdi0xMDI1Ni8/dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1kZXBsb3llciZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj13ZWVrbHkrdXBkYXRlJnV0bV90ZXJtPW1lbWJlcnM=]
(No. 21-cv-10256)).

The lawsuit details that in September 2020, Flynn’s daughter’s
seventh-grade history class, which was listed as “World Geography
and Ancient History I,” was taught issues of race, gender,
stereotypes, prejudices, discrimination, and politics. The lawsuit
explains:

In one assignment, Flynn’s daughter was asked to consider various
“risk factors” and “mitigating factors” that two people –
one identified as “white” and the other identified as “black”
– purportedly might use to assess each other on a city street.
Included among the various factors were skin color, gender, age,
physical appearance, and attire. “Black,” “aggressive body
language” and “wrong neighborhood” were among the “risk
factors” purportedly assessed by the person identified as
“white.” “White” and “Police officer” were among the
“risk factors” purportedly assessed by the person identified as
“black.”
Concerned about the abrupt change in curriculum, Flynn and his wife
contacted the history teacher and principal of the school – then
later Superintendent Michael J. Welch and three members of the Dedham
School Committee. On more than one occasion the Flynns asked for
assistance in resolving the issues with the curriculum. Ultimately, in
October 2020, the Flynns removed their children from school. The
Flynns’ list of concerns included:

* Dedham Public Schools changed the curriculum of the seventh-grade
history class without notifying parents or having a course description
and syllabus available for parents to review
* The new seventh-grade history class curriculum containing
coursework on politics, race, gender equality, and diversity that were
not suitable for twelve- and thirteen-year-olds;
* The seventh-grade history teacher not teaching topics of politics,
race, gender equality, and diversity objectively;
* The seventh-grade history teacher using a cartoon character of
herself wearing a t-shirt supporting a controversial political
movement
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=58530&L=22157&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvcHJlc3MtcmVsZWFzZS1pbWFnZXMvcGljdHVyZTEtcG5nL107P3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249d2Vla2x5K3VwZGF0ZSZ1dG1fdGVybT1tZW1iZXJz
and
* The seventh-grade history teacher using class materials
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=58530&L=22158&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvcHJlc3MtcmVsZWFzZS1pbWFnZXMvcGljdHVyZTMtcG5nLz91dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXdlZWtseSt1cGRhdGUmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycw==]
that labeled all police officers as risks to all black people and all
black males as risks to white people.

In January 2021, Flynn, who had been the head football coach at
Dedham High School (DHS) since 2011, was called into a meeting with
Welch as well as the DHS principal and athletic director. At the
meeting, Welch handed Flynn one of the emails he had written to the
Dedham School Committee members and informed him that one of the
committee members asked Welch, “What are we going to do about
this?” At the end of the meeting Flynn was told that they, “were
going in a different direction” with the football program. Minutes
later, the superintendent, high school principal, and athletic
director released a public statement, stating that Flynn was removed
as head football coach because he “expressed significant
philosophical differences with the direction, goals, and values of the
school district.”

It’s pretty simple. Coach Flynn was fired for exercising his First
Amendment rights to object as a citizen and father to extremist racial
propaganda in his child’s history class. The federal trial over this
abuse can’t come soon enough.

On Monday, the Court will hear arguments about Defendants’ Motion
for Summary Judgment. In response to the superintendent’s, high
school principal’s, and high school athletic director’s assertion
that the case should be dismissed on qualified immunity grounds, we
argue
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=58530&L=27077&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9jdW1lbnRzL2ZseW5uLXYtd2VsY2gtZXQtYWwtb3Bwby0xMDI1Ni9dOj91dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXdlZWtseSt1cGRhdGUmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycw==

Defendants have not demonstrated a legitimate reason why Dedham Public
Schools’ interests outweighed Flynn’s First Amendment rights. No
case has even come close to suggesting speech outside the confines of
the classroom (or football field) could be a disruption to the
educational mission of the school district. Similarly, no case comes
close to concluding that parents’ strong views of how a school
district handled concerns about their child’s education is not
protected speech.
The summary judgment hearing will be via video conference on
Monday, April 11, 2022, at 10 a.m. The media and public can register
two days in advance to “attend” the virtual conference at
https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=58530&L=22659&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly9mb3Jtcy5tYWQudXNjb3VydHMuZ292L2NvdXJ0bGlzdC5odG1sP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249d2Vla2x5K3VwZGF0ZSZ1dG1fdGVybT1tZW1iZXJz.
A video presentation
regarding the case is available here
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=58530&L=22661&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvdmlkZW9zL2Zvb3RiYWxsLWNvYWNoLWludGVydmlldy8/dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1kZXBsb3llciZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj13ZWVrbHkrdXBkYXRlJnV0bV90ZXJtPW1lbWJlcnM=].

CENSUS BUREAU WILL SPEND $10 MIL TO STUDY HOW TO BEST ADD GENDER
IDENTITY QUESTIONS ON SURVEYS

The Biden administration’s extremism continues apace, with the
Census Bureau joining the rush to accommodate radical transgender
activists. Here, from our _Corruption Chronicles_ blog, are the
disturbing details
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=58530&L=27078&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvY2Vuc3VzLWJ1cmVhdS1nZW5kZXItaWRlbnRpdHktcXVlc3Rpb25zLW9uLXN1cnZleXMvXTo/dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1kZXBsb3llciZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj13ZWVrbHkrdXBkYXRlJnV0bV90ZXJtPW1lbWJlcnM=

In a fierce governmentwide effort to provide special accommodations to
less than one percent
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=58530&L=27079&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93aWxsaWFtc2luc3RpdHV0ZS5sYXcudWNsYS5lZHUvd3AtY29udGVudC91cGxvYWRzL1RyYW5zLUFkdWx0cy1VUy1BdWctMjAxNi5wZGY/dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1kZXBsb3llciZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj13ZWVrbHkrdXBkYXRlJnV0bV90ZXJtPW1lbWJlcnM=]
of the American population, key federal agencies are implementing
significant—and costly—measures to support residents who identify
as transgender. This includes the U.S. Census Bureau spending $10
million to research how to best add questions about sexual orientation
and gender identity on surveys. The Biden administration calls it
“critical research” in a recent announcement
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=58530&L=27080&F=T&]
issued by the White House on Transgender Day of Visibility. It is
essential to invest in the research because the data collected by the
Census Bureau will help the federal government “better serve the
LGBTQI+ community by providing valuable information on their jobs,
educational attainment, home ownership, and more,” the White House
statement reads.

The administration took the opportunity on Transgender Day of
Visibility to also reveal additional measures that other federal
agencies will implement to accommodate transgender people, those whose
gender identity differs from the sex assigned at birth. For instance,
the State Department will allow all American citizens to select an X
as their gender marker on U.S. passport applications. This will
deliver on the president’s commitment to expand access to accurate
identification documents for transgender and non-binary Americans,
according to the announcement. The Department of Homeland Security
(DHS) is strong-arming air carriers to “promote the use and
acceptance of the X gender marker to ensure more efficient and
accurate passenger processing.” The DHS agency created after 9/11 to
protect the nation’s transportation system, the Transportation
Security Administration (TSA), will update its Standard Operating
Procedures to remove gender considerations when validating a
traveler’s identification at airport security checkpoints. TSA
PreCheck and Customs and Border Protection (CBP) Trusted Traveler
Programs will also get updated to include X gender markers to
“enhance access for transgender, non-binary, and gender
non-conforming travelers.”

The Social Security Administration is eliminating a rule requiring
transgender people to provide legal or medical documentation of their
identity on official records. “This will significantly improve
transgender individuals’ experience in accessing their retirement
benefits, obtaining health care, and applying for jobs,” the Biden
administration claims. The Equal Employment Opportunity Commission
(EEOC), the federal agency that enforces the nation’s workplace
discrimination laws, will promote greater equity and inclusion for
members of the transgender community by providing the option to select
an X gender marker during the initial intake process of filing a
discrimination charge. The Department of Education will update federal
student aid forms to include gender identity when applying for federal
financial aid, which the administration asserts will inform the agency
about barriers “transgender and non-binary students face in the
financial aid process.”

Other government efforts to accommodate this tiny population include
programs to support transgender veterans, mental health services for
transgender youths and training for school personnel nationwide to
support transgender and non-binary students. The Department of Health
and Human Services (HHS), the first federal agency to fly a
transgender pride flag above its headquarters, will soon reveal its
plan to “best serve LGBTQI+ Americans” based on a comprehensive
study on “Measuring Sex, Gender Identity, and Sexual Orientation”
conducted by the National Institutes of Health (NIH), the nation’s
medical research agency. HHS is also using another
“groundbreaking” taxpayer-funded study on how transgender
Americans want to see themselves reflected on federal identifications.

In closing, the White House will roll out the welcome mat for
transgender visitors by “implementing updates that will improve the
White House campus entry process for transgender, gender
non-conforming, and non-binary visitors.” This will be accomplished
by modifying the White House Worker and Visitor Entry System (WAVES)
to allow an X gender marker option so transgender, gender
nonconforming and non-binary folks “can visit the People’s House
in a manner that respects and affirms their gender identity.”
Until next week,

clean_body: Court Throws Out CA’s Race/LGBT Quotas [INSIDE JW] Judicial Watch Victory: Historic Court Ruling against Race, Ethnic, LGBT Quotas [=] We won a significant victory last week in the California Superior Court when it declared that the state’s racial, ethnic, and LGBT quota for corporate boards of California-based corporations violates the California Constitution. This week the court released its full opinion [==]. It found that only in “very particular cases should discrimination be remedied by more discrimination.” The ruling [] and opinion come in the case (Robin Crest, et al. v. Alex Padilla, in his official capacity as Secretary of State of the State of California [] (No.20STCV37513)) granting our motion for summary judgment in our lawsuit. We sued on behalf of taxpayers who are asking the court to declare the quota scheme unconstitutional and seeking to enjoin its enforcement. This historic California court decision declared unconstitutional one of the most blatant and significant attacks in the modern era on constitutional prohibitions against discrimination. In its ruling today, the court upheld the core American value of equal protection under the law. Judicial Watch’s taxpayer clients are heroes for standing up for civil rights against the Left’s pernicious efforts to undo anti-discrimination protections. We filed this lawsuit [=] on October 2, 2020, in the Superior Court of the State of California, County of Los Angeles, on behalf of three California taxpayers (Robin Crest, Earl De Vries and Judy DeVries) to prevent California from enforcing Assembly Bill 979 (AB 979). The law requires that boards of directors of California-based, publicly held domestic or foreign corporations satisfy a racial, ethnic, and LGBT quota by the end of the 2021 calendar year. In his opinion striking down the gender-quota law, Judge Terry A. Green found the law “violates the Equal Protection Clause of the California Constitution on its face.” The judge elaborated on why the California Legislature exceeded its authority in mandating the composition of boards: The difficulty is that the Legislature is thinking in group terms. But the California Constitution protects the right of individuals to equal treatment. Before the Legislature may require that members of one group be given certain board seats, it must first try to create neutral conditions under which qualified individuals from any group may succeed. That attempt was not made in this case. [Emphasis in original] The court concluded: The statute treats similarly situated individuals – qualified potential corporate board members – differently based on their membership (or lack thereof) in certain listed racial, sexual orientation, and gender identity groups. It requires that a certain specific number of board seats be reserved for members of the groups on the list – and necessarily excludes members of other groups from those seats. The Secretary has not identified a compelling interest to justify this classification. The broader public benefits produced by well-run businesses do not fit that bill. California must treat its citizens equally as individuals under the law, and not give discriminatory, preferential treatment to some based on race, ethnicity or LGBT status. This court ruling marks a watershed in the core American value of equal protection under the law for all Americans. And it warns against the pernicious racialism of the radical Left. This is not our only action in this area. We completed a trial in a separate lawsuit [==] in Los Angeles County Superior Court on behalf of California taxpayers to prevent the state from implementing a 2018 law (SB 826) requiring publicly-held corporations headquartered in California to have at least one director “who self-identifies her gender as a woman, without regard to the individual’s designated sex at birth” on their boards by December 31, 2019 (Robin Crest et al. v. Alex Padilla [==] (No.19ST-CV-27561)). In January 2021, we filed a public comment [==] with the Securities and Exchange Commission (SEC) in response to a proposed rule change requiring race and gender quotas on the boards of corporations listed on the Nasdaq exchange. The proposed rule would require a self-identifying female and a self-identifying member of certain listed racial backgrounds, or an explanation from the company as to why it does not have at least two directors on its board who self-identify as such. TRIAL SET FOR HIGH SCHOOL COACH FIRED FOR OBJECTING TO BLM/CRITICAL RACE THEORY CURRICULUM FOR DAUGHTER’S 7TH GRADE HISTORY CLASS A trial [] has been set for September 12, 2022, in the federal civil rights lawsuit we filed on behalf of a Massachusetts father fired from his position as high school football coach after raising concerns over Black Lives Matter/critical race theory being taught in his daughter’s seventh-grade ancient history class. The Court has also set a hearing on Defendants’ Motion for Summary Judgment. We sued on behalf of David Flynn, the father of two Dedham Public School students. He was removed from his position as head high school football coach after exercising his right as a parent-citizen to raise concerns about his daughter’s seventh-grade history class curriculum being changed to include biased coursework on politics, race, gender equality, and diversity (Flynn v. Forrest et al. [=] (No. 21-cv-10256)). The lawsuit details that in September 2020, Flynn’s daughter’s seventh-grade history class, which was listed as “World Geography and Ancient History I,” was taught issues of race, gender, stereotypes, prejudices, discrimination, and politics. The lawsuit explains: In one assignment, Flynn’s daughter was asked to consider various “risk factors” and “mitigating factors” that two people – one identified as “white” and the other identified as “black” – purportedly might use to assess each other on a city street. Included among the various factors were skin color, gender, age, physical appearance, and attire. “Black,” “aggressive body language” and “wrong neighborhood” were among the “risk factors” purportedly assessed by the person identified as “white.” “White” and “Police officer” were among the “risk factors” purportedly assessed by the person identified as “black.” Concerned about the abrupt change in curriculum, Flynn and his wife contacted the history teacher and principal of the school – then later Superintendent Michael J. Welch and three members of the Dedham School Committee. On more than one occasion the Flynns asked for assistance in resolving the issues with the curriculum. Ultimately, in October 2020, the Flynns removed their children from school. The Flynns’ list of concerns included: Dedham Public Schools changed the curriculum of the seventh-grade history class without notifying parents or having a course description and syllabus available for parents to review The new seventh-grade history class curriculum containing coursework on politics, race, gender equality, and diversity that were not suitable for twelve- and thirteen-year-olds; The seventh-grade history teacher not teaching topics of politics, race, gender equality, and diversity objectively; The seventh-grade history teacher using a cartoon character of herself wearing a t-shirt supporting a controversial political movement [ and * The seventh-grade history teacher using class materials [==] that labeled all police officers as risks to all black people and all black males as risks to white people. In January 2021, Flynn, who had been the head football coach at Dedham High School (DHS) since 2011, was called into a meeting with Welch as well as the DHS principal and athletic director. At the meeting, Welch handed Flynn one of the emails he had written to the Dedham School Committee members and informed him that one of the committee members asked Welch, “What are we going to do about this?” At the end of the meeting Flynn was told that they, “were going in a different direction” with the football program. Minutes later, the superintendent, high school principal, and athletic director released a public statement, stating that Flynn was removed as head football coach because he “expressed significant philosophical differences with the direction, goals, and values of the school district.” It’s pretty simple. Coach Flynn was fired for exercising his First Amendment rights to object as a citizen and father to extremist racial propaganda in his child’s history class. The federal trial over this abuse can’t come soon enough. On Monday, the Court will hear arguments about Defendants’ Motion for Summary Judgment. In response to the superintendent’s, high school principal’s, and high school athletic director’s assertion that the case should be dismissed on qualified immunity grounds, we argue [== Defendants have not demonstrated a legitimate reason why Dedham Public Schools’ interests outweighed Flynn’s First Amendment rights. No case has even come close to suggesting speech outside the confines of the classroom (or football field) could be a disruption to the educational mission of the school district. Similarly, no case comes close to concluding that parents’ strong views of how a school district handled concerns about their child’s education is not protected speech. The summary judgment hearing will be via video conference on Monday, April 11, 2022, at 10 a.m. The media and public can register two days in advance to “attend” the virtual conference at . A video presentation regarding the case is available here [=]. CENSUS BUREAU WILL SPEND $10 MIL TO STUDY HOW TO BEST ADD GENDER IDENTITY QUESTIONS ON SURVEYS The Biden administration’s extremism continues apace, with the Census Bureau joining the rush to accommodate radical transgender activists. Here, from our Corruption Chronicles blog, are the disturbing details [= In a fierce governmentwide effort to provide special accommodations to less than one percent [=] of the American population, key federal agencies are implementing significant—and costly—measures to support residents who identify as transgender. This includes the U.S. Census Bureau spending $10 million to research how to best add questions about sexual orientation and gender identity on surveys. The Biden administration calls it “critical research” in a recent announcement [=] issued by the White House on Transgender Day of Visibility. It is essential to invest in the research because the data collected by the Census Bureau will help the federal government “better serve the LGBTQI+ community by providing valuable information on their jobs, educational attainment, home ownership, and more,” the White House statement reads. The administration took the opportunity on Transgender Day of Visibility to also reveal additional measures that other federal agencies will implement to accommodate transgender people, those whose gender identity differs from the sex assigned at birth. For instance, the State Department will allow all American citizens to select an X as their gender marker on U.S. passport applications. This will deliver on the president’s commitment to expand access to accurate identification documents for transgender and non-binary Americans, according to the announcement. The Department of Homeland Security (DHS) is strong-arming air carriers to “promote the use and acceptance of the X gender marker to ensure more efficient and accurate passenger processing.” The DHS agency created after 9/11 to protect the nation’s transportation system, the Transportation Security Administration (TSA), will update its Standard Operating Procedures to remove gender considerations when validating a traveler’s identification at airport security checkpoints. TSA PreCheck and Customs and Border Protection (CBP) Trusted Traveler Programs will also get updated to include X gender markers to “enhance access for transgender, non-binary, and gender non-conforming travelers.” The Social Security Administration is eliminating a rule requiring transgender people to provide legal or medical documentation of their identity on official records. “This will significantly improve transgender individuals’ experience in accessing their retirement benefits, obtaining health care, and applying for jobs,” the Biden administration claims. The Equal Employment Opportunity Commission (EEOC), the federal agency that enforces the nation’s workplace discrimination laws, will promote greater equity and inclusion for members of the transgender community by providing the option to select an X gender marker during the initial intake process of filing a discrimination charge. The Department of Education will update federal student aid forms to include gender identity when applying for federal financial aid, which the administration asserts will inform the agency about barriers “transgender and non-binary students face in the financial aid process.” Other government efforts to accommodate this tiny population include programs to support transgender veterans, mental health services for transgender youths and training for school personnel nationwide to support transgender and non-binary students. The Department of Health and Human Services (HHS), the first federal agency to fly a transgender pride flag above its headquarters, will soon reveal its plan to “best serve LGBTQI+ Americans” based on a comprehensive study on “Measuring Sex, Gender Identity, and Sexual Orientation” conducted by the National Institutes of Health (NIH), the nation’s medical research agency. HHS is also using another “groundbreaking” taxpayer-funded study on how transgender Americans want to see themselves reflected on federal identifications. In closing, the White House will roll out the welcome mat for transgender visitors by “implementing updates that will improve the White House campus entry process for transgender, gender non-conforming, and non-binary visitors.” This will be accomplished by modifying the White House Worker and Visitor Entry System (WAVES) to allow an X gender marker option so transgender, gender nonconforming and non-binary folks “can visit the People’s House in a manner that respects and affirms their gender identity.” Until next week, [Contribute] [] [32x32x1] [] [32x32x2] [] [32x32x3] [] [32x32x3] [==] Judicial Watch, Inc. 425 3rd St Sw Ste 800 Washington, DC 20024 202.646.5172 © 2017 - 2022, All Rights Reserved Manage Email Subscriptions [] |

name: Aadland For Colorado
subject: Erik Aadland wins top slot on the primary ballot
body:
Challenges all CD7 candidates to debate
---
| | | | | | Press Release | April 8, 2022
---
|
---
| Erik is on the primary ballot!
---
| | |
---|---
|
Here is the latest from the Aadland for Congress newsroom:

(April 8, 2022) Today, Erik Aadland, a two-time Bronze Star --one for valor--earning combat veteran and former energy sector executive running for Congress, was advanced by Republican delegates to the primary ballot in the 7th Congressional District.

"I am so thankful to the many delegates who voted for me to be their candidate in the upcoming primary election," stated Aadland. "As a West Point graduate, proud veteran and former executive of the oil & gas industry, I'm confident I will bring conviction, accountability and experience to Washington, D.C., ultimately making a difference for this state."
"I believe it is imperative for conservative constituents to put forward the candidate that can win in the general election in November, but also go to D.C. and fight to make this district a leading region in the country." Aadland continued. "Therefore, I challenge all of my primary opponents to a political debate in each of the counties represented by CD7."
"I'm a strong proponent of transparency and accountability, a debate is the best way to bring each of our skill sets before voters and allow them to choose their candidate in a fair and competitive environment. I look forward to my opponents agreeing to this challenge."

Colorado's primary election is Tuesday, June 28, 2022. Ballots will be mailed to Colorado resident's on June 6, 2022.

| | |
---
| | | [Send Erik your Feedback](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001rnkcRIB_YPn_Au86MLUfdaZUoEe-fE_bnML6Z49EAvHGy54S0thnV_xUMGSD5p8wwlnmE2FN7GGG8UMPtHm3BuPI0nWJLxrusjF2hWjo9azvp6dkmun0xmfspBX_Gjx9t3hKlmopSKmS-pdBlw1qLP-A1YSBgpPgPNBuSXWwtLOj4hFIFTPg_n7mcb9S81gim4m5bFcqLXq5TVuXZSKm4HygBkf0b2-zxiZYayM8orxJ5uAJWVubpP3hS212NcCa&c=4zr_kazOfB3AfmYlHZjl-yT-BjA_Vazmo900E5NdCK5yVVDyL-G3zQ==&ch=5MfiZJ37FKOT7Z49F71kvyJmLxfmRddzXrcFF560loCjINCSSGCxPA==)
---
| | |
---
| About Erik Aadland
---
Jefferson county, CO. resident Aadland is a West Point graduate and a twice-decorated Bronze Star veteran--one for valor--from his time in Iraq and Afghanistan. Concluding his army career in 2011 as a Captain, he pursued a career in the oil and natural gas industry with his work culminating as a project manager directing the onshore construction of the Leviathan Project in Dor, Israel. The project made Israel a net exporter of natural gas. Erik holds a master's degree in the field of psychology. He is a devoted husband and proud father of three children.
---
| A True Grass-Roots Campaign
---
| About Aadland For Congress:
---
Erik's effort to represent Colorado District 7 (CD7) is a true grass-roots campaign.
There is no family fortune behind this drive. No generations of beer barons, or Fat-Cat donors from California and New York backing our organization.
Volunteers and professionals began joining the cause to help send Erik to Washington in June of 2021. Staff personnel now cross the spectrum of political pundits, professional people and neighbors.
If you are interested in an Area Coordinator opportunity with Erik's campaign, use the link below to send your information, or contact

clean_body: Challenges all CD7 candidates to debate | | | | | | Press Release | April 8, 2022 | | Erik is on the primary ballot! | | | ---|--- | Here is the latest from the Aadland for Congress newsroom: (April 8, 2022) Today, Erik Aadland, a two-time Bronze Star --one for valor--earning combat veteran and former energy sector executive running for Congress, was advanced by Republican delegates to the primary ballot in the 7th Congressional District. "I am so thankful to the many delegates who voted for me to be their candidate in the upcoming primary election," stated Aadland. "As a West Point graduate, proud veteran and former executive of the oil & gas industry, I'm confident I will bring conviction, accountability and experience to Washington, D.C., ultimately making a difference for this state." "I believe it is imperative for conservative constituents to put forward the candidate that can win in the general election in November, but also go to D.C. and fight to make this district a leading region in the country." Aadland continued. "Therefore, I challenge all of my primary opponents to a political debate in each of the counties represented by CD7." "I'm a strong proponent of transparency and accountability, a debate is the best way to bring each of our skill sets before voters and allow them to choose their candidate in a fair and competitive environment. I look forward to my opponents agreeing to this challenge." Colorado's primary election is Tuesday, June 28, 2022. Ballots will be mailed to Colorado resident's on June 6, 2022. | | | | | | == | | | | About Erik Aadland Jefferson county, CO. resident Aadland is a West Point graduate and a twice-decorated Bronze Star veteran--one for valor--from his time in Iraq and Afghanistan. Concluding his army career in 2011 as a Captain, he pursued a career in the oil and natural gas industry with his work culminating as a project manager directing the onshore construction of the Leviathan Project in Dor, Israel. The project made Israel a net exporter of natural gas. Erik holds a master's degree in the field of psychology. He is a devoted husband and proud father of three children. | A True Grass-Roots Campaign | About Aadland For Congress: Erik's effort to represent Colorado District 7 (CD7) is a true grass-roots campaign. There is no family fortune behind this drive. No generations of beer barons, or Fat-Cat donors from California and New York backing our organization. Volunteers and professionals began joining the cause to help send Erik to Washington in June of 2021. Staff personnel now cross the spectrum of political pundits, professional people and neighbors. If you are interested in an Area Coordinator opportunity with Erik's campaign, use the link below to send your information, or contact mailto:staff@aadlandforcolorado.com | | == | | | | | | == == == | PO Box 630552 Littleton, co 80163 (720) 464 4488 | | Aadland For Congress | PO Box 630552, Littleton, CO 80163 | | Sent by mailto:staff@aadlandforcolorado.com powered by

name: Team WisGOP
subject: WisGOP Update
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY THE REPUBLICAN PARTY OF WISCONSIN
body:
The latest news from the Republican Party of Wisconsin

| | [](https://act.wisgop.org/r?u=BJAgHetUUIqrbBbKj3z09j9OpIZbBzc5g2-7VwfHf34&e=d00ac07d22940c0f36f888b7fa3c8df2&utm_source=wisgop&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=newsletter_4_8_2022_v1&n=1)
---
### April 8, 2022
Friend -- The momentum has never been more on our side. This week, Wisconsinites watched as conservatives in all corners of the state won big in the Spring Election – and we’re not stopping there. We look forward to carrying this energy into November as we turn our attention to re-electing Senator Ron Johnson, defeating Tony Evers, and winning at all levels of the ballot. We are still looking for patriots to get involved to help win these important races this fall! You can sign up to volunteer to help propel the Red Wave forward [**here**](https://act.wisgop.org/r?u=VsLgeNFrtuHusRivV19v3aCXxtdEYxug7BpyM8N6AZw&e=d00ac07d22940c0f36f888b7fa3c8df2&utm_source=wisgop&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=newsletter_4_8_2022_v1&n=2). \- Team WisGOP | While Democrats try to hang their hats on winning a mayoral race in a city where their party has routinely carried 80 percent of the vote, the enthusiasm for conservatives was clear in this week’s Spring Election. Across the state, conservatives were successful in roughly two-thirds of the races in which we were active, including swing and Democrat leaning areas. The Republican Party of Wisconsin worked with county parties throughout the state, providing financial assistance, data, walk apps for door knocking, in-person and virtual trainings, and voter guides. Some highlights included Maria Lazar’s victory that marked the second time an Evers appointee was defeated in the Second District Appellate Court, Samantha Kerkman becoming the first woman, and reportedly the first Republican, elected as Kenosha County Executive in a historically Democrat county, a conservative was elected County Executive in Portage County, and conservatives flipped County Boards in Calumet, Door, Kenosha, Marathon, Rock, Adams, and St. Croix Counties. You can read our recap press release on our website [**here**](https://act.wisgop.org/r?u=sxV_uZjhTYiS0NkYk0dD0coD43uhuC0lkL-ug-GSI10sdniJZJq-u2PdbOlVOTukV-q-lxyXAQNmdeAet6jubQ&e=d00ac07d22940c0f36f888b7fa3c8df2&utm_source=wisgop&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=newsletter_4_8_2022_v1&n=3). | |
Ahead of the Spring Election, Senator Johnson rallied conservatives in all corners of the Badger State – from Manitowoc, to Calumet, to Brown, to Dane, to Washington Counties. We are grateful for his work to emphasize the importance of getting involved in the community and support of our local elected officials! You can watch a clip of his remarks at our Green Bay GOTV event [**here**](https://act.wisgop.org/r?u=YqgukYA3Mrlri-dqG7I8TniGTJRrb5Q4HW8Eq_SWRj_jwqZkKue_flH0cUIcuhuqI91qJeEQS5IYfDCB1PYsQ7cPkJPaL_j60QTyYqwqWqyKZc3Uq2-zeqfpYYVIczVc&e=d00ac07d22940c0f36f888b7fa3c8df2&utm_source=wisgop&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=newsletter_4_8_2022_v1&n=4).
---|---|---
* * *
[](https://act.wisgop.org/r?u=sxV_uZjhTYiS0NkYk0dD0ahw3PTL6JsP8slQyv_Z45W1tpC4bxcjwcY7pLDfF8cTNlZrezZB2oVgQgpQzhDJdQ&e=d00ac07d22940c0f36f888b7fa3c8df2&utm_source=wisgop&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=newsletter_4_8_2022_v1&n=5) | | Want to help stand up for conservative principles in your community? Submit a Letter to the Editor! You can send a letter directly to your local paper by filling out the form on our **[website](https://act.wisgop.org/r?u=sxV_uZjhTYiS0NkYk0dD0ahw3PTL6JsP8slQyv_Z45W1tpC4bxcjwcY7pLDfF8cTNlZrezZB2oVgQgpQzhDJdQ&e=d00ac07d22940c0f36f888b7fa3c8df2&utm_source=wisgop&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=newsletter_4_8_2022_v1&n=6)**.
---|---|---
* * *
### **In Case You Missed It...**
### _[**Tony Evers Refuses to Endorse Lousy Lieutenant Governor**](https://act.wisgop.org/r?u=sxV_uZjhTYiS0NkYk0dD0QEdzyi2YazwRkYqPDIwQNpAutuFdtRPSlKJ5ZgwXfjv6L5xpAQsK-7-4tj9dcbcZ-dXdK70P1T2Jktj4_N8Ex0KN5mDpWXEChwjZAavvG4H&e=d00ac07d22940c0f36f888b7fa3c8df2&utm_source=wisgop&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=newsletter_4_8_2022_v1&n=7)_
Despite three years by Evers’ side as lieutenant governor, Mandela Barnes has failed to earn enough confidence from his boss to receive his endorsement. During a WisPolitics luncheon last month, Tony Evers said that he didn’t have a favorite in the Democrats’ U.S. Senate primary. While unfortunate for Barnes, it’s no wonder that the re-election minded governor doesn’t want to back a far-left candidate trying to win over the hearts of the most liberal fringe of his party.
### _[**Republicans Are Winning on Education**](https://act.wisgop.org/r?u=sxV_uZjhTYiS0NkYk0dD0bjXko_-Y86syUCmtZ1xdHx2cI4C8pLiUCtc18i_0zutnaVYpDtF5fu3TXzG6oo3ew&e=d00ac07d22940c0f36f888b7fa3c8df2&utm_source=wisgop&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=newsletter_4_8_2022_v1&n=8)_
Conservatives’ success in school board elections is a testament to both the strength of Republicans’ infrastructure and to the fact that parents are fed up with far-left influence in our children’s education. After two years of greater attention on divisive curriculum, school closures, and mask mandates, parents are responding by standing up and participating in local elections – and they’ll do so again in November.
### _[**More Hypocrisy from Democrat U.S. Senate Wannabes**](https://act.wisgop.org/r?u=sxV_uZjhTYiS0NkYk0dD0Wi7p6sZwIsHsKGMDKLQH36eGOfTn177elqO8bJJZjX2eXU7jEu9vST1F5Fect1LE3OowhTgc4D3O1dhncbt_7Q&e=d00ac07d22940c0f36f888b7fa3c8df2&utm_source=wisgop&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=newsletter_4_8_2022_v1&n=9)_
When the Democrat candidates for U.S. Senate aren’t committing election year flip-flops on divisive issues, proposing dangerous far-left ideas to appease their base, lying about their resume, or otherwise making caricatures of themselves, they’re purporting to stand on principles while personally profiting from the opposite. The Milwaukee Journal Sentinel reported that both Sarah Godlewski and Alex Lasry have invested in companies that directly contradict the values they claim to support.
### **Worth the Read**
[](https://act.wisgop.org/r?u=zN5gEYXLykR0kv-yDZpGDXJgaybYGUjh8lGY6yo_px1grLKHM7fM98KRODA0CreyAd9_169Pm-lT474xiPZZoayUgfuFbi6_tPm_EkiS_FlU2GH90zTHh9_A9cKR0sTkdFI6QWHPX0tRQza6b-YpfGr1YUzWIQGUoiRRuAfOSDbLOH8Sw-qbD9oHgQTYW8SDTrU_qVZJNZWXjutbwH6bwdHRSW_qxmNRsGdfj6TgJ4xofq60QM0l0S4wM7u9iu-D&e=d00ac07d22940c0f36f888b7fa3c8df2&utm_source=wisgop&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=newsletter_4_8_2022_v1&n=10) [](https://act.wisgop.org/r?u=OwehQGnYjrzpIc0rxaR28Zg-3pjG8881iwbsJF1GviCZSzxOB2Tp1U5xyAtnChYEmmz1qJiqrYY3Co0Aim1Tbd_pMsMyvNlNT2Gj0UB87WqE2oidUONSz_DNt8hkQPb91YZ_k0pEBscYRCbXnAyCcIrdsygjJycyzaSQOBlgtth_EJnbuKH05yJZDDP_9o_d&e=d00ac07d22940c0f36f888b7fa3c8df2&utm_source=wisgop&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=newsletter_4_8_2022_v1&n=11) | | [](https://act.wisgop.org/r?u=KVYzWTFUuJ0SsyVZLAg-7KhgymeBWCJ5z6VS6DGe2fK2ahIWiS9Ox8vF_WSlPx8yCM2aaDuFRaHqhqL5lgVdZtC1xws3hDOGiRzMMLaoeFM&e=d00ac07d22940c0f36f888b7fa3c8df2&utm_source=wisgop&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=newsletter_4_8_2022_v1&n=12) [](https://act.wisgop.org/r?u=hzZHoe_LqjIxZeEPQX1TwLEd4bQ53T8vLOWx9bXpluDSR0hfacQFBrTfeoKmZtZV-DGHjE_mIGh52RQ7vLOEWSXxpxn29zseHcTPSvudnjM&e=d00ac07d22940c0f36f888b7fa3c8df2&utm_source=wisgop&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=newsletter_4_8_2022_v1&n=13)
---|---|---

name: Patty McCloskey
subject: This matters to my family
body:
[](https://admin.beautifulinbox.com/t/r-l-tyyhtyky-bjututkitk-r/) [](https://admin.beautifulinbox.com/t/r-l-tyyhtyky-bjututkitk-y/) Friends, When an Antifa mob attacked our neighborhood, I knew I could rely on my husband Mark McCloskey to defend our home. With our daughter inside the house, that's exactly what he did... name: Coach Lou Holtz
subject: Will you honor them this May?
body:
| | | [](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/60079515:60jdkbo9N:m:1:3317145305:692C4A98517BA04922E13162210EE4BF:r)
---
| | Peter, You know me best as the former head football coach of the Notre Dame Fighting Irish and the South Carolina Gamecocks. But before I led six different college football programs to bowl games, I served in the military, like my father before me. I love this country. I love our freedom. And I love our way of life. Yet too often, we take America's blessings for granted and forget the supreme sacrifice of our fallen heroes -- men and women in the military who fought and died for our freedom. **This year, my friends at the American Veterans Center are again hosting the National Memorial Day Parade...the LARGEST Memorial Day event in America, with more than 5,000 veterans and service members marching in Washington, D.C.** [_**Will you help honor America's fallen heroes at this year's National Memorial Day Parade by sending a tax-deductible donation of $25, $50, $75, $150, $250, or more today?**_](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/60079515:60jdkbo9N:m:1:3317145305:692C4A98517BA04922E13162210EE4BF:r)
---
[**Honor Our Heroes Today**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/60079515:60jdkbo9N:m:1:3317145305:692C4A98517BA04922E13162210EE4BF:r)
---
If you've ever attended, watched on TV, or heard about this parade before, then you know that it is America's most spectacular and beloved Memorial Day celebration.
---
| | [](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/60079515:60jdkbo9N:m:1:3317145305:692C4A98517BA04922E13162210EE4BF:r)
---
|
---
| | Greeting troops at the 2019 Memorial Day Parade
---
The National Memorial Day Parade brings together more than 5,000 veterans and service members to march in the event. It welcomes more than 200,000 patriotic Americans to the live event on Constitution Avenue in D.C. And it records and broadcasts this special and exciting ceremony for millions more. _But the American Veterans Center can only put on this important event with YOUR help._ [**Please join me in supporting this year's National Memorial Day Parade with your gift of $25, $50, $75, $150, $250, or more today. If you ask me, that's a small price to pay to properly honor those who died defending our country, freedom, and way of life.**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/60079515:60jdkbo9N:m:1:3317145305:692C4A98517BA04922E13162210EE4BF:r)
---
[**Honor Our Heroes Today**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/60079515:60jdkbo9N:m:1:3317145305:692C4A98517BA04922E13162210EE4BF:r)
---
Peter, like many Americans, I grew up in a family of military service. My father served in World War II and fought in the Battle of Midway, Iwo Jima, and many of the other major battles in the Pacific. He was one of the lucky ones who returned home, while many of his brothers-in-arms did not. Because of my father's sacrifices and the values he taught me, I joined the Army where I served as an Army Field Artillery Officer.
---
[](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/60079515:60jdkbo9N:m:1:3317145305:692C4A98517BA04922E13162210EE4BF:r)
---
I learned so many lessons in the military which became the foundation of everything I did in life. But I wouldn't have had the opportunity to do what I love -- coach football for 44 years -- if it weren't for the brave men and women who gave the last full measure of devotion and died for our freedom to do what we love. I know you haven't forgotten these heroes' sacrifice. And neither have my friends at the American Veterans Center, who work every day to protect the legacy of those who served our country. [**That a€TMs why I'm asking for your immediate support of $25, $50, $75, $150, $250, or more to make possible this year's National Memorial Day Parade -- the largest Memorial Day event in America.**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/60079515:60jdkbo9N:m:1:3317145305:692C4A98517BA04922E13162210EE4BF:r)
---
[**Honor Our Heroes Today**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/60079515:60jdkbo9N:m:1:3317145305:692C4A98517BA04922E13162210EE4BF:r)
---
I wouldn't ask for your help if the American Veterans Center didn't need it. And I wouldn't ask for your support of the National Memorial Day Parade if I didn't think it was so important to our nation's heroes. Your gift today will help the American Veterans Center bring the National Memorial Day Parade back to its full scale for the first time since the pandemic ... and it will ensure the American Veterans Center can continue its important year-round work of recording veterans' stories and educating the public and our young people about their service. [**Peter****, I'm counting on you to help the American Veterans Center host this year's National Memorial Day Parade with your tax-deductible gift of $25, $50, $75, $150, $250, or more today.**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/60079515:60jdkbo9N:m:1:3317145305:692C4A98517BA04922E13162210EE4BF:r) Only you know how much you are able to give, and every dollar you can contribute will make a difference for this important cause. I hope to hear from you today -- **[please make your urgently needed gift now.](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/60079515:60jdkbo9N:m:1:3317145305:692C4A98517BA04922E13162210EE4BF:r)** Warmest regards, Coach Lou Holtz
---
| | [**Support the American Veterans Center Today**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/60079515:60jdkbo9N:m:1:3317145305:692C4A98517BA04922E13162210EE4BF:r)
---
|
---
The mission of the American Veterans Center and the World War II Veterans Committee is to preserve and promote the legacy and experiences of America's veterans and active duty service personnel from World War II through today. A non-profit educational organization, the AVC and WWIIVC are funded solely through generous contributions from people like you. All contributions are tax-deductible. Â(C) American Veterans Center
1100 N. Glebe Road Suite 910, Arlington, VA 22201
---

name: Freedom First Project
subject: #1 Survival Item of 2022
body:
| | Please see a special message from our sponsor 4Patriots.
---
|
# #1 Survival Item of 2022
**This Pocket-Sized "Power Plant" Sold Out in Less
Than 48 Hours – Now It's Finally Back in Stock**[**Tested by former Navy SEAL: See it in action!**](http://trk.freedomfirstproject.-JR2MxvTviUzlbvQ)[](http://trk.freedomfirstproject.)[**People are buying these in 4 packs – Learn More**](http://trk.freedomfirstproject.) Oh no. We slapped our foreheads.We had just released the Patriot Power Cell. And the response was so strong, we couldn't believe it.The launch went WAY better than expected. We sold out completely in a matter of hours.The second time, we doubled our inventory thinking that would be enough to meet demand.And then... poof!GONE!Our inventory manager was asking..._**"Why were customers getting these 2... 4... or even 12 units at a time? Were they holiday gifts? Or just incredibly useful?"**_ Since then, the Patriot Power Cell has become one of our best-selling products of all time. Wow!And after making as many as we can, we think we finally have enough to meet demand... at least for now.That's why it's our privilege to introduce to you:[**Tested by Former Navy SEAL:
A Pocket Power Plant That's
Weather-Resistant, Has An Ultra
Bright LED Flashlight And
Charges 2 Devices At Once!**](http://trk.freedomfirstproject.)[](http://trk.freedomfirstproject.)| | **Melanie D.** I bought four of the Patriot Power Cells. They work so well, I bought eight more to give to my kids and friends for Christmas. I work outdoors a lot, so I take mine along to plug in my cell phone. They also have a flashlight on them, which comes in real handy. This is a good buy, you won't regret it.
---|---
| **Shirley C.** I'm very happy with the 4Patriots products. I've gotten the Power Cell, which is fantastic to charge my cell phone anywhere. It's rechargeable and I'm very happy with all of the 4Patriots products. And I'm very happy with Frank Bates, he's very truthful, honest and helps others in need. I really appreciate his products and his emails that I get. I'm really, really happy. I would recommend his products and him to anyone. Thank you so much.
---|---
| **Wing C.** I bought four of the Patriot Power Cells. I know they will come in handy. Because I know people with their cell phone, saying "oh I have no battery left." And you know what? They're getting it for Christmas. That's what I'm doing for them. We live here in New York, things are quite ample here at this time, ya know. But for emergencies like that – to have your cell phone, your contact to the outside world – it's important. Thank you very much, Frank.
---|---
| **Richard G.** It's a great item for me on weekends out in the country, the swimming pool, wherever else I don't have electricity available. Oftentimes people have come out to the pool, for example, and brought their power adapter to keep their cell phones or laptops or whatever charged up. They wound up losing them. With the Power Cell, it works great to recharge in the shade and I highly recommend it. Thank you very much.
---|---
[**Click here to see it in action!**](http://trk.freedomfirstproject.)
Featured reviews are from real customers. Sometimes customers are given a free product to test, or received a free product as a thank you for submitting honest feedback. The United States Military & U.S. Navy SEAL Team are not affiliated with 4Patriots. They have not endorsed, sponsored or recommended this product; no affiliation or endorsement is claimed.

America is in peril. President Reagan warned that freedom is fragile, always one generation away from extinction. As I have told crowds since my first Tea Party speeches: this is a fight for freedom. This is not someone else's fight, this is our fight, and it's a fight we absolutely must win.

name: Sarah Palin
subject: Become a Founding Supporter
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Sarah for Alaska
body:
America is at a tipping point. | Recently I announced my candidacy for the U.S. House seat representing Alaska.
[View this message in your browser](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zk33kus1905iv79p976ffcdkl9vbihvllil5dst8_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgebjqf99jkgqracjkmoq37d1m65qbfctjmkrncst66uqrf91ieoob9crl6uie5sj2udim1o3i6pgj8t5gc3hm6tllcoqmep5hm1on2chjcgpm8pj0e5oj0o3hcthn6o77q9o74oj6e2p6cs74mdhmfchhcpqm9d9ks1pb2phge2p6co70mlhm1o5l64oracdle8gq48bi4bh28or1cjgm9p76chj649fg)
America is at a tipping point. | Recently I announced my candidacy for the U.S. House seat representing Alaska.
Friend,

**Recently I announced my candidacy for the U.S. House seat representing Alaska.**

I first entered politics 30 years ago, when I was elected to city council in Wasilla. I still live in Wasilla; my family is here; my son goes to school here. My heart will ALWAYS be in Alaska, even when I’m representing you in Washington, D.C.

America is at a tipping point. As I’ve watched the far left destroy our country, I knew I had to step up and join the fight. And now I’m asking you to do the exact same thing.

I can’t do this without your support.

That’s why for a short time, when you make your next contribution of ANY AMOUNT, you’ll automatically cement your name as an **Official Founding Supporter**.

**[CONTRIBUTE NOW TO BECOME AN OFFICIAL FOUNDING SUPPORTER.>>](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zmuq9rhpjp27jsf9f91cf8hjmafe6ic4aam63iq0_rp22sh2s8i66ob4s5ie9pj4cph2bs)**

This is your chance to go down in history. YOU are the reason I’m running, and YOU will be the reason we win.

_**[Please contribute $35 by 11:59 PM TONIGHT to join the fight and mark your status as an Official Founding Supporter.>>](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zbriq4ab0qlmmj9eknt9dpfb4uclrs0kpbgf6m6g_rp22sh2s8i66ob4s5ie9pj4cph2bs)**_

[](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zi5vg68607ltgo19r5g9ou1dumrqekgbhkvdr198_rp22sh2s8i66ob4s5ie9pj4cph2bs)

At this critical time in our nation’s history, we need leaders who will combat the left’s socialist, big-government, America-last agenda.

This country was built by heroes, and the radical left dishonors their legacies by opening our borders to illegal immigrants, mortgaging our children’s future, and selling out our nation’s interest to the highest bidder.

I’m in this race to win it and join the fight for freedom alongside other patriots willing to sacrifice all to save our country.

I just have one simple question for you:

**WILL YOU JOIN ME?**

**[Please contribute $35 by 11:59 PM TONIGHT to join the fight and mark your status as an Official Founding Supporter.>>](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zktgtu2g42pq6veus7e6jp166hamquortsf7sb1g_rp22sh2s8i66ob4s5ie9pj4cph2bs)**

Thank you & God Bless America.

[](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zcatc7fcvoughgcm3jaao2jcr89q5q3985cpn3bg_rp22sh2s8i66ob4s5ie9pj4cph2bs)
Sarah Palin

**[CONTRIBUTE NOW>>](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z8j7dn4hccduondgtaac6mq3gmfluiuor0dplpl0_rp22sh2s8i66ob4s5ie9pj4cph2bs)**

[View this message in your browser](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zpeih6th3t5j2ck2dcchvh2amnkhogiua37lgpd0_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgebjqf99jk4qj4ttkumqn4s9nmorb79hnmmrq8cjm62qb6t9nkjhf4onh6dor6ohkelgjeoj56hhn3d9j6tij2sj0mpp7fdlhepij6tj4sqrjct5k6di3eduie1p68dhgm9j74t1hepge1d3563gbacb4spj6cdb4mkp60tr0cpqm1cr56uobapbi46h22sh2s8i66ob4s5ie1ob2cth2bs)
America is at a tipping point. | Recently I announced my candidacy for the U.S. House seat representing Alaska.
Friend,

**Recently I announced my candidacy for the U.S. House seat representing Alaska.**

I first entered politics 30 years ago, when I was elected to city council in Wasilla. I still live in Wasilla; my family is here; my son goes to school here. My heart will ALWAYS be in Alaska, even when I’m representing you in Washington, D.C.

America is at a tipping point. As I’ve watched the far left destroy our country, I knew I had to step up and join the fight. And now I’m asking you to do the exact same thing.

I can’t do this without your support.

That’s why for a short time, when you make your next contribution of ANY AMOUNT, you’ll automatically cement your name as an **Official Founding Supporter**.

**[CONTRIBUTE NOW TO BECOME AN OFFICIAL FOUNDING SUPPORTER.>>](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2z27riq4lbe2fqkq5t5mph9lifm12c4o1bd04bb08_rp22sh2s8i66ob4s5ie1ob2cth2bs)**

This is your chance to go down in history. YOU are the reason I’m running, and YOU will be the reason we win.

_**[Please contribute $35 by 11:59 PM TONIGHT to join the fight and mark your status as an Official Founding Supporter.>>](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2znv6j4pq6rk4j99dav41bm5dg9qiu6r0sqncanv0_rp22sh2s8i66ob4s5ie1ob2cth2bs)**_

[](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zibbl1afdhk7knvm5dn0qg3di5uv7ipdestrcpto_rp22sh2s8i66ob4s5ie1ob2cth2bs)

At this critical time in our nation’s history, we need leaders who will combat the left’s socialist, big-government, America-last agenda.

This country was built by heroes, and the radical left dishonors their legacies by opening our borders to illegal immigrants, mortgaging our children’s future, and selling out our nation’s interest to the highest bidder.

I’m in this race to win it and join the fight for freedom alongside other patriots willing to sacrifice all to save our country.

I just have one simple question for you:

**WILL YOU JOIN ME?**

**[Please contribute $35 by 11:59 PM TONIGHT to join the fight and mark your status as an Official Founding Supporter.>>](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zgehiit1s47d2s35aeeji4ep16ec5eqpqcr3ghq8_rp22sh2s8i66ob4s5ie1ob2cth2bs)**

Thank you & God Bless America.

[](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zba29qqfuq71v72stb5rga97nu9o3m4aana0rhbo_rp22sh2s8i66ob4s5ie1ob2cth2bs)
Sarah Palin

**[CONTRIBUTE NOW>>](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2z0vb9r8sq0qsa1fqncsfcrvku6a2buhagrsq5seg_rp22sh2s8i66ob4s5ie1ob2cth2bs)**

name: Dean Heller
subject: I’ll never understand this.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Dean Heller for Nevada Governor |
body:
The radical Left is determined to teach young children warped ideas about sex and gender. The same people telling us to “
[View this message in your browser](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2ze4e33831m31a55jfpiseuf6icq69b64mkqf9sp8_rp22sh2s8i66ob4s5ie1ob0cjh238h5e8he485he5o75pt7kkpq9dhkumqb7d9neppqcdtlmui34thgmipnadt4sbp65t5jm8qr6c3565gm6o3mc5i6echjcqpmfcb4m1h66pb26hie0oj3coo68t5imljrfkjge9i3cc5icpp78cbmc3gb8p9gs2qj2p76cpj3ap5l69g7eo36eljj6p77m2qmash5u)
| | | **LIBERALS ARE RUINING AMERICAN EDUCATION** _We must restore common sense in the classroom and _ _protect parents’ right to know what their kids are being taught._
---
[**JOIN THE FIGHT**](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zk1h6lp5q5bt0id1g3uq0as74oc4catuqung7n18_rp22sh2s8i66ob4s5ie1ob0cjh2bs)
---
|
---
| | [](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zp5euqvt0bonp97gdh563r0fh5lchaa1jknlipqo_rp22sh2s8i66ob4s5ie1ob0cjh2bs)
---
| | Friend, The radical Left is determined to teach young children warped ideas about sex and gender. The same people telling us to **_“follow the science”_** are teaching our kids there’s more than two genders –– _and that you can switch genders whenever you feel like it._ It’s disgusting, it’s un-scientific, and unfortunately, it’s happening right now in public schools all over the country. **The worst part? Parents' are being left in the dark about all of this.** Parents' are outraged for two reasons:
1. They don’t want their children learning these radical ideas.
2. They’re sick of finding out _AFTER_ the damage is already done.

---
| | [](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z8jca09nt4ks72raj6aakqe6j1er3m8bkj2jq96o_rp22sh2s8i66ob4s5ie1ob0cjh2bs)
---
| | Restoring American education was a top priority for me when I served my home state of Nevada in the U.S. Senate –– and I’m proud of the progress we made behind President Trump’s patriotic leadership. **Now, I’m running for Governor because liberals have brought these same radical ideas, along with Critical Race Theory, to Nevada’s schools.**
---
[**HELP ME FLIP NEVADA RED**](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zv8v60itvein26u7dei5p6s6birt1plm969ub88o_rp22sh2s8i66ob4s5ie1ob0cjh2bs)
---
Republican-led states like Florida and Texas are leading a nationwide movement to restore and protect parents’ rights in education. _It’s making the radical Left furious, and that means we’re doing the right thing._ It’s time for Nevada to stand on the right side of this issue. Everywhere I go, I meet concerned parents who agree with me. They’re sick and tired of their rights being taken away, and they have every reason to be angry. **As Governor, I’ll fight to protect parents’ rights and to keep the Left’s warped ideas out of our classrooms so our kids can focus on math, science, and reading.**
---
[](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zjsm76ju0bf8cglr0bvv682gcekr1jtg5t3a0fp8_rp22sh2s8i66ob4s5ie1ob0cjh2bs)
---
This issue is bigger than education. It’s about the future of our country and our freedoms. For America to survive –– and thrive –– we must give our children the education they need to compete and succeed against the world. That will never happen if liberals get away with teaching radical gender ideologies and Critical Race Theory which tells our children to hate America. **But this fight will never be won if patriots like you don’t step up. ** The Democrats won’t let go of Nevada easily. And I’ll need every conservative who wants to see a change to step up and chip in if we’re going to win.
---
[**FUEL THE FIGHT: $25**](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zpjav14r30m3bolo9rf8h89uo35g97q2ssp2vnm0_rp22sh2s8i66ob4s5ie1ob0cjh2bs)
---
[**FUEL THE FIGHT: $50**](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z5aa1hn1c9nakqkrhvnauspb98gp0icqemeg13f0_rp22sh2s8i66ob4s5ie1ob0cjh2bs)
---
[**FUEL THE FIGHT: $75**](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2za6ol4e7d1bb193goa9nnvl1obbvd4kskq278m5o_rp22sh2s8i66ob4s5ie1ob0cjh2bs)
---
[**FUEL THE FIGHT: $100**](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zfskcljkn7kprei8hb2pranknktt32pklnsnv6i8_rp22sh2s8i66ob4s5ie1ob0cjh2bs)
---
[**FUEL THE FIGHT: $250**](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zf4o687m0t4eeiaev0rid8tkre8jjm2c2vn2h3fo_rp22sh2s8i66ob4s5ie1ob0cjh2bs)
---
For Nevada, Dean Heller

### _Friday, April 8, 2022_
Today on The Doug Collins Podcast, I am joined by Dr Vincent Giampapa. One of the worlds leaders in Adult Stem Cell therapy. Dr. Giampapa talks about how cells that your body already has can be captured and used to help you not only live longer but healthier. US.THIS IS AN EPISODE THAT BIG PHARMA DOES NOT WANT YOU TO HEAR! | [ You can’t lead if you don’t know how to follow: A discussion with Ralph Reed ](http://click1.srnemail.com/msypndzznjtljjvzlttkclsjmnlbdmmjqdkvmqtywctpnn_etphhttytsyqfrhtqbdbhdd.html)
### _Wednesday, April 6, 2022_
Today on The Doug Collins Podcast, I am joined by the founder of The Faith And Freedom Coalition, Ralph Reed. We discuss the state of politics today and we look back on our own experiences in politics and how we got our starts. It is amazing today that people think they should start out leading when they have never learned to follow. This is a great discussion of faith and politics that you will want to share with your friends [ ](http://click1.srnemail.com/pdqvmlrrmgybggkrbyyshbdgwmbclwwgqlskwqyjfhyvml_etphhttytsyqfrhtqbdbhdd.html)
| [ ](http://click1.srnemail.com/vmfyhgqqhckncczqnkktfnmcdhnjgddcvgtzdvkprfkyhj_etphhttytsyqfrhtqbdbhdd.html?a=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&b=337904)

| [ A Shining City on a Hill: A look back at Ronald Reagans Final address as President ](http://click1.srnemail.com/xjccrbnnryptyyqntppmdtsykrtjbkkyvbmqkvphgdpcrc_etphhttytsyqfrhtqbdbhdd.html)
### _Monday, April 4, 2022_
Today on The Doug Collins Podcast, I continue our look back at the final speeches of our Presidents with a discussion of Ronald Regan’s final speech in 1989. He lays out what is missing in so many political discussions today, a concern for people and the freedoms we have. It is a great reminder that each generation must take seriously the call to remember the greatness of our country and what it takes to keep it special. [ ](http://click1.srnemail.com/ebzqbhvvbctfccwvfttkrfpcjbfzhjjcshkwjstydrtqhd_etphhttytsyqfrhtqbdbhdd.html)

name: John Gomez  - Campaign Manager
subject: Chabot for Congress - Update from the Campaign Trail 4/8
body:
Fish Frys, Endorsements, and Mike Pompeo!
No images? [Click here](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-e-tyyktrid-kujkulhluu-b/) [](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-tyyktrid-kujkulhluu-r/)
# Update from the Campaign Trail 4/8/22
Good evening,The fight for Ohio's 1st Congressional district continues. Congressman Chabot has been making his way across the 1st district while fighting back against the insanity of Biden's border policies, high inflation, and high gas prices caused by the Pelosi and Biden agenda. Read on for an update from Congressman Chabot on the campaign trail. **_Congressman Chabot on the Trail_** _Fish Fry Updates_ As the Lenten season continues, Congressman Chabot has been attending local fish fries across OH-01, bringing his signature Chabot cups with him at every stop. Voters have been sharing their concerns about the state of the country under Joe Biden and Nancy Pelosi's failed leadership. Voters are excited about re-electing Congressman Chabot and taking back the House this fall!We're looking forward to a few more stops before the end of Lent! _Congressman Chabot on 55KRC with Brian Thomas_ Congressman Chabot spoke with Brian Thomas on 55KRC earlier this week about the Biden Border Crisis, Pelosi's tricks in the House, and the other issues of the day._" We already have chaos at the border, this will only make it worse."_ - Congressman Chabot on the Biden Administration's repeal of Title 42.You can read full interview [here](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-tyyktrid-kujkulhluu-y/)._Congressman Chabot: Backing the Blue_ Congressman Chabot recently introduced legislation that would help support retired police officers and first responders. Congressman Chabot is proud to back the blue while his opponent is the literal author of the defund the police movement in Cincinnati. You can read about the bill [here](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-tyyktrid-kujkulhluu-j/). _Endorsements for Congressman Chabot_ Over the last week, our campaign has been endorsed by the following groups:Ohio Right to Life PACOhio Values VotersAmericans for ProsperityCAVPACWe're thankful for their support!_Mike Pompeo for Steve Chabot_ Earlier today, former Secretary of State Mike Pompeo was in town to speak at a fundraiser for Congressman Chabot. Secretary Pompeo also announced his endorsement of the Congressman!We're very thankful for the friendship and support of Secretary Pompeo! _This Week 's Blog - "We're All Border States Now"_This week's blog is about the situation at our Southern Border and the devastating effects it has had on our communities, _" Just how unserious this administration takes controlling our border is probably best illustrated by who Biden put in charge of it - Kamala Harris. First she hemmed and hawed when asked if she'd ever been to the border; then acknowledged that, no, she hadn't; but then said she hadn't been to Europe either. Then she cackled uncontrollably."_Read the blog post [here](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-tyyktrid-kujkulhluu-t/). As a reminder - Early voting for the May 3rd primary has started! You can vote early in person at your local Board of Elections, absentee via mail, or in person on May 3rd!Have a great weekend.Yours truly,John GomezCampaign Manager - Chabot for Congress [Donate](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-tyyktrid-kujkulhluu-i/) [Get a Yard Sign](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-tyyktrid-kujkulhluu-d/) [](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-tyyktrid-kujkulhluu-h/) [](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-tyyktrid-kujkulhluu-k/)[](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-tyyktrid-kujkulhluu-u/)[](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-tyyktrid-kujkulhluu-o/) [ Share ](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-fb-tyyktrid-kujkulhluu-n/) [ Tweet ](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-tw-tyyktrid-kujkulhluu-p/) [ Forward ](https://stevechabotforcongress.forwardtomyfriend.com/r-kujkulhluu-961825B2-tyyktrid-l-z) | Chabot for Congress, P.O. Box 54461, Cincinnati, OH 45254 You are receiving this email because of your connection to our cause. If you receive this email in error, please use the unsubscribe link below and remove yourself from future mailings. [Preferences](https://stevechabotforcongress.updatemyprofile.com/r-tyyktrid-961825B2-kujkulhluu-v) | [Unsubscribe](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-u-tyyktrid-kujkulhluu-e/)

body:
with record runaway spending
| | | |
---
---
| [](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001A76I_cbbK8-91HqDOUFithuSaUJhcAc8ScRb8kSzZVu0cZ9rCrXanEOXsSqP8lUCc-efFDjMqGqd4yoLG0j0o-Hb23riKTCfR79jmZqfL5o0uKk6DIRzDSlWqWbJ8AyQXQ7uPP9CQaUg0Way_sSfmobnnb7PIFfW8u4rSjvwPjWcM6v9YCI0x7dBrFHhDJAO&c=jRmCN85skxJOLzOV595RwRTfymgAO6EoWIeDA-52Nh5urPV9LM79yQ==&ch=T04CbX_67nBAX4A_oanYZehq4csCDqv-9pouM3B0IenFeEpuYOcJ7g==)

| |

| Dear Friend, Albany Politicians just passed a runaway spending Budget that pushes a radical leftist agenda and spends 220 BILLION taxpayer dollars. The 2022-2023 New York State Budget includes nearly $8 billion MORE than last year, and a stunning $34 billion MORE than 2020. This represents a staggering two-year spending increase of more than 18 percent. Since 2019, Senate Democrats have consistently blown past the two-percent spending cap Republicans maintained while in the Majority. The radical leftist agenda has only failed New Yorkers:
* No meaningful changes to pro-criminal laws like bail reform;
* Failure to provide full state gas tax relief;
* Taxpayer-funded tuition for inmates;
* Millions for taxpayer funded political campaigns - which is great for career politicians, but really bad for taxpayers;
* Weakens New York's critical Kendra's Law

It's time that Albany politicians return to Planet Earth and support the priorities of the people of New York. Rather than giving away taxpayer money to lawbreakers, what we need to be doing is cutting taxes and government waste, delivering much needed gas tax relief, and adopting a philosophy to make our state less expensive, less dangerous, and more prosperous.
[With your support, we can restore common-sense policies and spending back to New York by electing a Republican Majority.](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001A76I_cbbK8-91HqDOUFithuSaUJhcAc8ScRb8kSzZVu0cZ9rCrXanEOXsSqP8lUCc-efFDjMqGqd4yoLG0j0o-Hb23riKTCfR79jmZqfL5o0uKk6DIRzDSlWqWbJ8AyQXQ7uPP9CQaUg0Way_sSfmobnnb7PIFfW8u4rSjvwPjWcM6v9YCI0x7dBrFHhDJAO&c=jRmCN85skxJOLzOV595RwRTfymgAO6EoWIeDA-52Nh5urPV9LM79yQ==&ch=T04CbX_67nBAX4A_oanYZehq4csCDqv-9pouM3B0IenFeEpuYOcJ7g==)

clean_body: with record runaway spending | | | | | == | | | Dear Friend, Albany Politicians just passed a runaway spending Budget that pushes a radical leftist agenda and spends 220 BILLION taxpayer dollars. The 2022-2023 New York State Budget includes nearly $8 billion MORE than last year, and a stunning $34 billion MORE than 2020. This represents a staggering two-year spending increase of more than 18 percent. Since 2019, Senate Democrats have consistently blown past the two-percent spending cap Republicans maintained while in the Majority. The radical leftist agenda has only failed New Yorkers: No meaningful changes to pro-criminal laws like bail reform; Failure to provide full state gas tax relief; Taxpayer-funded tuition for inmates; Millions for taxpayer funded political campaigns - which is great for career politicians, but really bad for taxpayers; * Weakens New York's critical Kendra's Law It's time that Albany politicians return to Planet Earth and support the priorities of the people of New York. Rather than giving away taxpayer money to lawbreakers, what we need to be doing is cutting taxes and government waste, delivering much needed gas tax relief, and adopting a philosophy to make our state less expensive, less dangerous, and more prosperous. == | | | | == | | | == == == | PAID FOR BY ROB ORTT FOR STATE SENATE | | | | | | | | Ortt for State Senate | PO Box 1279, North Tonawanda, NY 14120 | | Sent by mailto:info@robortt.com in collaboration with |
