name: Sarah Palin
subject: I announced my candidacy for the U.S House
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Sarah for Alaska
body:
America is at a tipping point. | Recently I announced my candidacy for the U.S. House seat representing Alaska.
[View this message in your browser](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z782eakb3fmg5cor65jh5pqdr6uq70lki5ksuqno_rp22sh2s8i66ob4slg6aor2cth238h5e8he485he5o75pt7kkpq8ddl69qbcd1jm4qj6d9jmpqj7d9neppqcdtlmui34thgmipnadt4sbp65s9jmaqe2tr0c9ir6sdmeiom8tj7mdo6ddj26uo61ctnm9hncshmcupmcdj1m1o6fkjge9i3cc5icpp78cbmc3gb8p9gs2qj2p76cpj3ap5l6grrcpb664ob6p9nm2qmash5u)
America is at a tipping point. | Recently I announced my candidacy for the U.S. House seat representing Alaska.
Friend,

**Recently I announced my candidacy for the U.S. House seat representing Alaska.**

I first entered politics 30 years ago, when I was elected to city council in Wasilla. I still live in Wasilla; my family is here; my son goes to school here. My heart will ALWAYS be in Alaska, even when I’m representing you in Washington, D.C.

America is at a tipping point. As I’ve watched the far left destroy our country, I knew I had to step up and join the fight. And now I’m asking you to do the exact same thing.

I can’t do this without your support.

That’s why for a short time, when you make your next contribution of ANY AMOUNT, you’ll automatically cement your name as an **Official Founding Supporter**.

**[CONTRIBUTE NOW TO BECOME AN OFFICIAL FOUNDING SUPPORTER.>>](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z0stpbommd1sp52g3vj8ef6cniqr9emcdg5v9eg0_rp22sh2s8i66ob4slg6aor2cth2bs)**

This is your chance to go down in history. YOU are the reason I’m running, and YOU will be the reason we win.

_**[Please contribute $35 by 11:59 PM TONIGHT to join the fight and mark your status as an Official Founding Supporter.>>](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zgaos60q8umei49o7jh5lilagor21hcrnbtbkvm8_rp22sh2s8i66ob4slg6aor2cth2bs)**_

[](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zltm4n4qm6e0ev045ad7gccnl7stk7ngf27t1vsg_rp22sh2s8i66ob4slg6aor2cth2bs)

At this critical time in our nation’s history, we need leaders who will combat the left’s socialist, big-government, America-last agenda.

This country was built by heroes, and the radical left dishonors their legacies by opening our borders to illegal immigrants, mortgaging our children’s future, and selling out our nation’s interest to the highest bidder.

I’m in this race to win it and join the fight for freedom alongside other patriots willing to sacrifice all to save our country.

I just have one simple question for you:

**WILL YOU JOIN ME?**

**[Please contribute $35 by 11:59 PM TONIGHT to join the fight and mark your status as an Official Founding Supporter.>>](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2ztjgjfp5krbhl1tsf3ausql669erng7uggsf6s20_rp22sh2s8i66ob4slg6aor2cth2bs)**

Thank you & God Bless America.

[](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zl979mectkfcd10rrvls53tq196c5jd8k34rd02o_rp22sh2s8i66ob4slg6aor2cth2bs)
Sarah Palin

**[CONTRIBUTE NOW>>](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z3kv2jvuaegfqoftpkaaqcorom09iqnhlebeagl8_rp22sh2s8i66ob4slg6aor2cth2bs)**

subject: I showed my respect for Trump with my feet
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Michael Franken for Iowa, Inc
body:
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43940321/339395524/301434390?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDI4MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4ZGUxNTBmOC0wNGI4LWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ujlfZzqp7LxIBBteID7rkpeQPTwSHOYYlGVZ-smJRcs=&emci=3cdb2b23-d5b7-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&emdi=8de150f8-04b8-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&ceid=6371843)

Hello,
It was Ben Franklin who, when asked what form of government the constitutional convention had produced, said: “A republic, if you can keep it.”
Donald Trump’s election sealed the deal for me to retire after nearly 4 decades in the U.S. Navy. Having been in uniform for every President since Jimmy Carter, I showed my respect for Mr. Trump with my feet. I was done. It was apparent that the next four years would not go well.
Unfortunately, putting himself before his country culminated when Trump and his fellow Republicans planned, cajoled accomplices, then launched a domestic insurrection on the U.S. Capitol. Five lives were lost, and the nation’s innocence, as well. And it ain’t over.
January 6th set a precedent that leadership in a political party will condone political violence. **To this day, GOP members who continue to perpetuate the Big Lie are a direct threat to our democracy.** An opportunity to come clean for my opponent, Senator Chuck Grassley, who voted against Trump’s impeachment and blocked a bipartisan commission to investigate the attack, still has yet to occur.
The Republican party needs to cull its ranks of the active insurrectionists. Every single person involved in the January 6 attack needs to be held accountable for their actions, including sitting members of Congress who participated in the planning and execution of the insurrection.
**I’m running for the U.S. Senate against Senator Chuck Grassley because I place nation over baseless insurrection. It is a decision not entirely unlike the time of Lincoln. One does not serve the nation in military service to watch idly while it is dismembered by the likes of Donald Trump and his accomplices, to include Chuck Grassley.**
Mitch McConnell and his Super PACs are raising boatloads to spend against me. I am the ultimate “hard target” for the Republicans, but to get elected, **I need your help. I’m not taking money from corporate PACs – instead, I’m relying entirely on grassroots donors _like you_.**
[**Please, if you can afford to, donate $5 or more to my campaign right now – every dollar you can before midnight tonight – to help me defeat Chuck Grassley, turn Iowa blue, and protect our Democratic Senate majority.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43940323/339395526/-42398318?refcode=em20220409am-nd&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C35%2C50%2C100%2C250&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDI4MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4ZGUxNTBmOC0wNGI4LWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ujlfZzqp7LxIBBteID7rkpeQPTwSHOYYlGVZ-smJRcs=)

subject: Our wins from Georgia’s legislative session

body:
Fair Fight |

| | Friend - It’s here. It’s taken three and a half years for Georgians to have their day in court, and now Fair Fight Action is going to trial on Monday, April 11, 2022. It’s been over a decade since a Section 2 claim under the Voting Rights Act has gone to a full trial on the merits in the Northern District of Georgia, and Fair Fight Action is proud to have the opportunity to fight for Georgia voters. Your early support made this historic moment possible. The fact that we have arrived at this moment is a win that we can be proud of. Even before today, our case has already yielded significant results, as 22,000 Georgians have been restored to the voting rolls as a result of our litigation to date. _Overview of _Fair Fight Action v. Raffensperger__ Fair Fight Action's federal lawsuit against Georgia’s Secretary of State and State Election Board challenges several unconstitutional voter suppression practices. During the course of the trial, the State of Georgia will have to defend its suppressive voting practices, while Fair Fight Action will seek remedies to put an end to those practices. _Updates from Atlanta_ Starting next week, you will receive weekly updates from our team on the status of the case, key takeaways, media coverage, and actionable items from our trial team in Atlanta. Please be in touch with us if you have any questions. Buckle up, team. We’re about to cross a historic threshold and are proud to have you with us in this fight. Yours in the Fight, The Fair Fight Action Team [unsubscribe](https://email.ngpvan.com/unsubscribeUnique/a21d8eda-a8b7-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a/90e150f8-04b8-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS84ODQ1MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5MGUxNTBmOC0wNGI4LWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=npI47yW5Of8IfaLX4Gea_dq85TRUFGiHqe0n6izp7cQ=&id=102485538) |

name: Sarah Palin
subject: Become a Founding Supporter
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Sarah for Alaska
body:
America is at a tipping point. | Recently I announced my candidacy for the U.S. House seat representing Alaska.
[View this message in your browser](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zj4jj033ul24m9t9b4sbfnhp5qik5ljpf4vm7ad0_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgebjqf99jk1p7fcdkmcqjas3h6gonact66uqrf91ieoob9crl6uie5sj2udqraopk6erbdd5nm2p3cttkc2or3dblcsrraohlcpqr4dbkmlpj4tj4m1p78c37q9o74p1m62p6csjk65r61o5kckoe1d9hcjj6cphlciqj8dtmc5j70tpl61jr1db5e8gq48bi4bh28or1cjim0p76c3g649fg)
America is at a tipping point. | Recently I announced my candidacy for the U.S. House seat representing Alaska.
Friend,

**Recently I announced my candidacy for the U.S. House seat representing Alaska.**

I first entered politics 30 years ago, when I was elected to city council in Wasilla. I still live in Wasilla; my family is here; my son goes to school here. My heart will ALWAYS be in Alaska, even when I’m representing you in Washington, D.C.

America is at a tipping point. As I’ve watched the far left destroy our country, I knew I had to step up and join the fight. And now I’m asking you to do the exact same thing.

I can’t do this without your support.

That’s why for a short time, when you make your next contribution of ANY AMOUNT, you’ll automatically cement your name as an **Official Founding Supporter**.

**[CONTRIBUTE NOW TO BECOME AN OFFICIAL FOUNDING SUPPORTER.>>](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zdsi36m9fb3h0uqn8m1ildmsuulm021o86voj9t0_rp22sh2s8i66ob4slg69pj0s1h2bs)**

This is your chance to go down in history. YOU are the reason I’m running, and YOU will be the reason we win.

_**[Please contribute $35 by 11:59 PM TONIGHT to join the fight and mark your status as an Official Founding Supporter.>>](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zanrf5e56bc07saumam2659qalsmktnpabpbkcio_rp22sh2s8i66ob4slg69pj0s1h2bs)**_

[](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2z1e7ith5mq6n6slm6pmf27cl02n66a3g6e43gp68_rp22sh2s8i66ob4slg69pj0s1h2bs)

At this critical time in our nation’s history, we need leaders who will combat the left’s socialist, big-government, America-last agenda.

This country was built by heroes, and the radical left dishonors their legacies by opening our borders to illegal immigrants, mortgaging our children’s future, and selling out our nation’s interest to the highest bidder.

I’m in this race to win it and join the fight for freedom alongside other patriots willing to sacrifice all to save our country.

I just have one simple question for you:

**WILL YOU JOIN ME?**

**[Please contribute $35 by 11:59 PM TONIGHT to join the fight and mark your status as an Official Founding Supporter.>>](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2znapiuuekk5cf2mlrk7ch0j6oi5rvoemsleg1is8_rp22sh2s8i66ob4slg69pj0s1h2bs)**

Thank you & God Bless America.

[](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zuevljl5ebiodr14lo9e3it5cnqaafaprb3m7grg_rp22sh2s8i66ob4slg69pj0s1h2bs)
Sarah Palin

**[CONTRIBUTE NOW>>](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zegqhuoa4qiadmqklgs2ckkgs93q6ki0b90n1818_rp22sh2s8i66ob4slg69pj0s1h2bs)**

name: Tim Scott
subject: I know how much $5 is.
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TIM SCOTT FOR SENATE
body:
|
---
| | |
Patriot,

I know that asking for money is hard. I know that asking for something as little as $5 can be even harder. To a lot of people $5 is a lot.

It was a lot for me growing up. I was raised in a single parent household in North Charleston, South Carolina. My mom worked 16-hour days to keep food on the table and a roof over our heads. I got my first job, changing oil at a gas station, when I was 13.

**I understand the value of a dollar.**

I don't take asking for money lightly. I know that every donation made is a sacrifice and I am forever grateful for each and every gift.

With that being said, it would mean so much to me if you could chip in $5 to make sure we beat our goal.

---
| | | [Chip in $5](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/60082356:JI6ZlboZN:m:1:3299561967:2FCDE4EAD07D80F82BCDA8B2CADC206C:r "Chip in $5")
---

Thank you so much. I know that chipping in any amount can be hard - but if I meet my goal, I can continue this fight for folks like you.

-Tim
---
| |
* * *
---
| [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/60082357:JI6ZlboZN:m:1:3299561967:2FCDE4EAD07D80F82BCDA8B2CADC206C:r)
---
Patriot, the difference between flipping just ONE more seat in the Senate means more than you might think.

Without taking the Senate back from the hands of the dangerous Democrat agenda, I'm worried that the American Dream is going to become nothing but a distant memory. The direction this country is going under the Democrats is _**frightening**_.

If Republicans have enough support to take back the Senate, we can secure hope, prosperity, and American values for generations to come.

**But we can only do that with YOUR support**. There is **no one else** we can rely on at this point. You've been such a valued member of our team since Day 1 - can you take this one crucial step with us?
---
| | | [DONATE ](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/60082357:JI6ZlboZN:m:1:3299561967:2FCDE4EAD07D80F82BCDA8B2CADC206C:r "DONATE")
---
Thank you for saving America with me today, Patriot.
---
| PAID FOR BY TIM SCOTT FOR SENATE
---

CHARLESTON, SC 29407

Friend, tell us now: Do you approve of President Biden? | | | | 11:59 p.m. deadline | Response missing from dpwillis67@gmail.com | This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. name: Genesis 123 Foundation
subject: Urgent Passover Appeal
body:
**URGENT PASSOVER APPEAL** As Passover approaches, Jews around the world celebrate our redemption from slavery in Egypt, and the return to Israel. Sadly, due to the current state of global affairs, far too many Jews have been displaced and won't be home to celebrate. Most of the Jews of Ukraine will be celebrating in exile, or attempting to live through the Festival of Freedom in a war zone. For a Jew, not being home on Passover is of tremendous significance, akin to a Christian not being home for Christmas. **[The Genesis 123 Foundation established a fund to support people in Ukraine, and the millions of refugees who have fled. We need your help to provide urgent Passover supplies to the many thousands of Jews, celebrating the Exodus in exile.](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/60086178:J1xGEboeN:m:1:3317145305:DC335245AD585F541108BEE52A1C68F7:r "The
Genesis 123 Foundation established a fund to support people in Ukraine, and the millions of refugees who have fled. We need your help to provide
urgent Passover supplies to the many thousands of Jews, celebrating the Exodus in exile.")** In Poland, there have been so many refugees that the Jewish population in Poland has increased by hundreds of percent. The Jewish community there has been working tirelessly to provide for the needs of all refugees, Jews and non-Jews. The rabbi in Krakow said they are so overwhelmed that they haven't begun to prepare for Passover which usually takes time, because they're just so busy finding food, warm clothes and places for the refugees to sleep. **[In these dire times, please join us in helping to make Passover possible for the tens of thousands of Jews suffering as a result of the war in Ukraine.](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/60086178:J1xGEboeN:m:1:3317145305:DC335245AD585F541108BEE52A1C68F7:r "In
these dire times, please join us in helping to make Passover possible for the tens of thousands of Jews suffering as a result of the war in Ukraine.")** I hope you can find it in your heart to provide urgent support for the citizens of Ukraine, those who are still fighting for their country and those who have become refugees, Jews and non-Jews. All of them are desperately seeking to survive this atrocity and we are doing our part to ease their suffering now, and for Passover. **[Please help us today!](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/60086178:J1xGEboeN:m:1:3317145305:DC335245AD585F541108BEE52A1C68F7:r "Please help us today!")** May the Lord Bless You and Keep You, Jonathan Feldstein
President, Genesis 123 Foundation
---

We’ve got a righteous fight on our hands in this year’s midterms: electing more champions for working people up and down the ballot. I’m very happy to share six new Warren Democrats endorsements for 2022 — six candidates who know how to fight, know how to win, and know how to tackle the challenges their communities face. [_**Before I share the six candidates I just endorsed, can you chip in $3 or whatever works for you today to elect more Warren Democrats across the country and support our re-election campaign? >
These terrific Democrats will make us proud:
I fought by **Stacey Abrams** ’ side in 2018, I’m glad to endorse her, and I can’t wait to call her Governor Abrams in 2023. She lifts up the voices of Georgia families who have been left behind and counted out, and she has a vision and a plan to help working Georgians succeed.
**Nida Allam** is the first Muslim woman elected to office in North Carolina. She’s delivered real change — like a $15 minimum wage for county workers and property tax relief that helped families stay in their homes during the pandemic. Now she’s running for Congress in North Carolina’s 4th District to keep up the fight.
I’ve been able to count on **Anthony Brown** as a partner in Congress, and I know he’ll continue to fight for justice and equity as Maryland Attorney General. He stands up for working families, students, and the people who most need a government on their side.
**Nikki Budzinski** is a proven champion for working people — from advocating for better pay and safe working conditions for retail workers and meatpackers to helping raise the minimum wage in Illinois. We need her in Congress representing Illinois’ 13th District.
**Tina Kotek** has already gotten big things done for working families in Oregon, like raising the minimum wage, expanding health coverage, and passing paid sick leave and paid family leave. As governor, she’ll keep delivering results.
**Erica Smith** is a mother, minister, educator, and experienced legislator running for Congress in North Carolina’s 1st District. Her plan for a Rural New Deal will lift up family farms, raise the minimum wage, unionize the South, and deliver universal broadband and health care.
**We make real change by coming together and supporting Democrats up and down the ballot who will fight to put power in the hands of working people — where it belongs. That’s why I’m so happy to endorse these six candidates. **
[_**You make it possible to support champions like these across the country**_ _**. If it makes sense for you right now, will you pitch in $3 to support our re-election campaign, elect more Warren Democrats, and power our grassroots movement?**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43949249/339433418/-702766295?refcode=EMZ4G_END_20220409_V1S2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDgvMS84NzkzMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkZTk4NWQzZC0xMWI4LWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=IAkvpzWWjgs0rmpZGiNWY-69-swUOBO4qumd6qXqBHU=)
Thanks for being a part of this,
Elizabeth

clean_body: I’m very happy to endorse Stacey, Erica, Anthony, Nida, Nikki, Tina, and more Warren Democrats. | | | We’ve got a righteous fight on our hands in this year’s midterms: electing more champions for working people up and down the ballot. I’m very happy to share six new Warren Democrats endorsements for 2022 — six candidates who know how to fight, know how to win, and know how to tackle the challenges their communities face. = | If you've saved payment info with ActBlue Express, your donation will process automatically: | | | | | | | | | | | These terrific Democrats will make us proud: I fought by Stacey Abrams ’ side in 2018, I’m glad to endorse her, and I can’t wait to call her Governor Abrams in 2023. She lifts up the voices of Georgia families who have been left behind and counted out, and she has a vision and a plan to help working Georgians succeed. Nida Allam is the first Muslim woman elected to office in North Carolina. She’s delivered real change — like a $15 minimum wage for county workers and property tax relief that helped families stay in their homes during the pandemic. Now she’s running for Congress in North Carolina’s 4th District to keep up the fight. I’ve been able to count on Anthony Brown as a partner in Congress, and I know he’ll continue to fight for justice and equity as Maryland Attorney General. He stands up for working families, students, and the people who most need a government on their side. Nikki Budzinski is a proven champion for working people — from advocating for better pay and safe working conditions for retail workers and meatpackers to helping raise the minimum wage in Illinois. We need her in Congress representing Illinois’ 13th District. Tina Kotek has already gotten big things done for working families in Oregon, like raising the minimum wage, expanding health coverage, and passing paid sick leave and paid family leave. As governor, she’ll keep delivering results. Erica Smith is a mother, minister, educator, and experienced legislator running for Congress in North Carolina’s 1st District. Her plan for a Rural New Deal will lift up family farms, raise the minimum wage, unionize the South, and deliver universal broadband and health care. We make real change by coming together and supporting Democrats up and down the ballot who will fight to put power in the hands of working people — where it belongs. That’s why I’m so happy to endorse these six candidates. = Thanks for being a part of this, Elizabeth = | | | | | | ---|---|---|--- | Paid for by Warren Democrats All content © 2022 Warren Democrats, All Rights Reserved PO Box 171375, Boston, MA 02117

Peter —

I’ve been living with Type 1 diabetes for over 30 years, so I know firsthand the impact that sky-high insulin costs can have on a family. Last week, the House of Representatives passed the Affordable Insulin Now Act, which would cap the monthly out-of-pocket cost of insulin at $35. This will be life-changing and life-saving for millions of Americans, myself included.

**But Congressman Bob Good voted against this legislation.** I think it’s simple: diabetic Americans should never have to worry that their life-saving medication will have to be rationed because it is unaffordable. Apparently Bob Good disagrees.

**Until we can get Bob Good out of office, we must send him a message that making insulin affordable has massive grassroots support here in Virginia and across the country.[_Will you add your name to our petition right away to show your support for the Affordable Insulin Now Act?_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43949863/339435726/1720347462?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NTU1NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiNjE5ODQzMi0xNGI4LWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=MAp8kxLUMEQCy1GeaPIDyJu3mzr-SbTwS5pDJPcICR8=&emci=2518fcb3-78b7-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&emdi=b6198432-14b8-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&ceid=3919287)**

Dan Crenshaw here.
This week, I called out the Biden Administration's disastrous decision to rescind Title 42, the Trump order that kept illegal immigrants out of our country during the public health emergency. I also exposed the hypocrisy of the left blaming oil companies for the energy crisis they created.
Thank you for your support. Now, here's your brief:

| 18,000.
That's how many illegal immigrants could cross into our country EVERY DAY once Joe Biden rescinds Title 42. We are currently experiencing 7,000 illegal crossings every day as our border continues to be overrun. Remember, Obama's Homeland Security Secretary said that 1,000 per day was a crisis.
Joe Biden's border crisis is unlike anything we've seen before. And that's why we need to take action.
Joe Biden claims that we don't need Title 42 anymore because the pandemic is winding down (even though we are all still forced to wear masks on planes and kids are still forcibly masked in school). But there's another public health emergency on the rise: fentanyl overdoses.
Fentanyl is the leading cause of death for people aged 18-45 in the United States. There were 100,000 in 2021 for this age group, meaning fentanyl killed twice as many people as COVID-19, car accidents, cancer, and suicide.
As fentanyl pours across our border and into our communities, we need to extend Title 42 to be used to protect the American people from fentanyl smuggling at our border.
I'm supporting legislation to do just that but I need your help to put pressure on Joe Biden.

| This week, the Democrats dragged oil and gas executives in front of our Energy and Commerce committee and accused them of keeping gas prices high. I took a hammer to their argument.
Democrats want you to forget that they banned drilling, canceled pipelines, and outright said they wanted to destroy the oil and gas industry. Some Democrats at the committee hearing blamed oil companies for not boosting production, even though the same Democrats chastised the oil companies for not doing enough to DECREASE production to address climate change just a couple months earlier.
Democrats also want you to forget these facts:
Fact #1 \- American oil and gas production is cleaner than any other country - it's cleaner than OPEC's, AND cleaner than Russia's.
Fact #2 \- Global energy demand WILL increase by 50% by 2050, with most of that coming from oil and gas.
Fact #3 \- Oil and gas contributes to human flourishing. Period. Renewables will never meet the necessary demand that Democrats claim they will. To meet the renewables only climate goals, you'd have to mine lithium 2,000% more. You'd have to mine indium 8,000% more. Cobalt production will need to grow 300-800% more.
Even further, for a wind farm to produce the same amount of energy as a nuclear plant, you need 100 times more land. You need 30,000 tons of iron ore, 50,000 tons of concrete, and 900 tons of plastic blades that cannot be recycled.
Does this sound like green energy to you? No. And by the way, this ONLY works when the wind is actually blowing. What happens when it stops? Energy production stops.
Fact #4 \- If American natural gas quadrupled in the next decade, we would be able to displace coal around the world. Half of global emissions are from foreign coal - displace that with cleaner gas, and emissions are reduced by 60%. This is entirely possible, and would solve the energy crisis and, by the way, reduce emissions far more than the foolish, $10 TRILLION Green New Deal ever could.
Help me stand up for American energy. | What do conservatives stand for? How do we win - not only the election in November - but also the culture war at large? How do we prove that conservatism is the only governing philosophy that can ensure freedom and prosperity for all Americans? I've been pondering these questions for a long time - and now it's more important than ever for conservatives to have the right answers. So, this past weekend, I tried to articulate those answers. And the right path forward for us to reverse the disastrous course America is currently headed down.
Please watch my speech above.
Conservatives believe that when you maximize freedom, strong people will thrive. When you rely on and build upon the proven principles of free enterprise, the protection of natural rights, the institutional structures of a republic, you create a formula for boundless success and prosperity.
And it's the values of the Republican Party that protect and promote these principles. It's the Republican Party that defends the greatest ideas and the greatest founding documents in history. It is the Republican Party that places faith in the individual to pursue their happiness without the weight of government on their back. The Republican Party is America's last great hope.
Conservatives must be happy warriors and proudly tell the world why freedom is the path to prosperity. That's how we win in November and for years to come.
If you believe in this vision, I hope that you'll consider donating to my campaign to further this vision, help Republicans take back the majority in Congress, and grow our conservative movement. clean_body: the border crisis is about to get worse... | | | | | | | | == | Peter- Dan Crenshaw here. This week, I called out the Biden Administration's disastrous decision to rescind Title 42, the Trump order that kept illegal immigrants out of our country during the public health emergency. I also exposed the hypocrisy of the left blaming oil companies for the energy crisis they created. Thank you for your support. Now, here's your brief: | | | | | | The Border Crisis Is About to Get Worse | == | == | 18,000. That's how many illegal immigrants could cross into our country EVERY DAY once Joe Biden rescinds Title 42. We are currently experiencing 7,000 illegal crossings every day as our border continues to be overrun. Remember, Obama's Homeland Security Secretary said that 1,000 per day was a crisis. Joe Biden's border crisis is unlike anything we've seen before. And that's why we need to take action. Joe Biden claims that we don't need Title 42 anymore because the pandemic is winding down (even though we are all still forced to wear masks on planes and kids are still forcibly masked in school). But there's another public health emergency on the rise: fentanyl overdoses. Fentanyl is the leading cause of death for people aged 18-45 in the United States. There were 100,000 in 2021 for this age group, meaning fentanyl killed twice as many people as COVID-19, car accidents, cancer, and suicide. As fentanyl pours across our border and into our communities, we need to extend Title 42 to be used to protect the American people from fentanyl smuggling at our border. I'm supporting legislation to do just that but I need your help to put pressure on Joe Biden. == | | | | | | | | | | | The ultimate Independence Day celebration, the Summer of 1776, is BACK at Starshine Texas this July 2nd. Chris Janson ("Buy Me a Boat") will be performing! General Admission and VIP tickets go on sale next week. Since you are already signed up to receive emails from Dan Crenshaw, we'll be sending you special early bird access to discount tickets BEFORE they go on sale to the general public. Tell your friends to sign up NOW at == if they would like to get access to early bird prices. This is a different location than last year, just 20 minutes from Houston. | | | | | | | | Democrats Created an Energy Crisis. Now They Want You to Forget That. | == | == | This week, the Democrats dragged oil and gas executives in front of our Energy and Commerce committee and accused them of keeping gas prices high. I took a hammer to their argument. Democrats want you to forget that they banned drilling, canceled pipelines, and outright said they wanted to destroy the oil and gas industry. Some Democrats at the committee hearing blamed oil companies for not boosting production, even though the same Democrats chastised the oil companies for not doing enough to DECREASE production to address climate change just a couple months earlier. Democrats also want you to forget these facts: Fact #1 \- American oil and gas production is cleaner than any other country - it's cleaner than OPEC's, AND cleaner than Russia's. Fact #2 \- Global energy demand WILL increase by 50% by 2050, with most of that coming from oil and gas. Fact #3 \- Oil and gas contributes to human flourishing. Period. Renewables will never meet the necessary demand that Democrats claim they will. To meet the renewables only climate goals, you'd have to mine lithium 2,000% more. You'd have to mine indium 8,000% more. Cobalt production will need to grow 300-800% more. Even further, for a wind farm to produce the same amount of energy as a nuclear plant, you need 100 times more land. You need 30,000 tons of iron ore, 50,000 tons of concrete, and 900 tons of plastic blades that cannot be recycled. Does this sound like green energy to you? No. And by the way, this ONLY works when the wind is actually blowing. What happens when it stops? Energy production stops. Fact #4 \- If American natural gas quadrupled in the next decade, we would be able to displace coal around the world. Half of global emissions are from foreign coal - displace that with cleaner gas, and emissions are reduced by 60%. This is entirely possible, and would solve the energy crisis and, by the way, reduce emissions far more than the foolish, $10 TRILLION Green New Deal ever could. Help me stand up for American energy. == | | | | | | This Is Our Vision | == | == | What do conservatives stand for? How do we win - not only the election in November - but also the culture war at large? How do we prove that conservatism is the only governing philosophy that can ensure freedom and prosperity for all Americans? I've been pondering these questions for a long time - and now it's more important than ever for conservatives to have the right answers. So, this past weekend, I tried to articulate those answers. And the right path forward for us to reverse the disastrous course America is currently headed down. Please watch my speech above. Conservatives believe that when you maximize freedom, strong people will thrive. When you rely on and build upon the proven principles of free enterprise, the protection of natural rights, the institutional structures of a republic, you create a formula for boundless success and prosperity. And it's the values of the Republican Party that protect and promote these principles. It's the Republican Party that defends the greatest ideas and the greatest founding documents in history. It is the Republican Party that places faith in the individual to pursue their happiness without the weight of government on their back. The Republican Party is America's last great hope. Conservatives must be happy warriors and proudly tell the world why freedom is the path to prosperity. That's how we win in November and for years to come. If you believe in this vision, I hope that you'll consider donating to my campaign to further this vision, help Republicans take back the majority in Congress, and grow our conservative movement. You can donate to my campaign at ==. | | | | | | ON SOCIAL MEDIA | | | == | | | == | | | == | | | | | | RECOMMENDED READS HOUSTON CHRONICLE: == FOX NEWS: == NATIONAL REVIEW: == Thank you for reading! Have a great weekend. In Service, | | Dan Crenshaw | | | | | == | | | Thank you for reading. If you agree with Dan Crenshaw, == Your gift won't just sit in a "war chest". It will be put to immediate use electing strong Republican candidates in swing districts across the country, exposing the truth about the Biden-Pelosi radical agenda to millions of voters, and building the next generation of the conservative movement with events like Dan Crenshaw's annual youth summit. If you prefer to donate by check, please make payable and mail to Crenshaw for Congress, 5900 Memorial Drive, Suite 215, Houston, TX 77007. | | | | | PAID FOR BY DAN CRENSHAW FOR CONGRESS | | Crenshaw for Congress | 5900 Memorial Drive, Suite 215, Houston, TX 77007 | | Sent by mailto:dan.crenshaw@crenshawforcongress.com

name: Team NextGen
subject: Did your senators vote to confirm Ketanji Brown Jackson?
body:
| | Friend, **On Thursday, the Senate confirmed Ketanji Brown Jackson as our next Supreme Court justice.** Throughout the confirmation process, Justice Jackson proved that she is fair, eminently qualified, and fully committed to protecting our fundamental rights. As soon-to-be the first Black woman and first former federal public defender to serve on our nation’s highest court, Ketanji Brown Jackson is breaking barriers. Though these milestones are long overdue, it's impossible not to feel joy that someone so deserving and distinguished will soon sit on the Supreme Court. [Take a moment to write to thank your senators who voted to confirm Ketanji Brown Jackson — and call out those who failed to do what’s right.](https://click.everyaction.com/k/43951820/339445433/-2084235850?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNTkcvMS81NjE1OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiMDFjZWJkMi0xN2I4LWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=V95n-Io1cXJTa0buzBtCRWCblX62hhMZshCWn0rcxQM=&emci=55541e0a-66b7-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&emdi=b01cebd2-17b8-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&ceid=6787172) [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/43951821/339445434/-1277666796?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNTkcvMS81NjE1OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiMDFjZWJkMi0xN2I4LWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=V95n-Io1cXJTa0buzBtCRWCblX62hhMZshCWn0rcxQM=&emci=55541e0a-66b7-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&emdi=b01cebd2-17b8-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&ceid=6787172) [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/43951822/339445435/-1277666796?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNTkcvMS81NjE1OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiMDFjZWJkMi0xN2I4LWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=V95n-Io1cXJTa0buzBtCRWCblX62hhMZshCWn0rcxQM=&emci=55541e0a-66b7-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&emdi=b01cebd2-17b8-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&ceid=6787172) Perhaps now more than any point in our lifetimes, the Supreme Court is at the center of our nation’s most pressing issues. As the 6–3 far-right supermajority continues to flagrantly upend settled law and chip away at our constitutional rights, everything that we care about is on the line — from the right to a safe and legal abortion to equal access to the ballot box. Thursday’s historic confirmation vote was an important step toward restoring integrity in our legal system, but we must remember: The burden to reform our broken courts is not on Ketanji Brown Jackson alone. It’s on us, and our elected officials, to use our power to create change and renew the faith in a justice system that has been unjust for far too long. clean_body: | | Friend, On Thursday, the Senate confirmed Ketanji Brown Jackson as our next Supreme Court justice. Throughout the confirmation process, Justice Jackson proved that she is fair, eminently qualified, and fully committed to protecting our fundamental rights. As soon-to-be the first Black woman and first former federal public defender to serve on our nation’s highest court, Ketanji Brown Jackson is breaking barriers. Though these milestones are long overdue, it's impossible not to feel joy that someone so deserving and distinguished will soon sit on the Supreme Court. Perhaps now more than any point in our lifetimes, the Supreme Court is at the center of our nation’s most pressing issues. As the 6–3 far-right supermajority continues to flagrantly upend settled law and chip away at our constitutional rights, everything that we care about is on the line — from the right to a safe and legal abortion to equal access to the ballot box. Thursday’s historic confirmation vote was an important step toward restoring integrity in our legal system, but we must remember: The burden to reform our broken courts is not on Ketanji Brown Jackson alone. It’s on us, and our elected officials, to use our power to create change and renew the faith in a justice system that has been unjust for far too long. Thank you, Team NextGen | NextGen America 268 Bush St. #2919 San Francisco CA 94104-3503 This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com | =

| Hi Peter, Natasha here, John King’s Finance Director. As you may have heard, Maryland’s primary election date just changed to **July 19th.** That means we need to continue to fuel our campaign through those extra two weeks — **it’s all hands on deck.** The truth is: April will be a major turning point for our campaign. We just launched brand new yard signs (which have been a big hit already!), soon we’ll be going up on TV to share John’s message with critical voters across the state, and we’re seeing more Marylanders energized by our progressive movement than ever before. So as we gear up this spring, we’re counting on supporters like you to fuel our momentum on the airwaves, in the field, and online. clean_body: This is an all hands on deck effort | = | Hi Peter, Natasha here, John King’s Finance Director. As you may have heard, Maryland’s primary election date just changed to July 19th. That means we need to continue to fuel our campaign through those extra two weeks — it’s all hands on deck. The truth is: April will be a major turning point for our campaign. We just launched brand new yard signs (which have been a big hit already!), soon we’ll be going up on TV to share John’s message with critical voters across the state, and we’re seeing more Marylanders energized by our progressive movement than ever before. So as we gear up this spring, we’re counting on supporters like you to fuel our momentum on the airwaves, in the field, and online. That’s why I’m reaching out now to humbly ask: = | | = We desperately need your support today to ensure we have the resources to launch our massive voter outreach efforts in the coming weeks and deliver on the promise of progress for all Marylanders. But donations have slowed in the past few days, and as John’s Finance Director it’s my job to make sure we get back on track. = | | = | = | = | | = | = | = | = With gratitude, Natasha McKenzie Finance Director - John King and Michelle Siri for Maryland * | | = Paid for by John King for Governor, Eliza Leighton, Treasurer John King for Governor PO Box 8429 Silver Spring, MD 20907 United States | | | ---|---|--- = = If you would like to learn more about John King's historic campaign for Maryland governor, text PROGRESS to 48178 or visit our . name: Marco Rubio
subject: Open this when you have a minute
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Marco Rubio for Senate
body:
I am coming to you in earnest with a big ask here. I want you to know that I don't take this lightly, but it's important.
|
---
| | | Peter,

I am coming to you in earnest with a big ask here. I want you to know that I don't take this lightly, but it's important.

This is a different kind of ask. I'm humbly asking you to keep this box yellow so that today, your donation is not just for this month, but every month:
---
| [](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/60086191:J2-0Vbo2N:m:1:3317145305:024A480F76C765BA8156442222329032:r "Recurring")
---
| | | [YES, MARCO I'LL GO MONTHLY >>](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/60086191:J2-0Vbo2N:m:1:3317145305:024A480F76C765BA8156442222329032:r "YES, MARCO I’LL GO MONTHLY
>>")
---
_You can always cancel, and you will get two emails before we charge your card where you can opt-out for 100% transparency._
**Here 's what you'll get by going monthly:**
1. Newsletters to stay up to date with what conservatives are working on around the country
2. Intel on Marco Rubio's race - field updates, volunteer recruitment updates, polling updates, and advertising updates
3. First dibs on limited edition merchandise and any sales on our merchandise, like shirts, stickers, or koozies
4. And last, less emails asking you for money!

It can be a donation of literally any amount. This race is separated by just 2%, and the _Miami Herald_ has said Val Demings is gaining ground. It isn't an exaggeration to say that the race that will decide the Senate Majority is in grave danger.

I hope you know me well enough to know I always want to be honest with you. _Fox News_ reported this race will be the most expensive in U.S. history. **[We are relying on grassroots supporters like you to fuel our fight for conservative values, so please don't abandon me now.](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/60086191:J2-0Vbo2N:m:1:3317145305:024A480F76C765BA8156442222329032:r "We are relying on grassroots supporters like you to fuel our fight for conservative values, so
please don’t abandon me now.")**
---
| | | [SIGN UP TO GO MONTHLY >>](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/60086191:J2-0Vbo2N:m:1:3317145305:024A480F76C765BA8156442222329032:r "SIGN UP TO GO MONTHLY >>")
---
I hope you'll help me out by subscribing today!

Thank you,
Marco Rubio
---
| | | | |
* * *
---
| [](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/60086192:J2-0Vbo2N:m:1:3317145305:024A480F76C765BA8156442222329032:r "Footer Graphic 1")
---
I talk to folks every day who say they haven't donated because they think they need to write a big check or they think my race isn't close.

Well, let me tell you, this race will be decided on a razor-thin margin. Currently, we're only separated by 2%, but considering the MILLIONS my opponent is raising, she could easily take the lead after smearing me in new campaign ads.

With such a tight race, any amount donated today can make a difference.

**[Please, can you give $4, 8, $12.55, or $17 today?](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/60086192:J2-0Vbo2N:m:1:3317145305:024A480F76C765BA8156442222329032:r "Please, can you give $4, 8, $12.55, or $17 today?")**
---
| | | [DONATE NOW >> ](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/60086192:J2-0Vbo2N:m:1:3317145305:024A480F76C765BA8156442222329032:r "DONATE NOW >>")
---
| | | [](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/60086193:J2-0Vbo2N:m:1:3317145305:024A480F76C765BA8156442222329032:r "Footer Graphic 2")
---
Hey, I wanted to take a moment to let you know that if you can't afford to give today, I understand.

I know what the Democrats have done to this country, and between paying for your groceries and filling up your gas tank, I know money can be tight these days.

**[Instead of donating, do you think you could just register your endorsement for me?](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/60086193:J2-0Vbo2N:m:1:3317145305:024A480F76C765BA8156442222329032:r "Instead of donating, do you think you could just register your endorsement for me?")** No money needed, just your commitment to our shared conservative values.

I really hope I see your name.
---
| | | [ENDORSE MARCO >>](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/60086193:J2-0Vbo2N:m:1:3317145305:024A480F76C765BA8156442222329032:r "ENDORSE MARCO >>")
---

---

subject: 📎 need your input
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Landsman for Congress
body:
---
| | **_[We know it’s Saturday, so we’ll cut to the chase. Greg needs 1,000 supporters to respond to his critical Priorities Survey and let him know what issues matter most to you. Will you take the survey before midnight? It would mean so much to Greg. >> ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43952197/339446921/1258642961?source=20220409_em_pet_b1_nrmv_30_op&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDg5NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1YmE1YzllYy0xOWI4LWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ri8cMvwKE7GP6rUzZi8LMEc6014Ow9oK68PXns2kjT4=&emci=77fcec30-83b7-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&emdi=5ba5c9ec-19b8-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&ceid=10283101)_** Greg’s running to unseat one of the most vulnerable Republicans in Congress – but this race is about more than flipping a single seat.

Republicans like Steve Chabot have consistently put the needs of special interest groups before those of everyday Americans -- **_[and Greg’s had enough.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43952198/339446922/1258642961?source=20220409_em_pet_b1_nrmv_30_op&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDg5NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1YmE1YzllYy0xOWI4LWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ri8cMvwKE7GP6rUzZi8LMEc6014Ow9oK68PXns2kjT4=&emci=77fcec30-83b7-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&emdi=5ba5c9ec-19b8-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&ceid=10283101)_**

Greg will represent all hard-working Americans in Congress whose needs have been ignored for far too long, but first he needs to hear from you. **_[Greg is counting on 1,000 supporters to take his official Priorities Survey before midnight. Peter,

House Democrats just passed a bill that would cap insulin copays at $35 per month.

With the costs of life-saving prescription drugs on the rise and families in Ohio and across the country paying the prices, this legislation could not have come soon enough. _Yet every House Republican from Ohio voted against this bill._

This is unacceptable, Peter. **Ohioans deserve leaders who will fight to address the issues working families face, including the rising costs of prescription drugs.**

[**Will you stand with Emilia in calling on our leaders to address prescription drug costs and ensure no one ever has to choose between their health and other basic necessities?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43952411/339447522/-1372824621?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NTEyNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjOTM4OTNiZi0xYWI4LWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=feOTaBQ8WqCGbWfUYsiCCwf0P31kjx5MSzZD15UI0So=&emci=1144824b-7eb7-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&emdi=c93893bf-1ab8-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&ceid=11703046)

subject: re: April 12 deadline
body:
| [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43952619/339448032/531951871?refcode=fl_em_fr_20220409AprilDeadline2_wm_90da_xx_hdr&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDQ1NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2MjFiMTcxYi0xY2I4LWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=b4km1MKYcpxXWL5tEoJsByMzHTE7aHCMDjWhFWmjr5o=)
---
Friend, in just three days, we face our next campaign finance filing deadline, and with primary election day getting pushed back, this deadline is a critical measuring stick for us to determine if we’re still on track. So, **[I have to ask if you can pitch in a few bucks to help us reach our goal.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43952620/339448035/531951871?refcode=fl_em_fr_20220409AprilDeadline2_wm_90da_xx_l1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDQ1NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2MjFiMTcxYi0xY2I4LWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=b4km1MKYcpxXWL5tEoJsByMzHTE7aHCMDjWhFWmjr5o=) **But before I do, let me take a moment to explain what’s at stake. I’m running for governor to lift people up and ensure no Marylander is left behind. Our beautiful state is made up of diverse communities with unique needs and challenges, and no matter your circumstances, each and every person deserves the opportunity to thrive. From being able to secure a good-paying job, to getting a high-quality public education, to having access to affordable healthcare, housing, clean air and water, and a 21st century transportation system — these are basic but crucial elements our next governor must fight for. And with Aruna by my side, I’m ready to fight for you. I’ve spent my life committed to serving others as a combat veteran in the U.S. Army and an executive at one of the nation's largest poverty fighting organizations. Now, I’m ready to deliver work, wages, and wealth for people all across this state as your Governor. Our movement for genuine, effective leadership in Annapolis is growing day by day, but this is one of the most competitive and closely-watched gubernatorial races in the nation. That’s why it’s crucial we come together and show that we have the strength to win this primary and November’s general election. **[Let’s show that our momentum isn’t slowing down and we’re on the path to victory. Please, if you’re able to, pitch in $10 or any amount to our campaign today to help us reach our goal before Tuesday’s filing deadline.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43952621/339448036/531951871?refcode=fl_em_fr_20220409AprilDeadline2_wm_90da_xx_l2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDQ1NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2MjFiMTcxYi0xY2I4LWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=b4km1MKYcpxXWL5tEoJsByMzHTE7aHCMDjWhFWmjr5o=)** | If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:

clean_body: | = Friend, in just three days, we face our next campaign finance filing deadline, and with primary election day getting pushed back, this deadline is a critical measuring stick for us to determine if we’re still on track. So, = But before I do, let me take a moment to explain what’s at stake. I’m running for governor to lift people up and ensure no Marylander is left behind. Our beautiful state is made up of diverse communities with unique needs and challenges, and no matter your circumstances, each and every person deserves the opportunity to thrive. From being able to secure a good-paying job, to getting a high-quality public education, to having access to affordable healthcare, housing, clean air and water, and a 21st century transportation system — these are basic but crucial elements our next governor must fight for. And with Aruna by my side, I’m ready to fight for you. I’ve spent my life committed to serving others as a combat veteran in the U.S. Army and an executive at one of the nation's largest poverty fighting organizations. Now, I’m ready to deliver work, wages, and wealth for people all across this state as your Governor. Our movement for genuine, effective leadership in Annapolis is growing day by day, but this is one of the most competitive and closely-watched gubernatorial races in the nation. That’s why it’s crucial we come together and show that we have the strength to win this primary and November’s general election. = | If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = = | = = | = = Thank you, from the bottom of my heart, for everything you’ve contributed to this movement. Elevate, Wes | Wes Moore is a combat veteran, a former small business owner, and the former CEO of a leading non-profit. Wes believes no matter where you start in life, you deserve an equal opportunity to succeed. He’s running to become Governor of Maryland and flip this state blue for the first time in 8 years. name: Team Bequette
subject: Biden’s opioid crisis
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY BEQUETTE FOR ARKANSAS
body:
Time to take a stand, Friend! Read more>>
| | | [](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/8fef6bc01533e51d9c32df07ccef91c9/38553/7d3c5685065e137d/617b60758543a00bc3d6b838967d376c/38553)
---
Friend, Did you know that fentanyl overdoses are the leading cause of death among 18-45-year-old Americans? Did you also know that over 10,000 pounds of fentanyl were smuggled across our southern border last year?
**
It couldn’t be clearer, Friend. America’s opioid epidemic is spiraling out of control, and Joe Biden’s open borders agenda is the root of the problem.** Mexican and South American drug cartels are making millions of dollars destroying the lives of our fellow Americans. And it’s time to crack down on their evil criminal empire. Will you sign our petition to secure our borders immediately and bring drug smuggling criminals to justice?
---
[**SIGN THE PETITION >>**](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/8fef6bc01533e51d9c32df07ccef91c9/38553/7d3c5685065e137d/c7751be42cd06b29c3d6b838967d376c/38553)
---
It’s time to put Biden and the radical Democrats in the D.C. Swamp on notice that we will NEVER BACK DOWN in the fight to end the southern border crisis and STOP the flow of illegal drugs into our country. Thank you!
\- Team Bequette

name: Tim Ryan
subject: got a moment?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Maggie for NH |
body:
I owe you an explanation ...
| | |

Hello,

name: Team Bass
subject: Voting deadlines you should know:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Karen Bass for Mayor 2022 (ID # 1441328)
body:
There are less than two months until the June 7 primary, and the clock is ticking down fast.

Happy Saturday —

There are less than _**two months**_ until the June 7 primary, and early voting starts May 9! The clock is ticking down fast, and it's time to make sure you're ready to vote.

This election for Los Angeles mayor is one of the most important ones that we've ever faced. The future of our city is on the line, and it's up to us to use our voices, do our civic duty, and embrace the values we want to see in L.A. at the ballot box.

**[Will you take a few moments to double and triple-check your voter registration? You can update your registration electronically or postmark it by May 23.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43957603/339457985/-667246286?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjQvMS85NDYxMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiNTA3NmQ0ZS0yMmI4LWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Ej7dyf88sWlk_Y1jBcEw0hzzkrksHBJj6xPBE11BcEM=&emci=a05147ea-5db7-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&emdi=b5076d4e-22b8-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&ceid=2429742)**

It doesn't matter where you live, you deserve a mayor who will show up and work for YOU. Karen has the vision and the plans to advocate for working people, address structural inequality, fight climate change, and tackle the housing inequality and systemic racism that plagues our city. She's ready to fight for a city that works for everyone and guarantees a pathway to progress for every Angeleno.

But this is a packed race, which means Karen is counting on every single vote. Don't miss this chance to make your voice heard.

**[Every single voice matters in this election. You can help Karen make history this year by voting in the upcoming primary. Check your voter registration here.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43957604/339457992/-667246286?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjQvMS85NDYxMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiNTA3NmQ0ZS0yMmI4LWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Ej7dyf88sWlk_Y1jBcEw0hzzkrksHBJj6xPBE11BcEM=&emci=a05147ea-5db7-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&emdi=b5076d4e-22b8-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&ceid=2429742)**

In solidarity,

Team Bass

Karen is building a grassroots campaign by and for the people of L.A. Thanks to L.A.'s matching funds program, individual donations from residents up to $214 may be matched 6-to-1 by the city, meaning your $5 contribution could become $35. Rush a donation today to support Karen's campaign:

name: Sarah Palin
subject: I announced my candidacy for the U.S House
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Sarah for Alaska
body:
America is at a tipping point. | Recently I announced my candidacy for the U.S. House seat representing Alaska. [](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/BC.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c612934%7c6864%7c6%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c1&wdmdk=ha8K8EGhYb%2b33FbDmVUe%2fg&sysid=1)
America is at a tipping point. | Recently I announced my candidacy for the U.S. House seat representing Alaska.
Friend,

**Recently I announced my candidacy for the U.S. House seat representing Alaska.**

I first entered politics 30 years ago, when I was elected to city council in Wasilla. I still live in Wasilla; my family is here; my son goes to school here. My heart will ALWAYS be in Alaska, even when I’m representing you in Washington, D.C.

America is at a tipping point. As I’ve watched the far left destroy our country, I knew I had to step up and join the fight. And now I’m asking you to do the exact same thing.

I can’t do this without your support.

That’s why for a short time, when you make your next contribution of ANY AMOUNT, you’ll automatically cement your name as an **Official Founding Supporter**.

**[CONTRIBUTE NOW TO BECOME AN OFFICIAL FOUNDING SUPPORTER. >>](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c60520%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=2f67W9YpHXgMSKyW8EISPQ&sysid=1)**

This is your chance to go down in history. YOU are the reason I’m running, and YOU will be the reason we win.

_**[Please contribute $35 by 11:59 PM TONIGHT to join the fight and mark your status as an Official Founding Supporter. >>](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c60521%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=wPdiESK306Bqw41KNu8Yuw&sysid=1)**_

[](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c60522%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=gsiVg7DHKMMvWx5ra%2b75Ng&sysid=1)

At this critical time in our nation’s history, we need leaders who will combat the left’s socialist, big-government, America-last agenda.

This country was built by heroes, and the radical left dishonors their legacies by opening our borders to illegal immigrants, mortgaging our children’s future, and selling out our nation’s interest to the highest bidder.

I’m in this race to win it and join the fight for freedom alongside other patriots willing to sacrifice all to save our country.

I just have one simple question for you:

**WILL YOU JOIN ME?**

**[Please contribute $35 by 11:59 PM TONIGHT to join the fight and mark your status as an Official Founding Supporter. >>](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c60521%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=wPdiESK306Bqw41KNu8Yuw&sysid=1)**

Thank you & God Bless America.

[](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c60522%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=gsiVg7DHKMMvWx5ra%2b75Ng&sysid=1)
Sarah Palin

**[CONTRIBUTE NOW >>](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c60523%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=%2fjPmTxmedgU1ZLlwjpN31A&sysid=1)**

---

_107 S West St. #826, Alexandria VA 22314_

Republican candidates in battleground states don't stand a chance against this flood of liberal cash unless committed patriots like you help them fight back. | | | | "RENEW NOW" Renewing your 2022 Membership is the best way to fight back and save our democracy. "Will you step up and renew your membership to stop the corrupt Democrats?" This is urgent. So urgent that we have activated an extended deadline until 11:59 PM TONIGHT. With $30 million going into the Democrats' pockets, we are desperate to catch up. | | | "RENEW NOW" The Corrupt Democrats will do anything to remain in power. That means relying on an unprecedented amount of dark money to fuel battleground races across the county. We cannot let the Radical Left's Super PACs control this country. "Polling in battleground races like these show that there will be a fight to the finish. Don't let the Left's deep pockets of corrupt money turn the tide in their favor." Thank you, House Republicans | | "Red Wave Image Link" Pelosi's raising MILLIONS and spending MILLIONS MORE attacking freedom-loving patriots across the nation. name: Hillsdale College via CIntel
subject: The greatest armed conflict in human history
body:
http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/vWSpxIqH4N

World War II is the greatest armed conflict in human history,
encompassing global fighting in unprecedented ways. But today,
only around one percent
http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/oWSpxIqH4N

Please see a special message from our
sponsor:

Dear
Fellow American,

World War
II is the greatest armed conflict in human history, encompassing
global fighting in unprecedented ways.

But
today, only around one percent of the 16 million brave Americans
who fought in the war are still alive.

As we
lose more and more of these courageous soldiers, we also lose the
living memories they carry. But we must preserve the lessons
learned from this world war.

That's
why Hillsdale College has produced an online course entitled "The
Second World Wars." And right now, you can receive your very own
DVD box set of this course when you make a tax-deductible gift of
$100 or more in support of our educational outreach efforts on
behalf of liberty.

This
limited-edition DVD set provides an analysis from military
historian Victor Davis Hanson of Allied and Axis investments and
strategies in the air, by water, and on land that led to the
Allies' victory.

This is
one of the most popular Hillsdale courses of all time. And there
are only a limited number of DVDs available. If you'd like to
secure a DVD set before they're all gone, you can have one
shipped directly to your home for any gift of $100 or more to
Hillsdale College.

Simply
use this secure link to reserve your copy of "The Second World
Wars" on DVD today:

https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/support-the-second-world-wars

Thank you
for preserving liberty for future generations of Americans
through education with Hillsdale College!

Best
regards,

Kyle
Murnen, '09
Director
of Online Learning
Hillsdale
College

name: =?utf-8?Q?Douglas=20Carswell?=
subject: Has Disney gone ‘woke’? Update from the Mississippi Center for Public Policy
body:
| | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/mspolicy/wokedisney?e=5703353baa)
---
| |
---
|
Hi Friend,

Why are American companies going ‘woke’?

Disney once embodied family entertainment. Today, according to some reports, Disney has adopted ‘gender neutral’ language at its theme parks. Peter Pan, apparently, comes with warnings that some might find it offensive.

Disney has taken sides in a dispute over a new law in Florida that limits schools’ ability to give instruction about sexual orientation. **Whatever you might think about the wisdom of Florida’s new law, it seems odd for a children’s entertainment company to actively side against parents’ rights.**

Of course, it is not just Disney.

Large swathes of corporate America now seem to have adopted radical ideas about gender and identity politics that were once the preserve of a few liberal colleges.
---
| [ ](https://mspolicy.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=60d4052c66b6745831ccdf7c8&id=c97e17794f&e=5703353baa)
---
Disney goes woke?
| I used to assume that when young adults left university and entered the world of work, they would leave behind daft ideas about ‘gender fluidity’ and identity. In fact, it seems that the opposite has happened.

**Corporate America today is starting to think the way liberal college campuses did a generation ago.** It is striking the extent to which the HR departments across much of corporate America have embraced the idea that employees be assessed in terms of their immutable characteristics, rather than simply their ability to do the job.

**Once an organization starts to hire and promote people on the basis of anything besides their competence to do the job, they risk becoming _in_ competent.** It might take a while for the effects of abandoning merit-based management to be felt within an organization, but I suspect a swathe of big businesses have created big problems for themselves in the future.

‘Woke’ corporations like to talk about ‘diversity’ in the board room. They seldom seem to mean board members actually having different outlooks and opinions. That might be about to change at Twitter, where the board just got genuinely more diverse with the arrival of Elon Musk.

Musk, perhaps America’s greatest living engineer, entrepreneur and immigrant, has a habit of seeing things differently. He seems to have developed a recent interest in social media companies and free speech**. It could be that Musk is about to take on ‘woke’ corporate America the way he took on the established motor car companies. **Let’s hope so.

Several ‘woke’ Twitter employees announced that they would be leaving Twitter with Musk’s arrival. Good. Mr Musk is off to a great start!

Last but not least, as the battle over income tax here in Mississippi has unfolded, I have kept you informed. This week, the Governor signed the actual bill that will reduce the income tax burden by about a third. Here is a picture from the signing ceremony.
---
|
---
|
It was a joy to read this article about our efforts in the [Wall Street Journal](https://mspolicy.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=60d4052c66b6745831ccdf7c8&id=23180bb467&e=5703353baa). As Mississippi moves the dial, our progress is getting noticed across America!

---
| |
---
Have a great weekend!

Douglas Carswell
President & CEO
---
| |
---

name: Josh Harder
subject: My thoughts on Sarah Palin running for Congress
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Harder for Congress
body:
| [](https://act.myngp.com/el/3Axf8L2b5gpPv3x0O_iFCOsDLhZ5_l_WEgO45hxEem0=/1SOYsg0II5fn_vI6o5wIxRC2rvtsYRSAvtALUq9hNLc=?refcode=E15009-20220408-SarahPalin-header-GOP-RegTemplate-NA-NA&amount=22) | Peter, I promise you're not having dejavu: Sarah Palin is running for Congress. Just when you think to yourself, _well it can 't get worse,_ here we are. The idea of Sarah Palin teaming up with Marjorie Taylor Greene, Lauren Boebert and Matt Gaetz really is something. Now I want you to imagine that crew having control of the House. Turning committee hearings into witch hunts. Blocking any progress President Biden tries to make. If we lose in this district, that's our new reality. So as idiotic as it may seem that Sarah Palin is running for Congress, it's a shot across the bow of what our future may hold. We won this seat from Republicans during the Blue Wave of 2018, and we have to keep it blue if we want to hold the House. [**If you are terrified about what a Sarah Palin & Marjorie Taylor Greene majority would look like, please chip in today to help me fight back.**](https://act.myngp.com/el/3Axf8L2b5gpPv3x0O_iFCOsDLhZ5_l_WEgO45hxEem0=/1SOYsg0II5fn_vI6o5wIxRC2rvtsYRSAvtALUq9hNLc=?refcode=E15009-20220408-SarahPalin-SL-GOP-RegTemplate-NA-NA&amount=22) _If you 've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | **[$9](https://act.myngp.com/el/3Axf8L2b5gpPv3x0O_iFCOsDLhZ5_l_WEgO45hxEem0=/1SOYsg0II5fn_vI6o5wIxRC2rvtsYRSAvtALUq9hNLc=?express_lane=true&refcode=E15009-20220408-SarahPalin-EL-GOP-RegTemplate-NA-NA&amount=9)**

body:
The mainstream media is finally admitting Hunter Biden's laptop was real. It's time to get to the bottom of what they were covering up. It’s Rep. Jim Jordan. We were just reviewing our records and noticed your status is still pending. Will you please confirm before midnight tonight?

| [](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=8c6459ab34c24fc3aaae25b45389667a&_e=QPxlzz4fCzhMdHzJ7NiK0lxKyN85eoigU2lzPhIO8zM3C4pq6bBRC0F2e573MIIqEac0fQhoMww49aSQxDziuCgalYkUrLNbi01fjLAleyG-WZRbSJyovmJPYPgNhI_X9GgHK8ilDCI-ITeNJekcopEbDDKvt8B5ixj4acHRXszmxApANpwRtPNYmnX4oQVlm6jqTmQoHGlDLIung2aHowPLkhoiKWTXbKPD2kLWVldDjYFvBIKEu8xbgPcwY_tUl15cOpDpUoHlcpJIn9po_xVfxa1zp5H1PQSXktSGMl7lSjXr3789suHigVI8f5RvyuPoLG_0i9Qln9Q-RLAUGxktuEf8jtWzDmOIHE5pdOQfXui2aRugV_7ojV-GMyd_2GWSSFm-y20OnmwM5GSc8LWPSRJv-5QW61VC24O4QL_YBAeJsKuU0wWGTLCkoq_j4kQS-rRPzaVRenVPZkTPeTegZhvrVz8YXOGxjh7SDsj00GVcv8ri5dntNB4peS6o)
---

Peter,

Why now? We’ve known for MONTHS that Hunter Biden’s laptop was real. The emails on the laptop were real.

**Why all of a sudden is there a focus on Hunter Biden and his laptop? Why more than a year after the story originally broke are mainstream media outlets reluctantly talking about what the New York Post reported to be true about the authenticity of Hunter Biden’s laptop back in October 2020?**

In the leadup to the 2020 election, the mainstream media and the Washington swamp kept important information about President Biden and his family out of the news.

**We need to get to the bottom of this!** To that end, I’ve got a couple of questions for you – namely, do you believe Democrats and the mainstream media colluded to cover up this information before the 2020 election, and now that the truth is out, would you as a patriotic American expect Congress to get to the bottom of the matter?

[**SHOULD THIS ISSUE BE INVESTIGATED?
LET ME KNOW -> **](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=8c6459ab34c24fc3aaae25b45389667a&_e=QPxlzz4fCzhMdHzJ7NiK0lxKyN85eoigU2lzPhIO8zM3C4pq6bBRC0F2e573MIIqEac0fQhoMww49aSQxDziuCgalYkUrLNbi01fjLAleyG-WZRbSJyovmJPYPgNhI_X9GgHK8ilDCI-ITeNJekcopEbDDKvt8B5ixj4acHRXszmxApANpwRtPNYmnX4oQVlm6jqTmQoHGlDLIung2aHowPLkhoiKWTXbKPD2kLWVldDjYFvBIKEu8xbgPcwY_tUl15cOpDpUoHlcpJIn9po_xVfxa1zp5H1PQSXktSGMl77KClgAUpgJORp0LzI_02NT1LewyYZ0HRncJKCqIKbNYtaG8kF2yjTKlR5szN1SBNOES8wJlTspLBbcW_p2Vm_LMqwpGKQUnjt9f2pz_CWmL80kqzUk8zhRlIeftxqjR5NH1sjA2jylxA9KkLiD7t3ZQCN8jsdajnle5CcSHHzFeY0WUyGHY-KrUPix6BNp20kVq4C-78mhGwYa72igMWp)

**In the weeks following the New York Post article, elite liberal “intelligence” officials told us Hunter Biden’s laptop was fake, Big Tech censored the story, and Big media refused to cover it at all.

How can we trust anyone**?
Oh and, don’t forget while everyday Americans struggle to make ends meet, the Bidens are planning to host a family member’s wedding at the White House.

**[Thanks for letting us know where you stand on Hunter Biden and his laptop](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=8c6459ab34c24fc3aaae25b45389667a&_e=QPxlzz4fCzhMdHzJ7NiK0lxKyN85eoigU2lzPhIO8zM3C4pq6bBRC0F2e573MIIqEac0fQhoMww49aSQxDziuCgalYkUrLNbi01fjLAleyG-WZRbSJyovmJPYPgNhI_X9GgHK8ilDCI-ITeNJekcopEbDDKvt8B5ixj4acHRXszmxApANpwRtPNYmnX4oQVlm6jqTmQoHGlDLIung2aHowPLkhoiKWTXbKPD2kLWVldDjYFvBIKEu8xbgPcwY_tUl15cOpDpUoHlcpJIn9po_xVfxa1zp5H1PQSXktSGMl6VXWMpA-uPdCOYBZl9D4RD-s1Px5dJi2ImU3pBnQLzbbl2TB6GgC8jl2QfFb2cDrXheVRyIDhyU18Lx-ITiBnViD1z7eogb5XLCrnPrUSztkSzwzYnE6Yl4OSw2TQKRr3rFNUt7UvAiOA_WuHW6GF4rQG2VeQVVqzfBVjdvEG9ZbiFKpqEfWIteQ2Y5DxUnnIT6qvIBsNUEJzU8KihzxwT)**.

Thank you so much,
Jim Jordan

name: Lopez, Marco
subject: what comes next
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Marco Lopez for Governor Authorized by Marco Lopez
body:
| | | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43959177/339462264/1742512187?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk604-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTQ2MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxMzQ5MWEyZi0yN2I4LWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=TLEQ055iGTej6EY4z_vYMOeLjcb54qKCyXJtj_dRcZo=)

_I know this message is on the longer side, but it ends with some big news I'm excited to share – so please read all the way to the end! –Marco_
Friend, when I launched this campaign a year ago, I knew we were in for a tough fight. Arizona's governorship has been red for 13 years, and I'm running not just as a Democrat, but as someone who could be the only immigrant governor in the country.
Arizona families have been facing long odds and that's why I'm running: to restore the promise of our state for all people. I know I have the experience, the background and the commitment to be the governor who makes that happen.
As we’ve built this movement for change, we’ve turned the tides in our favor. First, Nate Silver's FiveThirtyEight called this battleground race a toss-up. Then, POLITICO declared it the most competitive open-seat race in the nation.
**We've changed the odds. We're blazing our path. And now, I have some of the best news we've been able to share yet: Thanks to your support, as of last week, I am officially on the ballot and officially here to make the change we need.**
And our movement has never been more urgent. GOP Gov. Doug Ducey just signed a slew of bills directly attacking our most fundamental freedoms – from voting rights to reproductive rights. That might be what extremist Republicans in our state are for – but that's definitely not what Arizona is for. That's why I'm reaching out today.
We've only gotten this far because of grassroots supporters like you – and the only way we can keep up our momentum is by raising the resources we need to win. **So with the GOP all in to defeat me, I have to ask:[Can you chip in $5 or more right now to defeat GOP extremism, flip Arizona blue and build a state that works for all people?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43959183/339462307/1742512187?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk604-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTQ2MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxMzQ5MWEyZi0yN2I4LWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=TLEQ055iGTej6EY4z_vYMOeLjcb54qKCyXJtj_dRcZo=)**
Thank you so much, from the bottom of my heart. Let's go win this.

–Marco Lopez (D)
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43959184/339462316/1742512187?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk604-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTQ2MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxMzQ5MWEyZi0yN2I4LWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=TLEQ055iGTej6EY4z_vYMOeLjcb54qKCyXJtj_dRcZo=)

And our movement has never been more urgent. GOP Gov. Doug Ducey just signed a slew of bills directly attacking our most fundamental freedoms – from voting rights to reproductive rights. That might be what extremist Republicans in our state are for – but that's definitely not what Arizona is for. That's why I'm reaching out today. We've only gotten this far because of grassroots supporters like you – and the only way we can keep up our momentum is by raising the resources we need to win. So with the GOP all in to defeat me, I have to ask:= Thank you so much, from the bottom of my heart. Let's go win this. –Marco Lopez (D) = | This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Marco Lopez for Governor PO Box 34672 Phoenix, AZ 85067 United States | | © 2022 | Paid for by Marco Lopez for Governor Authorized by Marco Lopez

I'm running to continue to serve the people of New Jersey and America to the best of my ability. This is going to be a tough race. **House Republicans would love to take the majority. And they're very close. Only five seats stand between them and their goal.** One of those seats is NJ-03. _We_ are the people standing in their way. **[Will you stand with me and donate $3 today?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43942845/339406524/-821065315?refcode=2022-04-09-running&recurring=0&amount=3&amounts=10,30,50,100,200&refcode2=7b5c5c06-08b8-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84Nzk3MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3YjVjNWMwNi0wOGI4LWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=8Dowod1R643Hnhue0Anig1XZkBa8G6VsJ_RksQeZndw=)** Republicans and their allies are spending a fortune to take back this seat. **They are raising money all over the country to focus it here, on someone who tried to overturn the 2020 election or to back someone who could self-fund their campaign with money from their father's business.** Republicans are not about representing the people of New Jersey. body:
