**Do you remember this picture, team?**
[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/43959957/339465644/965412971?refcode=em22_220409_JHTC_fnd_gq_act___TNAPAC_ettx&utm_campaign=em22_220409_JHTC_fnd_gq_act___TNAPAC_ettx&utm_medium=email&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&zip=18326&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzkwMTkwIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjVhY2I3NmIwLTJhYjgtZWMxMS05OTdlLTI4MTg3OGI4M2Q4YSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=vFaMPimPRAO8xvL0YsRVIBqFSp5QZnADnfS8IWZw5Ec=)
We do. This is Senator Josh Hawley from Missouri, and this picture shows him saluting the violent mob of insurrectionists on the morning of January 6 as he went in for work.

Since taking office in 2019, Josh Hawley has been a menace to our democracy. Want to know how? Here are just a few reasons:
* He was the first Senator to announce his plan to object to the certification of the 2020 election results. **He's the Treason Caucus's _founding member._**
* He **refuses** to stop selling mugs portraying his infamous salute—classy, Josh, very classy.
* He **badgered** Judge Ketanji Brown Jackson during her confirmation hearings with lies based on QAnon conspiracies.
* **Putin-controlled Russian state television LOVES HIM!** His parroting of anti-NATO and pro-Russian talking points has been a big help to the Russian Federation's propaganda department.

clean_body: Do you remember this picture? | = Do you remember this picture, team? = We do. This is Senator Josh Hawley from Missouri, and this picture shows him saluting the violent mob of insurrectionists on the morning of January 6 as he went in for work. Since taking office in 2019, Josh Hawley has been a menace to our democracy. Want to know how? Here are just a few reasons: He was the first Senator to announce his plan to object to the certification of the 2020 election results. He's the Treason Caucus's founding member. He refuses to stop selling mugs portraying his infamous salute—classy, Josh, very classy. He badgered Judge Ketanji Brown Jackson during her confirmation hearings with lies based on QAnon conspiracies. Putin-controlled Russian state television LOVES HIM! His parroting of anti-NATO and pro-Russian talking points has been a big help to the Russian Federation's propaganda department. Senator Josh Hawley is a danger to our democracy. We can't afford for him and his friends in the Treason Caucus to remain in Congress any longer; that's why we're working to defeat the Treason Caucus and replace them with leaders who will defend our democracy. = Thanks, Team Never Again Marjorie Taylor Greene, Paul Gosar, Lauren Boebert, Madison Cawthorn, Mo Brooks, Andy Biggs. name: Tim Scott
subject: I know how much $5 is.
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TIM SCOTT FOR SENATE
body:
|
---
| | |
Peter,

I know that asking for money is hard. I know that asking for something as little as $5 can be even harder. To a lot of people $5 is a lot.

It was a lot for me growing up. I was raised in a single parent household in North Charleston, South Carolina. My mom worked 16-hour days to keep food on the table and a roof over our heads. I got my first job, changing oil at a gas station, when I was 13.

**I understand the value of a dollar.**

I don't take asking for money lightly. I know that every donation made is a sacrifice and I am forever grateful for each and every gift.

With that being said, it would mean so much to me if you could chip in $5 to make sure we beat our goal.

---
| | | [Chip in $5](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/60086407:6knK-boNo:m:1:3317145305:05EDB1A90E17B0D322CA83D39EE9EC6B:r "Chip in $5")
---

Thank you so much. I know that chipping in any amount can be hard - but if I meet my goal, I can continue this fight for folks like you.

-Tim
---
| |
* * *
---
| [](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/60086408:6knK-boNo:m:1:3317145305:05EDB1A90E17B0D322CA83D39EE9EC6B:r)
---
Peter, the difference between flipping just ONE more seat in the Senate means more than you might think.

Without taking the Senate back from the hands of the dangerous Democrat agenda, I'm worried that the American Dream is going to become nothing but a distant memory. The direction this country is going under the Democrats is _**frightening**_.

If Republicans have enough support to take back the Senate, we can secure hope, prosperity, and American values for generations to come.

**But we can only do that with YOUR support**. There is **no one else** we can rely on at this point. You've been such a valued member of our team since Day 1 - can you take this one crucial step with us?
---
| | | [DONATE ](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/60086408:6knK-boNo:m:1:3317145305:05EDB1A90E17B0D322CA83D39EE9EC6B:r "DONATE")
---
Thank you for saving America with me today, Peter.
---

---

This marks a critical turning point in my fight for re-election. Election Day, which seemed so distant, is now a rapidly approaching reality – and that means we need to fight harder than ever before to keep this campaign on track.

**That’s why I urgently need to raise $10,000 before MIDNIGHT tomorrow to kickstart this critical next phase of my campaign.[Will you chip in $5 or more right now to keep my momentum going and ensure I have the resources I need to defeat my GOP opponent in November?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43944179/339412191/379053316?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk433-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTg0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzNDJmY2JkOS0wOWI4LWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=5KS05cHPS_Jd80Pxf-SmiSZBGHWZliXdB2xzlouCs_0=)**

As a young girl growing up in Brooklyn, I never could’ve imagined that my name would be on the ballot for attorney general not once but _twice_. At the time, people who looked like me and came from working families like my own didn’t win statewide elections.

Peter, I’m so grateful for fearless fighters like you who helped me make history in 2018 by becoming the first Black woman ever to be elected to a statewide office in New York. Being chosen by the people to fight for, serve, and protect New Yorkers is not a responsibility I take lightly. **But I need to know: Can I count on your support again?**

**[Peter, I can't defeat my GOP opponent and continue fighting for the voiceless and vulnerable without you by my side. Will you rush $5, $25, or more before MIDNIGHT tomorrow to help me meet my critical fundraising goal and launch the next phase of my campaign for re-election?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43944185/339412197/379053316?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk433-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTg0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzNDJmY2JkOS0wOWI4LWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=5KS05cHPS_Jd80Pxf-SmiSZBGHWZliXdB2xzlouCs_0=)**
| | [Contribute](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43944186/339412198/379053316?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk433-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTg0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzNDJmY2JkOS0wOWI4LWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=5KS05cHPS_Jd80Pxf-SmiSZBGHWZliXdB2xzlouCs_0=)
---
I can't tell you how much it means to me to have you on my team. Thank you.

Letitia James

name: Fetterman for PA
subject: DEADLINE APPROACHING: Vote by Mail
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fetterman for PA
body:
You can apply for a Mail-In Ballot right now.
#
Hi, Derek!
We all know there’s a lot at stake in 2022. Now more than ever, it’s critical that we elect John Fetterman to the U.S. Senate + save our Democratic majority.
**With the Pennsylvania Democratic primary on Tuesday, May 17 (less than five weeks away) we have two *very* important reminders for Democrats in Cresco:**
**URGENT: Apply for a Mail-In Ballot**
If you are a registered voter in Pennsylvania, **you can apply for a Mail-In Ballot RIGHT NOW.** Voting by Mail is the quickest way to make your voice heard in this election, and we highly encourage you to apply for a Mail-In Ballot ASAP.
**Tuesday, May 10, 2022 is the deadline to apply for an Absentee or Mail-In Ballot.** Ballots are expected to drop later this month.
**[Apply for a Mail-In Ballot](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/6753?t=1&akid=5314%2E434096%2EOZN-DU)**
**DEADLINE SOON: Voter Registration**
Unsure of your voter registration, or simply need to register to vote in the first place? You can confirm your voter information below (hey, it never hurts to check)!
In order to vote for John Fetterman in the May 17 Democratic primary, **you MUST be registered to vote as a Democrat by May 2, 2022.**
**[Check Voter Registration Status](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/47038?t=2&akid=5314%2E434096%2EOZN-DU)**
Every County, Every Vote. There’s just no other way to win PA.
Thanks,
Team Fetterman HQ 💛

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-emails?refcode=em20220409-5314-footer&t=3&refcode2=5314_434096_OZN-DU&akid=5314%2E434096%2EOZN-DU)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/JohnFettermanPA/) | [](https://twitter.com/johnfetterman) | [](https://www.instagram.com/johnfetterman/)
Email us: info@johnfetterman.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Fetterman for PA, PO Box 6061, Pittsburgh PA 15211.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.johnfetterman.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.johnfetterman.com/sign/personal_info/?t=4&akid=5314%2E434096%2EOZN-DU)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.johnfetterman.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=5&akid=5314%2E434096%2EOZN-DU)

Paid for by Fetterman for PA.

name: Cheri Beasley
subject: $25 before Trump takes the stage with our opponent...
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tim Ryan for Ohio
body:
Folks —

Donald Trump is coming to North Carolina today to hold a rally for Ted
Budd — his hand-picked candidate in this Senate race.

That’s not all. They just announced that Madison Cawthorn will be joining
them on stage as well.

Ted’s campaign is flailing. Trump, Ted Budd’s super PAC, and multiple GOP
insiders have all said as much to reporters. So this is a clear effort to
prop up his campaign, fire up the far-right base, and pretend that their
brand of divisive politics is what the people of North Carolina want.

So we have to be prepared for anything. Trump may be coming to North
Carolina and may even attack our campaign. Ted Budd may have his super
PACs spending $14 million dollars to buy this seat.

The good news is we have each other, and if we are in this together, we
will be ready for anything they throw our way.

[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/10455?t=1008&amount=25&akid=3209%2E3611125%2EfgbKRa ]Can you please make a $25 donation before Donald Trump gets here for
his rally with Ted Budd and Madison Cawthorn? Every dollar will help us
flip this seat and expand the Senate majority for Democrats.

I believe that we can win by uniting the people and focusing on the real

Thank you for your support,

Cheri Beasley

name: Shahid Buttar
subject: Congress is years late, and trillions short
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Shahid Buttar for Congress Committee, 1390 Market St
body:
This week, Congress finally held a hearing on congressional insider trading. Absent from the discussion—and pending reform proposals—are any provisions for remedies, while loopholes abound. | | |
---
[](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953yRkW_Sw2xr1MvIXEt6jooTbMnsVYqhUO8Xwt4ORz78ORT8Pt3SALA3pMGVDypeKbyy2kgsjsCmnmy8k7FgsqB6wuCJ9K2SYervuUQSBWz0O2PIyXG06ZztSzQEqU6MVwoHrPlkEy8XRwY7T81qHA5lMXill3AgWXh8hDb6rZW_dRoz3jilRpEjYnAXvGo7j6U3OUiNsqibukEZaLr_eLDLkurk9zIIF8LAQ6qtjzIPpHQZm-BCnco1t5dtvPT6iXX5i875BbKiT4Z7pzFKl7fnMuhXh1oShR_J2okOgUjJGYXnjLrOn_JE0trsHfqAJuH9YG-wCZRjlBQQTND7PoO-D4b6Dh6DddGAgRVREg23FywAu1KeVJ1C8lU5FLBGxLtK8v1EvSxwIrtkbP5hwhcoWIjbfVyYpO5b4eB-wTztQw/3l2/3judWyQmQkSfD63n3TLJ_w/h0/g-GmVPufEALzZsJ1O2wp5axwOaIq-97_ecFe3XQmuYA)
| | Dear Peter, **** This past Thursday, the House Committee on Administration held a hearing on congressional insider trading. It was an important milestone in the ongoing battle for ethics in Washington. But that milestone comes decades late, and far more than just a dollar short. clean_body: This week, Congress finally held a hearing on congressional insider trading. Absent from the discussion—and pending reform proposals—are any provisions for remedies, while loopholes abound. | | | | | Dear Peter, **** This past Thursday, the House Committee on Administration held a hearing on congressional insider trading. It was an important milestone in the ongoing battle for ethics in Washington. But that milestone comes decades late, and far more than just a dollar short. The several reform proposals discussed at the hearing all remain charitable to the corporate corruption that insider trading has long invited—and continues to entrench. On Wednesday, we posted a short video explaining the issue. In it, I explain two sets of questions evading the discussion in Congress, and offer a few suggestions for people who share our concerns. The video has been viewed over 50,000 times across platforms including , , , and . We encourage you to share it and add your comments or questions! We’re grateful to all of our supporters—including you—for forcing a controversy that Washington would rather avoid. I raise these questions about congressional ethics 20 years after working on Shays v. FEC , one of the last successful legal appeals defending campaign finance reform from the corporate counter-attack that ultimately led to the notorious Citizens United decision. That theme of challenging money in politics has echoed across my career. Today, we're working together to challenge an oligarch reportedly worth $200 million. As an immigrant with neither property nor a family legacy, I recognize that our challenge to the establishment relies on the support of others. Our campaign to challenge the corrupt establishment in Washington has drawn support from concerned Americans in every state in the country. Whether or not I'll have the chance to represent your district, I'm looking forward to representing your values until November—and, with your support, beyond that, in Congress. Thanks for standing with us! Your voice, Shahid | ---|---|--- | | | Paid for by Shahid Buttar for Congress Committee, 1390 Market St., Suite 200, San Francisco, CA 94102 | | Sent via . | | Friend - It’s here. It’s taken three and a half years for Georgians to have their day in court, and now Fair Fight Action is going to trial on Monday, April 11, 2022. It’s been over a decade since a Section 2 claim under the Voting Rights Act has gone to a full trial on the merits in the Northern District of Georgia, and Fair Fight Action is proud to have the opportunity to fight for Georgia voters. Your early support made this historic moment possible. The fact that we have arrived at this moment is a win that we can be proud of. Even before today, our case has already yielded significant results, as 22,000 Georgians have been restored to the voting rolls as a result of our litigation to date. _Overview of _Fair Fight Action v. Raffensperger__ Fair Fight Action's federal lawsuit against Georgia’s Secretary of State and State Election Board challenges several unconstitutional voter suppression practices. During the course of the trial, the State of Georgia will have to defend its suppressive voting practices, while Fair Fight Action will seek remedies to put an end to those practices. _Updates from Atlanta_ Starting next week, you will receive weekly updates from our team on the status of the case, key takeaways, media coverage, and actionable items from our trial team in Atlanta. Please be in touch with us if you have any questions. Buckle up, team. We’re about to cross a historic threshold and are proud to have you with us in this fight. Yours in the Fight, The Fair Fight Action Team |

It’s been over a decade since a Section 2 claim under the Voting Rights Act has gone to a full trial on the merits in the Northern District of Georgia, and Fair Fight Action is proud to have the opportunity to fight for Georgia voters. Your early support made this historic moment possible. The fact that we have arrived at this moment is a win that we can be proud of. Even before today, our case has already yielded significant results, as 22,000 Georgians have been restored to the voting rolls as a result of our litigation to date. Overview of Fair Fight Action v. Raffensperger Fair Fight Action's federal lawsuit against Georgia’s Secretary of State and State Election Board challenges several unconstitutional voter suppression practices. During the course of the trial, the State of Georgia will have to defend its suppressive voting practices, while Fair Fight Action will seek remedies to put an end to those practices. Updates from Atlanta_ Starting next week, you will receive weekly updates from our team on the status of the case, key takeaways, media coverage, and actionable items from our trial team in Atlanta. Please be in touch with us if you have any questions. Buckle up, team. We’re about to cross a historic threshold and are proud to have you with us in this fight. Yours in the Fight, The Fair Fight Action Team | ---|---|--- | 1270 Caroline Street Suite D120-430 Atlanta, GA 30307 ©2021 Fair Fight Action - All rights reserved. Contributions to Fair Fight Action are not tax-deductible. | | Paid for by Fair Fight Action

Hello,
I am old enough to recall when Donald Trump was first impeached for holding military aid to Ukrainian President Zelensky hostage: ‘You either begin an investigation into Joe Biden or you won’t get the Javelin missiles Congress authorized.’
I’m also old enough to remember when my opponent, Senator Chuck Grassley, said that Trump’s behavior was perfectly fine – and voted against his removal from office.
Thankfully, we now have a President who understands the real threat Russia poses, and American Javelin missiles are currently helping Ukrainians defend themselves against the Russian tanks pouring across their border.
**We need more leaders in the Senate who will defend democracy and put the interests of America and our allies first – not partisan political gain and the whims of a deranged demagogue. Chuck Grassley has proven that’s not him.**
If I defeat Chuck Grassley and turn Iowa blue this November, I will be the most senior military person ever-elected to the United States Senate. But grassroots contributions keep campaigns going, and I need your help today if we’re going to win.
**We’ve set a goal of raising another $25,000 before midnight tonight so that we can fight back against all of McConnell’s Super PAC attacks. Right now, we’re still falling dangerously short, but there’s still time to make up the gap if grassroots donors like you chip in now:**
[**Please, may I count on you to give $5 or more right now – whatever you can afford before our fundraising deadline at midnight tonight – to help me defeat Chuck Grassley, turn Iowa blue, and protect our Democratic majority in the Senate? **](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43960393/339467794/-42398318?refcode=em20220409mid-nd&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C35%2C50%2C100%2C250&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDI4MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1Y2EwNDllMS0yZWI4LWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ZMb8lpllJtuRKpwOT3tjf7jyA1OJR5ut3BC49eIKBOM=)

clean_body: Hello, I am old enough to recall when Donald Trump was first impeached for holding military aid to Ukrainian President Zelensky hostage: ‘You either begin an investigation into Joe Biden or you won’t get the Javelin missiles Congress authorized.’ I’m also old enough to remember when my opponent, Senator Chuck Grassley, said that Trump’s behavior was perfectly fine – and voted against his removal from office. Thankfully, we now have a President who understands the real threat Russia poses, and American Javelin missiles are currently helping Ukrainians defend themselves against the Russian tanks pouring across their border. We need more leaders in the Senate who will defend democracy and put the interests of America and our allies first – not partisan political gain and the whims of a deranged demagogue. Chuck Grassley has proven that’s not him. If I defeat Chuck Grassley and turn Iowa blue this November, I will be the most senior military person ever-elected to the United States Senate. But grassroots contributions keep campaigns going, and I need your help today if we’re going to win. We’ve set a goal of raising another $25,000 before midnight tonight so that we can fight back against all of McConnell’s Super PAC attacks. Right now, we’re still falling dangerously short, but there’s still time to make up the gap if grassroots donors like you chip in now: = If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = | = | | = | = | | = | = I am so grateful to have people like you on the team. Together, we will defeat Chuck Grassley this November. It will be a defeat felt at the highest level of the GOP. Thank you, Mike Franken, VADM, U.S. Navy (ret.) Paid for by Michael Franken for Iowa, Inc Michael Franken for Iowa, Inc PO Box 13401 Des Moines, IA 50310 United States

name: Paul Schimpf
subject: Schimpf&Schofield From the Trail 04/09/22
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Citizens for Schimpf · P
body:
| [](http://www.schimpf4illinois.com/?e=1469e37fec1f8638fc00965d010776f6&utm_source=schimpf4illinois&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=4_9_from_the_trail&n=1)
---
Friend, The big news from the campaign trail this week was the unveiling of our third TV commercial. This is our first TV commercial where Carolyn and I appear together. If you haven't watched this commercial, click on the picture below to watch it.
[](https://www.schimpf4illinois.com/r?u=jalJvum2JQxpPvfjGmN5k9SFmzRuTVSNI9nM4JyQyL8&e=1469e37fec1f8638fc00965d010776f6&utm_source=schimpf4illinois&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=4_9_from_the_trail&n=2) Our TV commercials have moved the needle--our numbers are going up. That's not surprising. Our commercials reflect our solution-based, non-toxic message that Illinoisans hunger for. But TV advertising costs are significant. It costs $25K for two weeks of statewide cable TV. If we are going to stay on the air, we need YOUR help TODAY. You can keep this advertisement on the air by clicking [HERE](https://www.schimpf4illinois.com/donate?e=1469e37fec1f8638fc00965d010776f6&utm_source=schimpf4illinois&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=4_9_from_the_trail&n=3).
* * *
**Volunteer of the Week** Our volunteer to highlight this week is Monroe County Commissioner Vicki Koerber. Vicki is part of the Republican leadership team that makes Monroe County a great place to live. She has endorsed us for Governor/Lt Governor and set up a women's lunch event for Carolyn in Monroe County. Thank you, Vicki, for your friendship and support!
****[If you'd like to volunteer on our campaign, click here.](https://www.schimpf4illinois.com/volunteer?e=1469e37fec1f8638fc00965d010776f6&utm_source=schimpf4illinois&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=4_9_from_the_trail&n=4)
* * *
**Upcoming Events** We will be having a Meet & Greet in DeKalb County on Monday, April 11th. The venue is Hobnobbers in Sycamore. It starts at 6:30PM. This a FREE event. You can help us raise the $$ to spread our message about the New Start for Illinois proposal by attending a fundraiser in Southern Illinois. First, on April 22nd, we will be having our Spring Reception in Belleville. Tickets are $75 per person. You can find out more and purchase tickets by clicking [HERE](https://www.schimpf4illinois.com/belleville_spring_fling_reception?e=1469e37fec1f8638fc00965d010776f6&utm_source=schimpf4illinois&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=4_9_from_the_trail&n=5).
Then, on May 7th, we will be having a BBQ in Nashville. Tickets for the Nashville BBQ are $50. You can get more info and purchase tickets by clicking [HERE](https://www.schimpf4illinois.com/nashville_bbq?e=1469e37fec1f8638fc00965d010776f6&utm_source=schimpf4illinois&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=4_9_from_the_trail&n=6).
* * *
**Issue Spotlight: No Tax on Tax
** Did you know that the reason gas is so expensive in Illinois is that you are being taxed on the tax you already pay? Illinois charges sales tax--not only on motor fuel, but also on the federal, state, and local motor fuel taxes. So when we buy gas in Illinois we are are paying tax on a tax. Paying tax on tax is obscene! There is no greater example of predatory government. That's why our "New Start for Illinois" proposes a constitutional amendment to prohibit the practice of charging tax on tax. It's not a difficult concept. Ending predatory government starts with ending predatory practices. Semper Fidelis, Paul
Paid for by Citizens for Schimpf · P.O. Box 16, Waterloo, IL, 62298\. A copy of our report, filed with the State Board of Elections, Springfield, IL, will be available for download or purchase from them. We do not pay for email addresses. We have your email address either because you signed up for our list at an event, you entered your email address online, or you gave your email address to us or one of our friends.
This email was sent to [dpwillis67@gmail.com](dpwillis67@gmail.com). To stop receiving emails, [click here](https://www.schimpf4illinois.com/unsubscribe?e=1469e37fec1f8638fc00965d010776f6&utm_source=schimpf4illinois&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=4_9_from_the_trail&n=7).
You can also keep up with Paul Schimpf on [Twitter](https://www.schimpf4illinois.com/r?u=7Sn_jlQ3J2wHxMyMtp8UNEGmWwYfQ_yWb41Zx1QyVyU&e=1469e37fec1f8638fc00965d010776f6&utm_source=schimpf4illinois&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=4_9_from_the_trail&n=8) or [Facebook](https://www.schimpf4illinois.com/r?u=27Ax0UmWOX2J8J_QwK9Z6g5cWifaQHs4q1ylFw89qVcMpLCIQGbbcgOLvTMfF-ic&e=1469e37fec1f8638fc00965d010776f6&utm_source=schimpf4illinois&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=4_9_from_the_trail&n=9).
Created with [NationBuilder](https://www.schimpf4illinois.com/r?u=SWqLExi-4iBlEOa5qgO58jA2d62deOsOLwOgchKDecY&e=1469e37fec1f8638fc00965d010776f6&utm_source=schimpf4illinois&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=4_9_from_the_trail&n=10), software for leaders.

subject: did you see 👀 me BLISTER Katie Britt… right to her face???

body:
My opponent, Katie Britt, and her Swamp buddies are running 30-second soundbites and ads baked in blatant lies!
[View this message in your browser](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zd1cb9js9ofo70v6n48gtvjlpfuvu5cbrcfap83o_rp22sh2s8i66ob4slh6eoj2c9h238h5e8he485he5o75pt7kkpq2sjlemo72sjk6ipr7d9neppqcdtlmui34thgmipnadt4sbp65s3k68rb6oj3miqeep9lmjie0pdgejgn0pthcjhr5cj5ecr39c9h6hgmcclkmtjrfkjge9h6cs5icpoe9cr3cup32pjhm2pmadtim9j39o5icpge1db3c3gbac9hmkorash5u)
| | | [](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zls6ebbauhk1ntqpp8j1h3p6rtgqtcmcvmrh9v0o_rp22sh2s8i66ob4slh6eoj2c9h2bs)
---
Friend – My opponent, Katie Britt, and her Swamp buddies are running 30-second soundbites and ads baked in blatant lies! The people running these ads don’t care about the truth. All they do is package their lies so they look pretty and sharp. _ _ **_I’ve had enough – and that’s why I called out Katie Britt to her face!_** **[HOLD KATIE BRITT ACCOUNTABLE >>> ](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z50jfqdt1pp7skjpmul9o79sdaoluea51fda6lrg_rp22sh2s8i66ob4slh6eoj2c9h2bs)** **_ _**_Because a lie is still a lie, no matter how you dress it up._
---
[](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zi1bpef527okt74sb0kraa3t1s5dauthc5v4ggi0_rp22sh2s8i66ob4slh6eoj2c9h2bs)
---
[**JOIN BROOKS IN HIS FIGHT >>**](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zb2n3qqlm2f6cfa974g2mln1gtukgap58nqs0hso_rp22sh2s8i66ob4slh6eoj2c9h2bs)
---
Katie Britt and Mike Durant can continue running their attack ads against me, but I have something they don’t: **_a true conservative track record._** Not to mention I’m the ONLY person in Alabama history that has been elected as a Republican – _14 times. _ And you know what that proves? **_That I have a track record, and the people I represent like the job that I do for them._**
---
[**JOIN PROVEN CONSERVATIVE MO BROOKS >>**](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zk802v0snbk8oi71nhoo2grv2icbhvkur9uiu82o_rp22sh2s8i66ob4slh6eoj2c9h2bs)
---
Friend, our nation is a mess right now and a lot of that can be attributed to the Biden administration. But our struggle goes much deeper than that.
The Socialist Democrats attack our way of life and “conservative” political candidates often make grandiose promises that they fail to keep.
---
[](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zkmvl4dmj2d92isd695s6lmthjecupb4qn9qsl48_rp22sh2s8i66ob4slh6eoj2c9h2bs)
---
**But what sets me apart from the other candidates in this race is my record.** When I promise to fight tax increases, stand for the unborn, and against gun control, you know I’m going to do it _**because it’s what I’ve always done.**_
---
[**SEND CONSERVATIVE MO BROOKS TO THE SENATE **](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z22heiekvef36vt5auq3k9317g1og362j1ekvmt0_rp22sh2s8i66ob4slh6eoj2c9h2bs)
---
**_My record speaks for itself, Friend._**
Third-party organizations and think tanks have consistently ranked me in the top 5, 10, 15% of all congressmen... _year after year!_
* A+ national pro-life scorecard rating from Susan B. Anthony List
* 100% rating from the National Right to Life
* A+ rating from NumbersUSA, an immigration watchdog group
* 98% rating from Heritage Action for America
* 93% rating from FreedomWorks
* 93% rating from the NRA
* 91% lifetime rating from the American Conservative Union
* 86% rating from Club for Growth
* U.S. Chamber of Commerce Spirit of Enterprise Award
* 2018 American Trade Hero Award from Coalition for a Prosperous America

And I’ve received endorsements from well-respected conservative hard-hitters:
* Sen. Ted Cruz
* Sen. Rand Paul
* Congressman Jim Jordan
* House Freedom Caucus Chairman Scott Perry

[**JOIN THEM: SUPPORT MO BROOKS >>**](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zk6oe2tbci7kcoieefgi7a5srvvlcakv129tk7o8_rp22sh2s8i66ob4slh6eoj2c9h2bs)
---
I’ve fought for the America First agenda in the House, where I represent Alabama’s 5th Congressional District. But I know there’s more work to be done... this time in the Senate. **_And I know I’m the man for the job._**
---
[](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z1vu0igpf99jidcmrcr98e57vul76krjmhnd0k58_rp22sh2s8i66ob4slh6eoj2c9h2bs)
---
Friend, I’ve been fighting for the principles that made this country great my entire career: first as a prosecutor, then as a member of the Alabama House, then in the private practice of law for 20 years, then as District Attorney and County Commissioner –– all before coming to Washington! You see, my parents, Jack and Betty Brooks, instilled in me the importance of standing up for principles that matter. I’ve taken what I learned from my parents growing up in Huntsville and brought that same mentality to Washington.
---
[**FIGHT ALONGSIDE MO >>**](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z5ale2a3veuonnh3tq05uboadolt1app137t58o8_rp22sh2s8i66ob4slh6eoj2c9h2bs)
---
**After standing up to Nancy Pelosi in the House, I’m ready to stand up to Chuck Schumer in the Senate.** I won’t back down from a challenge. In the Senate, you can count on me to stand up to the freedom-hating policies of the Socialist Democrats. [**I will ALWAYS fight to stop socialist damage. But I can’t do this alone. I need patriots and warriors********_like YOU_**](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zviajdf262hupv10renl2msrij9899l0cbjh760o_rp22sh2s8i66ob4slh6eoj2c9h2bs)**[to stand with me for America First policies.](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zr5ij9cmjs9kh9hq18u0prkqm8rp61p8f4imcffo_rp22sh2s8i66ob4slh6eoj2c9h2bs) ** [**Can I count on your support?**](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zoq8hvp67vo4tj64q5t2n423gddqhiubb7ddh7eg_rp22sh2s8i66ob4slh6eoj2c9h2bs)
---

---
[**DONATE $75 >>**](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zk3374dslgsabhmvq5otuvmhgf84n3400jhnnjrg_rp22sh2s8i66ob4slh6eoj2c9h2bs)
---

[**DONATE ANY AMOUNT >>**](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zt7ce9s4hei9si2mu44j6c3tm9skju1u83ram7lg_rp22sh2s8i66ob4slh6eoj2c9h2bs)

I appreciate your support,

In the Senate, you can count on me to stand up to the freedom-hating policies of the Socialist Democrats. name: Jocelyn Benson
subject: What I'm going to say this afternoon
disclaimer_text:
Paid for by
Jocelyn Benson for Secretary of State
body:
Friend,

This afternoon I’m going before delegates to the Michigan Democratic Party’s spring convention to ask for their official endorsement to run for a second term as Michigan Secretary of State.

Let me share a few highlights of what I’m going to share with them this afternoon because I want you to know, from me, why I’m seeking re-election.

Four years ago I addressed the Democratic Party delegates at the convention alongside my mentor, the late U.S. Senator Carl Levin, and we looked ahead to what we hoped would be, and indeed became, a new day for democracy in Michigan.

And four years ago I was elected with a mandate to make government – and our democracy - work better for everyone.

And we did just that. https://secure.actblue.com/donate/benson-landing1?refcode=040922

I’m proud that now - at our Secretary of State offices all across the state - everyone gets in and out in an average of 20 minutes.
And we have doubled the number of our services you can do from home or while grocery shopping. Now 60% of all transactions are done without visiting an office at all - up from just 28% in 2018.

We have shown that responsive, effective government is possible and we’ve got even more plans ahead to continue modernizing how we serve our citizens.

In addition to improving how we serve our residents, my administration began work to expand democracy, implementing new voting rights that you and voters all across Michigan made possible, as soon as I was sworn into office.

We worked with clerks to enable automatic and Election Day registration to ensure that every eligible citizen could register and vote. We followed the law and worked to educate voters about their new rights to vote absentee, sending absentee ballot request forms to every registered voter in the state, and creating an online application to request your absentee ballot on our website.

All that work really did bring a new day for democracy in November 2020, when we administered the safest, most secure, highest turnout election in Michigan history. Not only did 5.5 million citizens -Democrats, Republicans and Independents - vote in November 2020, 3.3 million voted by absentee ballot and 30,000 registered and voted on Election Day – many of them young voters.

You made this possible by working to strengthen our democracy in 2018. Now I’m asking you to once again stand with me in 2022 by committing to my re-election campaign. https://secure.actblue.com/donate/benson-landing1?refcode=040922

Instead of celebrating that success and talking about how to replicate it in the future, we are fighting an escalating, nationally-coordinated attack on the future of our American democracy in which Michigan is ground zero.

Because they saw what happened – what we accomplished – in 2020. That’s why those who want to diminish democracy in our country are working to replace people of integrity with people who tried to interfere with the sanctity of our elections in 2020 and block the voice of the people from being heard.

We aren’t going to let them undo our democracy. Not in Michigan, not now, not ever. That’s why I need your help. https://secure.actblue.com/donate/benson-landing1?refcode=040922

That’s what I’m going to ask MDP delegates tomorrow, team. That’s also why I’m asking you to roll up your sleeves and prepare to work harder than you worked in 2018, harder than you worked in 2020, harder than you worked ever before, to ensure that every single voter in this state knows that democracy – their democracy – is on the ballot this fall.

If you and I and people of integrity across the state come together to speak the truth, stand up for Michigan elections, and compel officials to follow the facts and obey our laws, democracy will prevail. Because democracy prevails when we, the people, work together to ensure that it does. I’ve committed to do everything I can both for the people of Michigan and for our democracy. Can I count on you to do the same?
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/benson-landing1?refcode=040922

Thank you for your support. We can’t win this without you.

Onward,
Jocelyn
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com.
To unsubscribe, please click here: unsubscribe: https://email.ngpvan.com/unsubscribeUnique/61cb756a-0eb8-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a/a2765fff-2fb8-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzA4NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhMjc2NWZmZi0yZmI4LWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=QMvc19qsfFT6ySDhFnXdAbwlh5tJoc3dh9cLAeNMK0w=&id=112210963
Paid for by

PO Box 21368
Detroit, MI 48221

name: Mark Kelly
subject: I have about 15 minutes
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY VOTEVETS, VOTEVETS
body:
I have about 15 minutes of free time in my schedule today. I know that doesn’t sound like an extraordinary amount of time
#
[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/vv-pac-mek-split?refcode=em220409-1-15&t=1&refcode2=5226_3013755_VfZ_h2&akid=5226%2E3013755%2EVfZ_h2)

Derek —
I have about 15 minutes of free time in my schedule today. I know that doesn’t sound like a lot of time, but with a schedule like mine I can assure you it’s a gift.
And while I know our campaign sends a lot of emails your way, I want to take a few of those minutes to tell you about my decision to run for Senate in the first place, and why your support is so important in our success.
The truth is, when Gabby and I first started talking about running, we weren’t sure what to expect. We knew that Arizona needed new leadership in the Senate — someone who would always put the people of our state first, who was willing to work across the aisle to deliver real results, and who would prioritize building bridges between parties — not burning them down.
We also knew we had some friends who would help us out. But when you’re talking about such a big campaign, we’d need support from a lot of people we hadn’t met yet as well. Especially since I was making the decision to reject corporate PAC money.
You know the rest... we won in 2020 in large part because we ran the biggest grassroots campaign Arizona has ever seen.
But now we have a new mission: Re-election.
And right now, the polls are really tight. If we’re going to win again, it’s going to take a similar level of support from people like you.
So please:
[**Can you please split a $3 contribution between my re-election campaign for U.S. Senate in Arizona and VoteVets? The amount you give isn’t as important as the number of donations we receive. Because it all adds up when we’re all chipping in.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/vv-pac-mek-split?refcode=em220409-1-15&t=2&refcode2=5226_3013755_VfZ_h2&akid=5226%2E3013755%2EVfZ_h2)

Peter, we wanted to make sure you didn't miss out on this important news.
**RON JOHNSON 'S RACE IS SLATED #3 MOST LIKELY TO FLIP**
While Ron's Q1 deadline has passed, the point here still stands, Wisconsin is a critical win for retaking the Senate. It's going to be majorly important that we put up strong fundraising numbers.

**_[Can Ron count on you, Peter?](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/60086525:Jiu2dboNL:m:1:3317145305:927A996430355302F0D263DD6388631E:r "johnson1")_**

Peter, Ron Johnson here. I need to talk to you for a moment.

I'm in a fight here in Wisconsin. This will be the hardest race I have ever faced. Democrats know this will be the race that decides who controls the Senate and they're determined to flip it blue. Even CNN just labeled me the "most vulnerable GOP incumbent this year."

**_[Peter, now is the time. My race ranks NUMBER 3 in Senate Seats most likely to flip. Can I count on your support in my most critical hour?](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/60086525:Jiu2dboNL:m:1:3317145305:927A996430355302F0D263DD6388631E:r "johnson4")

America is in peril. President Reagan warned that freedom is fragile, always one generation away from extinction. As I have told crowds since my first Tea Party speeches: this is a fight for freedom. This is not someone else's fight, this is our fight, and it's a fight we absolutely must win.

body:
David Burg Endorses Mike Blasi | | | [View this email in your browser](https://us20.campaign-archive.com/?e=5c7b109522&u=ed3ab556783898df4fb1eb6a1&id=466dad8c28)
---
| |
---
| |
# THE AMERICA FIRST CANDIDATE
-SAVE AMERICA-

###

**IMMEDIATE RELEASE:** Mike Blasi For Congress [info@mikeblasiforcongress.com](mailto:info@mikeblasiforcongress.com)

1-(470) 645-3724 **-David Burg endorses Mike Blasi-**
**HOWELL, NJ** (April 3, 2022) - Sunday Mike Blasi, Republican candidate for Congress in New Jersey's 4th District, "David Burg is an incredible asset to the cause and with his knowledge and patriotism our campaign is stronger and poised for victory."

BELOW IS THE PRESS RELEASE FROM DAVID BURG: *** PRESS RELEASE***
David Burg for Congress Statement
_David Burg Suspends His Congressional Campaign and Endorses Mike Blasi_ (Howell, New Jersey) MONDAY, APRIL 4, 2022 --- David Burg, Republican Candidate for Congress in New Jersey’s 4th District, announced yesterday that he has suspended his campaign and is endorsing fellow primary challenger Mike Blasi to unseat incumbent Chris Smith.

"It has been a tremendous privilege and one of the most meaningful experiences of my life to run for Congress. Because of the incredible generosity of my supporters I’ve had the opportunity to articulate my views about the perilous future of our country far and wide, and to fight as hard as I can to preserve and protect our sacred Constitutional Republic.

But this campaign has never been about me. From the outset, it’s been about our country, our culture, our faith, and our families.

Mike Blasi is a fellow Republican who preceded me in this race and now is in a stronger position to unseat our 42-year incumbent. Like myself, Mike is a political outsider who is not beholden to anyone or anything other than his principles. He’s a good man who has served our country, he’s a family man, and Mike and I see eye-to-eye on all significant issues.

Under these circumstances, the last thing I would want to do is stand in Mike’s way. So it’s my honor to wholeheartedly endorse Mike Blasi to be our next Congressman from New Jersey’s 4th District. I intend to do everything I can to help Mike win this critically important primary on June 7.

Running for Congress also has opened my eyes to the astonishingly corrupt political system in this state. I find it shocking and wholly unacceptable that a small cabal of entrenched insiders determines whom the Republican Party will endorse for political office – which these operatives then publish on the very ballot through which we exercise our right to vote.

Given this mutual back-scratching racket it’s hardly surprising that a RINO swamp creature like Chris Smith has held our Congressional seat for 42 years!

So, in addition to doing everything I can for Mike Blasi, I intend to use my legal skills to help abolish New Jersey’s corrupt line-voting system. It’s time to empower ordinary New Jersians to express their own preferences for the candidates who best represent their Republican values – without undue influence by entrenched insiders.

Two other extremely important points for those of you in the NJ area:

First, a truly courageous patriot who has become a dear friend through my Congressional campaign, Elizabeth Nader, is organizing what promises to be an incredibly informative and inspiring event on April 28 entitled ‘A Seat At The Table.’ There will be a number of nationally-prominent conservative luminaries there and I strongly encourage all of you to attend. You can learn about and register for this very important event here: [https://www.conservative.org/2022/03/16/a-seat-at-the-table/](https://MikeBlasiForCongress.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=ed3ab556783898df4fb1eb6a1&id=4dba77e1c5&e=5c7b109522).

Second, another courageous patriot and prominent conservative talk-show host on NJ 101.5, Bill Spadea, and others recently launched a critically-important grassroots conservative organization in New Jersey, the Common Sense Club. The Common Sense Club is growing rapidly and is positioned to affect important and deeply impactful change in our great state. I’m a member and I strongly encourage each of you to join here: [https://commonsenseclub.org/](https://MikeBlasiForCongress.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=ed3ab556783898df4fb1eb6a1&id=a948b526ea&e=5c7b109522).

I’m so gratified to have had this opportunity to run for Congress. Thanks to all of you from the bottom of my heart, and please know that this has been just the start of my ongoing fight to defend our beloved country from the leftist abyss.

God Bless America.” ###
####
# WE'RE CLEANING HOUSE
Any further inquiries can be directed to the **Campaign Management Team** by responding to this email or by calling our campaign offices and asking for our Press Secretary at 1-(470) 645-3724

name: Team Samuels
subject: Lower costs now!
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY BEN SAMUELS FOR CONGRESS
body:
Hi Friend,
The healthcare situation in this country is a mess. Prescription drug prices are too high, Medicaid coverage is too scarce, and monthly premiums are beating people down. We need to change A LOT about how our healthcare system works so that the American people have access to affordable and quality care.
So how has Ann Wagner helped improve this situation?
Wagner has repeatedly voted to gut the affordable care act and deny more coverage to the American people. We think that says plenty about her priorities. Wagner has proven over the course of ten years and dozens of votes that she is not concerned with improving the lives and health of Missourians.
Rush in $15 and join the movement for access to affordable healthcare with Ben Samuels. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2204-q2-bs-healthcare?refcode=220409-email&amount=15]
When Ben is in Congress, he will fight to lower prescription drug prices, invest in new medical technologies, allow Medicare to negotiate with pharmaceutical companies, and invest in mental health and wellness. These are not luxuries; they are necessities.
Everyone deserves to see a doctor when they are sick. It is time to stop talking about it and start doing it. Join our team now, donate $25 to elect Ben Samuels. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2204-q2-bs-healthcare?refcode=220409-email&amount=25]
Thank you so much,
Team Samuels
PAID FOR BY BEN SAMUELS FOR CONGRESS
Ben Samuels for Congress
9621 Olive Blvd.
P.O. Box 8484
Saint Louis, MO 63132-9998
United States

name: Tony Vargas
subject: asking for $5 to buy stamps
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tony Vargas for Congress
body:
Please understand;

|
---

| | It’s Saturday so I’ll be quick -- a recent poll showed I’m leading by one point, and now: ...Don Bacon is waging his first attacks on me
...National papers announced he’s the most vulnerable Congressman
...GOP special interests are rushing him thousands of dollars [**_I need a swift, immediate response to stop them from wiping out my lead and our chance to hold the Democratic House. I’m sending my FIRST 22,000 pieces of mail to critical, undecided voters. I only have 12 hours to raise $5,800 for stamps, or I won’t be able to fund this expense. | Friend – after Pelosi dropped a $102 MILLION ad-buy to attack us, generous grassroots patriots like you helped me fight back with an ad of our own.

clean_body: We can’t fall short for this next ad-buy. | Friend – after Pelosi dropped a $102 MILLION ad-buy to attack us, generous grassroots patriots like you helped me fight back with an ad of our own. And while we raised enough funds to get our ad up and running, if we can’t raise another $15,000 by 11:59 P.M., the ad will be SHUT OFF. It’s critical that our ad detailing my family’s American Dream of slavery to West Point in just five generations continues to run to cut though the noise of Pelosi’s lying attack ads. But with just hours to go until our ad gets PULLED, I have no one else to turn to at the final hour. Thank you, Wesley Hunt Former U.S. Army Captain Republican for Congress \- - - - Forwarded Message - - - - From: Wesley Hunt Date: April, 4, 2022 Subject: Pelosi is flooding the airwaves To: dpwillis67@gmail.com Friend, Last month, I told you that Nancy Pelosi was sitting on a war chest of over $100 million that she would use to attack us now that we're in the general election. Well, she didn’t waste a minute... Pelosi just spent $102 MILLION on attack ads targeting the 5 key races that will decide the fate of the House majority. Now more than ever, I’m counting on your help to fight back against Pelosi’s smear campaign by running ads of our own in this must-win race for Texas’ new seat. But as it stands, I’m still $31,085 short of my first ad-buy of the general election with the deadline just hours away. Friend, we can’t allow Pelosi to BUY this race for her hand-picked liberal puppet. If we let this wave of attacks go unanswered, it’s only a matter of time before she doubles down on her ad spend and completely drowns out our America First message. And make no mistake – Pelosi, her DCCC, and her House Majority Super PAC are in no short supply of cash to attack us with. But the most effective way for us to fight back is with ads of our own. Thank you, Wesley Hunt Former U.S. Army Captain Republican for Congress 1707 1/2 Post Oak Blvd. #525 Houston, TX 77056 Paid for by Hunt for Congress. name: Nate Fowler, Team Mondaire
subject: Nice to meet you
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Mondaire for Congress_
body:
#

Hi there — I just want to take a moment to introduce myself. I’m Nate, Mondaire’s campaign manager, and I’m so grateful to have you on this team. I’ll bring you up to speed:
In 2020, Mondaire ran a historic campaign and proved that Americans are ready for change.
Despite the conventional wisdom of the time, Mondaire won that race because he built a campaign centered around lifting up the people of Westchester and Rockland Counties, rather than protecting the interests of corporations and the super rich.
Since then, Mondaire’s been bringing his lived experiences to the policy-making table. Coming from a working-class home, Mondaire understood what was at stake in this broken economy, and got right to work — partnering with his Democratic colleagues to deliver critical relief, put thousands of dollars back into the pockets of everyday Americans, and create millions of new, good-paying jobs to get folks back to work.
He has, and will always, fight for what matters: a living wage, Medicare for All, a livable planet, racial and LGBTQ+ justice, and so much more.
Now, we’re gearing up for a tough re-election battle with a new challenge — a brand new congressional map for NY-17. **That means Mondaire is now running in counties where Donald Trump won big in 2020, so we must fight harder to reach voters, prepare to overcome negative attack ads, and help voters make the most informed decision.**
I’ll be honest: we’ve got our work cut out for us. It’s going to take a whole lot of resources to win this race and protect the progress Mondaire has fought so hard to achieve. But I’m confident that, with you on our team, this grassroots operation is capable of making history once again.
**[So, will you join me in supporting Mondaire by pitching in to his re-election campaign right now?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43950616/339439685/-46856898?refcode=AU_MLJ_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20220409_AM1_V1_S2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83ODAzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjMDZiZGRmZC0xNWI4LWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=r6W6VTw1aIjr-00cBEMvqS-rvv24ULpSz6mohUwEr-I=)**

name: Team Welch
subject: re: Prescription Drugs
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY WELCH FOR VERMONT
body:
It’s time to break the iron grip Big Pharma has on life-saving drugs:

# [](https://act.welchforvermont.com/go/144?t=2&akid=207%2E61531%2E2v_eu9)
Hello,
One-third of American adults who need medication don’t take it because it’s too expensive.
Health care is a human right. But Big Pharma is constantly raising prices at a pace patients can’t keep up with. No family should be forced to choose between their medicine and putting groceries on the table.
[**Peter’s fighting back—and he needs our help. If you haven’t already, please add your name to our petition telling Congress to finish the job and lower the cost of prescription drugs.**](https://act.welchforvermont.com/signup/em-lower-prescription-drugs/?source=em_20220409_p_p_rxdrugs&t=3&akid=207%2E61531%2E2v_eu9)
This is a fight Peter continues to champion. We’ve come close time and time again. So many lawmakers siding with Big Pharma want this to fail, but there are so many commonsense steps Congress can take to ease this burden, including:
* Capping the out-of-pocket cost of insulin at $35 per month.
* Limiting pharmaceutical companies from raising prices beyond the rate of inflation.
* Directly lowering out-of-pocket drug costs for seniors.

But we need to keep fighting side by side to get it done.
[**Health care is a right, not a privilege. And it’s long past time to deliver for seniors and families across the country. Add your name right away to say you agree with Peter: Congress must lower prescription drug prices.**](https://act.welchforvermont.com/signup/em-lower-prescription-drugs/?source=em_20220409_p_p_rxdrugs&t=4&akid=207%2E61531%2E2v_eu9)
There’s a lot of work to do, but together, we can get it done.
Thanks for adding your name,
Team Welch

---
| [DONATE ](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pwfv-em-22apr?refcode=em_20220409_p_p_rxdrugs&refcode2=207_61531_2v_eu9&akid=207%2E61531%2E2v_eu9)

name: RonBeGone.com
subject: DeSantis’ legacy in trouble

name: Dean Heller
subject: I’ll never understand this.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Dean Heller for Nevada Governor |
body:
The radical Left is determined to teach young children warped ideas about sex and gender.
[View this message in your browser](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zap8ire0lacf3vqnh4l0bqne57naoeds4h616tmg_rp22sh2s8i66ob4slj60o74cdh238h5e8he485he5o75pt7kkpq8ddl69qbcd1jmgr32t5nmepradrmeej3fddnkgp7cc5kmdqjf972u9hf8t5m6jgn2djm6epb0tb3e8o71pdjempb5db16cq34olie1or0s9jm9r6fc9kc1jt4s3ic9j71cj6e3ib6or7m8omcsdimdg6fdr1cooj1cj6c3gbaor0s2qj2cdl66qn49fg)
| | | **LIBERALS ARE RUINING AMERICAN EDUCATION** _We must restore common sense in the classroom and _ _protect parents’ right to know what their kids are being taught._
---
[**JOIN THE FIGHT**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zepop7hvaknvs24qvq1ntgd0c8jk4lhe831ceii0_rp22sh2s8i66ob4slj60o74cdh2bs)
---
|
---
| | [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z3b6blolp90e63mbd2a10ig9l4i1rkquu7qdli10_rp22sh2s8i66ob4slj60o74cdh2bs)
---
| | Friend, The radical Left is determined to teach young children warped ideas about sex and gender. The same people telling us to **_“follow the science”_** are teaching our kids there’s more than two genders –– _and that you can switch genders whenever you feel like it._ It’s disgusting, it’s un-scientific, and unfortunately, it’s happening right now in public schools all over the country. **The worst part? Parents' are being left in the dark about all of this.** Parents' are outraged for two reasons:
1. They don’t want their children learning these radical ideas.
2. They’re sick of finding out _AFTER_ the damage is already done.

---
| | [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z0g8vhoc0i1eh6clvlokbnkkhvhlqrvplu3a4i9g_rp22sh2s8i66ob4slj60o74cdh2bs)
---
| | Restoring American education was a top priority for me when I served my home state of Nevada in the U.S. Senate –– and I’m proud of the progress we made behind President Trump’s patriotic leadership. **Now, I’m running for Governor because liberals have brought these same radical ideas, along with Critical Race Theory, to Nevada’s schools.**
---
[**HELP ME FLIP NEVADA RED**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zig51j39qef0r220htt9hoam9pcqhl0fg8efmlh8_rp22sh2s8i66ob4slj60o74cdh2bs)
---
Republican-led states like Florida and Texas are leading a nationwide movement to restore and protect parents’ rights in education. _It’s making the radical Left furious, and that means we’re doing the right thing._ It’s time for Nevada to stand on the right side of this issue. Everywhere I go, I meet concerned parents who agree with me. They’re sick and tired of their rights being taken away, and they have every reason to be angry. **As Governor, I’ll fight to protect parents’ rights and to keep the Left’s warped ideas out of our classrooms so our kids can focus on math, science, and reading.**
---
[](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z5kjtp4ad81s2n18h0909fts9tb1k1onubbrggj8_rp22sh2s8i66ob4slj60o74cdh2bs)
---
This issue is bigger than education. It’s about the future of our country and our freedoms. For America to survive –– and thrive –– we must give our children the education they need to compete and succeed against the world. That will never happen if liberals get away with teaching radical gender ideologies and Critical Race Theory which tells our children to hate America. **But this fight will never be won if patriots like you don’t step up. ** The Democrats won’t let go of Nevada easily. And I’ll need every conservative who wants to see a change to step up and chip in if we’re going to win.
---
[**FUEL THE FIGHT: $25**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zpo9igt09ohl7tslvvtet6q2eil6khh6rofgns6o_rp22sh2s8i66ob4slj60o74cdh2bs)

body:
We must protect this seat to prevent a far-right takeover in Congress.
#
Donald Trump is holding a MAGA rally with Madison Cawthorn in North Carolina today to rile up their right-wing base across the state.
**We’re running in a crucial swing district, and our race is a top target for control of the U.S. House, so we have to be prepared for anything that will come our way.**
Far-right extremist Madison Cawthorn is already taking aim at our district, throwing his full support behind our GOP opponent and January 6th insurrectionist, Sandy Smith.
[**We can’t let Sandy Smith, Madison Cawthorn, and Donald Trump take this seat away from us. Can you chip in $5 to help us fight back and elect Erica? Every dollar will help us protect this seat — and our Democratic majority.**](https://act.ericaforus.com/go/48326?refcode=em20220409-1075&%3Bamounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=1075%2E3698%2ESoOJmN)
**[Donate $5](https://act.ericaforus.com/go/48326?refcode=em20220409-1075&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=20&akid=1075%2E3698%2ESoOJmN)**
It’s clear Republicans are already hard at work in North Carolina to end our House majority, and this is only a preview of what’s to come.
We must protect this seat to prevent a far-right takeover in Congress. Erica is the best candidate to defeat the extreme GOP and fight for working families and small farmers across our district. But she can’t do it alone.
[**Can you rush $5 — or anything you can — today to ensure we have the resources to build a winning campaign and keep this seat out of the GOP’s hands?**](https://act.ericaforus.com/go/48326?refcode=em20220409-1075&%3Bamounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=21&akid=1075%2E3698%2ESoOJmN)
Thank you so much,
— Team Erica Smith

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/es-emails?refcode=em20220409-1075-footer&t=22&refcode2=1075_3698_SoOJmN&akid=1075%2E3698%2ESoOJmN)**

name: Team Biaggi
subject: Alessandra wants to hear from you
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Alessandra Biaggi for Congress
body:
#
Friend —
You’ve been selected to take Alessandra’s April issues survey.
[**Can you take just a minute to share your thoughts at this link?**](https://act.alessandrabiaggi.com/signup/em220409-issues-survey/?source=em220409-1-60&akid=691%2E59515%2E2U0vs2)

Thank you for sharing your thoughts!
– Team Biaggi

name: Team Schmidt
subject: Support for Team Schmidt keeps growing!
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY DEREK SCHMIDT FOR KANSAS, INC
body:
We are only a few months away from the primary, and we are continually seeing momentum roll in for Team Schmidt. There is great enthusiasm all over Ka Friend, We are only a few months away from the primary, and we are continually seeing momentum roll in for Team Schmidt.
There is great enthusiasm all over Kansas for Derek Schmidt in the governor’s office. Kansans are tired of failed leadership from Laura Kelly and want a governor who listens to the people. We’re now just a little under seven months away from Election Day! Before you close this email – please forward this to your friends and family who might be interested in being a part of our team. We’re excited to keep growing Team Schmidt! [**JOIN TEAM SCHMIDT**](http://links.schmidtforkansas.com/u/click?_t=4eb8bd5dcca54a0b993a2eb1eb42ba73&_m=48d99975fa4540e9b73230ffc8ff2649&_e=Ma_XE5gF7fhdizyubS3yidYcKVdtWJGirnZT1QJmAPSpbt7Dl00071YzZ4kKQAVkiEQIPMfgM5rcXgc7kpHiNtHzR9IjDIusYUtqeGoYm1RBSXLVfkZclZrvc-18o3oECvJ0_O3ZcsuCGjxQUIcNUNcSXqs_pnGeS1uVi6Cyz52RJnmu06FD3GOuvBKsmHIGF3oI8Bn4d6Ium3w7t8WxvxSSRJp8OJmSAtTrbkX_XnuZew-uhsAC14L6k7AUp7mb6tnMe6LJw24SbGDRSEcNjFEHi-RtPh422vU20-seyfYzqlsl020_Yght6AHHn502j5cGdxrwpHzSG5OFCde55vXqDbvvNImuN5DJX16X9xeFjuh-c02JlzmMsbnpp3uXdPIDmD_H7SAZ6qU4qlrvgZvXPIWoxL_B6WssY9TlUS7gKJI_GDw8aoslpNvSaEIb2ADZhjmi5fswtAXVT_SvYiO3kJO-Vp9UAzaWxSMvJ-Q8XqljXqs10BvBDXye1DqeRA71viFec6jPGYMYD3MKmg%3D%3D) Check out each of our recent endorsements below: _“As a former Kansas City Chiefs player, a former Johnson County Commissioner and current business owner, I enthusiastically endorse Derek Schmidt to be the next Governor of the Great State of Kansas! Derek is a trusted leader and determined competitor who will bring the commonsense, conservative principles of personal responsibility, individual freedoms and our Constitution to the Governor’s office. He is a family man who has the experience, the strength and the courage to fight for and protect all Kansans, especially our vulnerable and at-risk populations.”_ **Dave Lindstrom - Former Johnson County Commissioner** _“The Ellis County Republican Party today endorses Attorney General Derek Schmidt to be the next Governor of Kansas. Derek Schmidt is an accomplished, dedicated, and impressive leader who will fight to make the lives of all Kansans better. He is a true patriot who fights for individual liberty and freedom and has a track record of winning the tough battles as our Kansas Attorney General. He will continue to win on our behalf as our Kansas Governor...We are thankful that Derek Schmidt and his family have made this commitment to Kansas voters and have undertaken this difficult task. We encourage voters in Ellis County and all around our state to join us in supporting him in this race for Governor.” _ **Ellis County Republican Party** “Derek Schmidt has my full support for Kansas Governor. Derek is a strong conservative with common sense values. He truly understands western Kansas values. He has an excellent track record and will make a great leader for our state.” **Ward Cassidy - Former Kansas State Representative** “The Morton County Republican Party is honored to endorse Attorney General Derek Schmidt for Governor. Derek represents the best of Kansas’s values and we are proud to support him. Derek is a strong, conservative Constitutionalist. As Attorney General he has fought to protect our God-given rights and we have no doubt that he will continue to do so as Governor. Derek will help Kansas small businesses, workers, families, and children grow and thrive. Kansas is ready and in need of a strong leader. We encourage all Kansas to vote for Derek Schmidt for Governor.” **Morton County Republican Party ** _“As a childhood friend, Derek was reliable, always there when you needed him most. As a legislative colleague, he was effective, getting things done with integrity beyond question. As governor, he will be transformative with the experience, work ethic and conservative leadership that Kansas needs.”_ **Jeff King - Former Kansas Senate Vice President ** _"Derek Schmidt is a great friend to law enforcement who will make a great Governor of Kansas. Throughout his years of service as our attorney general, he's always provided us with the support we need to do our jobs to the best of our ability and keep Kansas safe. Now, more than ever with crime on the rise we need someone with his experience and his values leading our state. I will be proud to vote for him." _ **Bill Carr - Ford County Sheriff** Thanks again for standing with us and being on our team. We’re stronger with every one of these endorsers in our corner, but YOU will be among the grassroots supporters who make a WIN possible in November. We can’t thank you enough. –Team Schmidt | |
---
PAID FOR BY DEREK SCHMIDT FOR KANSAS, INC.,
KELLY ARNOLD, TREASURER.
| [](http://links.schmidtforkansas.com/u/click?_t=4eb8bd5dcca54a0b993a2eb1eb42ba73&_m=48d99975fa4540e9b73230ffc8ff2649&_e=Ma_XE5gF7fhdizyubS3yiVoJ7371-wrC6MVpU3YvOs47Uq3hfsLt_jR3dMhTPuVr64V87oaSBW0I44u3XIpqmPHiHWE2CxWUZwEwudymeJFEc8fhpI_imYWq5KP6ADd-aebhWTyuJ9srNkQEpXzaZ8RUSxvQT5Z_LOd8qlr_lBix-28zXFCtiV37qBGtRLHieRVSP_LYik4Zl2N1Bp7S_r9KuIr_iDzydxxrMGb3dMSwIt5lteJbLu7gDtRpauUVmaF0MdxU4QAnoWOZ37wFrTabyE7WJvCMcBH8ncak4lQ%3D) | [](http://links.schmidtforkansas.com/u/click?_t=4eb8bd5dcca54a0b993a2eb1eb42ba73&_m=48d99975fa4540e9b73230ffc8ff2649&_e=Ma_XE5gF7fhdizyubS3yiWsaD72MGT9h8t6oO_lGH6ORdKQJUco7m6popx03YJocUKf6HDF0tF4ILl6V0RmGJwb_8YbbGLjJATCgUcDm_tpUhzXeVSZlEPajnDDjn56kieSaKK03_iliubwjWjdau_o5yv_Sv80a43Z07ByGdxOOGVsWziJJiulfY9lKY9JXwyG3q_R9Bh-z-PM-dYJe3Ou_Nq5wUpQA3rgzeNJGbD1049kU8PjHa3gPXvCWmSXGmAX5RDWbIrHCq8d_zk1fDA%3D%3D) | [](http://links.schmidtforkansas.com/u/click?_t=4eb8bd5dcca54a0b993a2eb1eb42ba73&_m=48d99975fa4540e9b73230ffc8ff2649&_e=Ma_XE5gF7fhdizyubS3yiWizpualoj0ljWVTIKrKH845vRfXwEbxjtW4Px31MqKb4wuPKLS05-PCtBkqnOCNYN1xIXXXqpwGo-sF9GlH699DYCPNqpQS1uXwyXejBN-ZQCkMqJyLi3bvyNdf1zrx4gRwDWStbT5W0VWckK0iK5B29DJ7boUS2Vb1rJz0DzvOesOOTNEDYAYdFcanOI0o8czeThPQEMVG4nYVUG6a0yrGlzk40NbHzMdLNmmxp7BOjQdQctMwkETnQSvlD0m-XfOzKvzxut_z7LZ0uaHwf0Q%3D)

name: Mark Kelly
subject: Is there ANYTHING I can say Derek
body:
Good afternoon, Derek.
I am writing to ask if there is ANYTHING I can say to convince you to make a contribution before our mid-month fundraising deadline comes to an end in just a few days.
What if I told you that pundits almost universally agree this is going to be one of the closest races of the 2022 election ?
What if I told you that a new poll was just released that has us down two points against a generic Republican ?
What if I told you this race is also already one of the most expensive races of the 2022 election — and the cost will only get higher as we get closer to Election Day?
And what if I told you when this deadline ends we’re legally required to report what we’ve raised? Our opponents are too. Everyone will be watching to see the strength of our campaign.
We’re a bit behind where we need to be right now, and really need an absolutely HUGE 72 hours before this deadline ends. So please:
Can I count on you to split a $25 contribution between my re-election campaign and CommonGood before this critical fundraising deadline comes to a close in just a few short days? [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/cgva_2021_mk?refcode=20220409_CGVA_Kelly]
DONATE $25 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cgva_2021_mk?refcode=20220409_CGVA_Kelly&amount=25]
DONATE $35 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cgva_2021_mk?refcode=20220409_CGVA_Kelly&amount=35]
DONATE $50 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cgva_2021_mk?refcode=20220409_CGVA_Kelly&amount=50]
DONATE $100 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cgva_2021_mk?refcode=20220409_CGVA_Kelly&amount=100]
DONATE $250 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cgva_2021_mk?refcode=20220409_CGVA_Kelly&amount=250]
Donate ANY [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cgva_2021_mk?refcode=20220409_CGVA_Kelly]
Thank you again Derek. It’d really mean a lot if you joined this fight with me.
Mark Kelly
(This is a sponsored send hosted by CommonGood. CommonGood is dedicated to helping Democratic campaigns and organizations win critical races in Virginia and across the country.)

Common Good Virginia
PO Box 26112
Arlington, VA 22215
If you would like to opt-out of future emails from Common Good Virginia, click unsubscribe: https://email.ngpvan.com/unsubscribeUnique/52f7f2ad-24b8-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a/6d344198-40b8-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzU5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2ZDM0NDE5OC00MGI4LWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=4mIlFEl99bCRMocjt7GaxsEp0jpFIAxcqqi5zUIVGpE=&id=108609855 .

name: Team Toby
subject: Fwd: ** Joe Biden’s DANGEROUS Anti-Gun Agenda **
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Toby Anderson for Congress Inc
body:
Toby is waiting for your response.
| | | Hey Peter,
Did you see Toby’s message below? Joe Biden and the radical leftists in Congress are hellbent on destroying our Second Amendment rights, and they must be stopped! That’s why Toby asked you to sign his Second Amendment petition supporting our right to keep and bear arms. **_If you’ve already signed it, thank you! If not, will you take 30 seconds to add your name right now?_**
---
[**ADD YOUR NAME**](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/5ca70e78c0100c23041ad8cde91a9694/38863/e3d4c2abebae663c/1d0d9204432adf24c3d6b838967d376c/38863)
---
We need to collect as many signatures as possible to put the Biden gun banners on notice that we will NEVER BACK DOWN in this fight. So don’t wait – [sign the petition](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/5ca70e78c0100c23041ad8cde91a9694/38863/e3d4c2abebae663c/f71700bee47aba15c3d6b838967d376c/38863) immediately! Thank you for your quick response, Team Toby
---
|
---
[](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/5ca70e78c0100c23041ad8cde91a9694/38863/e3d4c2abebae663c/64f2a16c34ba2293c3d6b838967d376c/38863)
---
Peter,

I’m extremely concerned, so I’ll get right to the point.

**Joe Biden is proving to be the most anti-gun president in our nation’s history. If he and his far-left pals in Congress get their way, our Second Amendment rights will become a relic of the past.**

We must stand united to STOP his dangerous gun-ban agenda!**__** Will you add your name to my pro-Second Amendment petition and call on the president and Congress to protect our gun rights?
---
[**SIGN THE PETITION**](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/5ca70e78c0100c23041ad8cde91a9694/38863/e3d4c2abebae663c/01f91536c96ac52bc3d6b838967d376c/38863)
---
This is especially important now – as we see violent crime rates SURGE here in New Jersey and across the nation.

_Banning the most popular guns in our nation is the LAST thing we need right now. Dangerous criminals have never been stopped by so-called "gun control” laws.__ _ That’s why I will always stand up for the right of every law-abiding citizen to Keep and Bear Arms. If you agree, I hope you will [sign my Pro-Second Amendment Petition today](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/5ca70e78c0100c23041ad8cde91a9694/38863/e3d4c2abebae663c/244f9546e2d2c3edc3d6b838967d376c/38863).Toby Anderson

subject: Montana jobs need to go to Montana families.

body:
We need to diversify our energy sources, but not at the cost of Montana families | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43956349/339457070/1820125544?refcode=em-header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83ODQ0NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyM2Q1MzM0ZC0yMWI4LWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=UJBBrNvG9bemJPg5hyN3CAZ1Jgjj3xXmdOBs03xl5Ro=) Friend,

I want to talk about a topic that’s on a lot of people’s minds lately: **gas prices.**

Last month, I met with local operating engineers to talk about the spike in gas prices and some of the big projects happening in Montana to help reduce our dependence on foreign energy sources. We talked about the importance of strengthening domestic energy production and how to diversify our energy sources by investing in wind, solar, and hydroelectric energy.

**But there are some big energy projects happening in our state that aren’t benefiting Montana families.**

Clearwater Energy is building Montana's largest wind farm, Clearwater Wind. Unfortunately, the developers are taking the low road. They’ve hired about 350 workers -- the majority of which are not from Montana, not unionized, and not being paid prevailing wages. **This is all happening on our watch.**

**[Infrastructure jobs in Montana should be given to Montana workers, not contractors from out-of-state. Will you rush $3 to my campaign today to help us advocate for good paying jobs, wages, and unions to support the working families in MT-01?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43956350/339457071/-10092236?refcode=em-4.8.22-all-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83ODQ0NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyM2Q1MzM0ZC0yMWI4LWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=UJBBrNvG9bemJPg5hyN3CAZ1Jgjj3xXmdOBs03xl5Ro=)**
| **[Donate Now »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43956352/339457072/-10092236?refcode=em-4.8.22-all-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83ODQ0NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyM2Q1MzM0ZC0yMWI4LWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=UJBBrNvG9bemJPg5hyN3CAZ1Jgjj3xXmdOBs03xl5Ro=)**
---

**Montana workers who have all the skills and experience to do the job aren’t being offered the opportunities happening right in their backyard.** There aren’t many other employment options available right now for folks in Rosebud County, so it's a complete slap to the face to see these jobs go to out-of-state workers from Texas, Oklahoma or California.

These are the kinds of projects and moments where we need to step up and fight for Montana families. I was raised by a union carpenter, I wouldn’t be here without those good jobs and wages. **Our families deserve better, and Clearwater energy _needs to do better._**

**[So, if you can, please consider donating $3 to my campaign today. I’ve spent my career fighting for opportunities for working families, and development projects like this show us there’s more work to be done.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43956355/339457073/-10092236?refcode=em-4.8.22-all-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83ODQ0NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyM2Q1MzM0ZC0yMWI4LWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=UJBBrNvG9bemJPg5hyN3CAZ1Jgjj3xXmdOBs03xl5Ro=)**

name: Aadland For Colorado
subject: Reminder: Drain the Swamp
body:
---
| | | | | | Volume 36 | April 6, 2022
---
|
---
| A Word From Erik
---
| | |
---|---
|
In the early days of former President Donald Trump's campaign, he took it as one of his goals to drain the swamp of Washington D.C. Of course, Washington D.C. really was once a swamp that Virginia and Maryland gave up for the U.S. government to carve out our national capital.

What followed many years since the founding of our nation's capital is another kind of swamp altogether. In today's Swamp, marshes and uninhabitable land is replaced by an ever-increasing government intent on controlling us through massive spending, fueled by high taxes, and all the regulatory controls that come with it.

The idea of draining the Swamp is not an anti-government idea. In fact, it's just the opposite. And, We the People cannot allow Washington to be overrun by elected officials and a permanent bureaucracy focused more on keeping their jobs and expanding their power than doing their Constitutional duties on behalf of the American people.

What we as Americans should expect of our congressional leaders is that they read and understand the Constitution, pass laws that benefit the people and discourage corruption, and seek to defend the country at every turn. Their ultimate charge is to uphold our freedom and the pursuit of Life, Liberty and Happiness.

There is clearly a reason that almost 60 percent of Americans disapprove of the way our government spends money--Americans want a government that is responsive to the people. We do not accept large amounts of spending for Washington insider ideas that seek only to improve the reelection chances of career politicians.

The Swamp loves boundless spending because more spending means more rules, more boards, more commissions, more bureaus and more power and control. Solutions to real problems are secondary to their grab for power and control.

For Coloradans and our fellow American citizens, I want power to exist in the hands of free, innovative, and caring people with exemplary principles who live virtuously within the laws they created. The spirit of America is realized, and the economy energized, when we cut loose inventors, entrepreneurs and thinkers from government overreach.

I will continually push to reduce the size of government, as well as for lower taxes, securing our borders, resourcing all levels of law enforcement, and helping Colorado achieve her goals with as few strings as possible from the permanent bureaucracy and career politicians.

Freedom depends on some governing, but its real guarantor power behind America's greatness is a free people unleashed. We must never forget that all power vested in the government is granted by We the People.
|

| Campaign Update
---
| |
---|---
|
The CD7 Congressional and Colorado State Assemblies are upon us!

All hands on deck this week preparing the the all-important vote this Friday in Colorado Springs.

Erik has been getting great response from Delegates he's spoken with and he is eager to take The Stage and address the Assembly Friday morning.

In addition to the push, Erik worked in an appearance in Fairplay at the Rocky Mountain Cigar Company for the Candidates Forum. His message was very well received.

Erik spoke on Sunday to an enthusiastic crowd at the Colorado Red Wave rally produced by Danielle Neuschwanger (Candidate for Colorado Governor) and hosted by Bandimere Speedway in Morrison.

Saturday, Erik addressed CD7 Delegates in Arvada at Malone's Clubhouse Grill. After Erik's formal words and lots of one-on-one conversation, several folks stepped up to join Team Aadland Volunteers.
| | |

| Quote of The Week
---
"There is nothing to be gained by adding more hatred or vitriol. I'm going to win this race with honor and integrity and character. And the voters are going to see that. If they don't then they're not going to elect me. But I don't think we are going to win by spewing more hatred. We need less of that."
* -Erik Aadland on facing slimy campaigning from Democrats

There's just us...and you. Anything you can spare will help Erik secure the nomination. Please consider a donation today.
Help Erik right this ship! Join the cause and share what you can spare. With our gratitude, Aadland for Colorado Staff
