clean_body: | | | | | | Volume 36 | April 6, 2022 | | A Word From Erik | | | ---|--- | In the early days of former President Donald Trump's campaign, he took it as one of his goals to drain the swamp of Washington D.C. Of course, Washington D.C. really was once a swamp that Virginia and Maryland gave up for the U.S. government to carve out our national capital. What followed many years since the founding of our nation's capital is another kind of swamp altogether. In today's Swamp, marshes and uninhabitable land is replaced by an ever-increasing government intent on controlling us through massive spending, fueled by high taxes, and all the regulatory controls that come with it. The idea of draining the Swamp is not an anti-government idea. In fact, it's just the opposite. And, We the People cannot allow Washington to be overrun by elected officials and a permanent bureaucracy focused more on keeping their jobs and expanding their power than doing their Constitutional duties on behalf of the American people. What we as Americans should expect of our congressional leaders is that they read and understand the Constitution, pass laws that benefit the people and discourage corruption, and seek to defend the country at every turn. Their ultimate charge is to uphold our freedom and the pursuit of Life, Liberty and Happiness. There is clearly a reason that almost 60 percent of Americans disapprove of the way our government spends money--Americans want a government that is responsive to the people. We do not accept large amounts of spending for Washington insider ideas that seek only to improve the reelection chances of career politicians. The Swamp loves boundless spending because more spending means more rules, more boards, more commissions, more bureaus and more power and control. Solutions to real problems are secondary to their grab for power and control. For Coloradans and our fellow American citizens, I want power to exist in the hands of free, innovative, and caring people with exemplary principles who live virtuously within the laws they created. The spirit of America is realized, and the economy energized, when we cut loose inventors, entrepreneurs and thinkers from government overreach. I will continually push to reduce the size of government, as well as for lower taxes, securing our borders, resourcing all levels of law enforcement, and helping Colorado achieve her goals with as few strings as possible from the permanent bureaucracy and career politicians. Freedom depends on some governing, but its real guarantor power behind America's greatness is a free people unleashed. We must never forget that all power vested in the government is granted by We the People. | | | | | | | == | | | | Campaign Update | | ---|--- | The CD7 Congressional and Colorado State Assemblies are upon us! All hands on deck this week preparing the the all-important vote this Friday in Colorado Springs. Erik has been getting great response from Delegates he's spoken with and he is eager to take The Stage and address the Assembly Friday morning. In addition to the push, Erik worked in an appearance in Fairplay at the Rocky Mountain Cigar Company for the Candidates Forum. His message was very well received. Erik spoke on Sunday to an enthusiastic crowd at the Colorado Red Wave rally produced by Danielle Neuschwanger (Candidate for Colorado Governor) and hosted by Bandimere Speedway in Morrison. Saturday, Erik addressed CD7 Delegates in Arvada at Malone's Clubhouse Grill. After Erik's formal words and lots of one-on-one conversation, several folks stepped up to join Team Aadland Volunteers. | | | | Quote of The Week "There is nothing to be gained by adding more hatred or vitriol. I'm going to win this race with honor and integrity and character. And the voters are going to see that. If they don't then they're not going to elect me. But I don't think we are going to win by spewing more hatred. We need less of that." * -Erik Aadland on facing slimy campaigning from Democrats | A True Grass-Roots Campaign | Erik's effort to represent Colorado is a true grass-roots campaign. There is no family fortune behind this drive. No generations of beer barons, or Fat-Cat donors from California and New York backing our organization. There's just us...and you. Anything you can spare will help Erik secure the nomination. Please consider a donation today. Help Erik right this ship! Join the cause and share what you can spare. With our gratitude, Aadland for Colorado Staff | | | | == | Upcoming Events | Erik Aadland Hospitality Room Thursday April 7th 6:00PM Erik, family and staff will host a Hospitality Room at the Doubletree Hotel in advance of the Congressional Assembly. We will be in the King Presidential Suite (Room 545) from 6:00 to 9:00PM on Thursday Apr 7th. Join us for friendship and fun conservative conversation The Doubletree Hotel is at 1775 E. Cheyenne Mountain Blvd in Colorado Springs | | == | | | CD7 Assembly begins! Friday Apr 8th 9:30AM The event we've been working toward, Assembly Begins! Registration and check-in begin at 9:30AM and the event gets officially underway at 11:30 in the Grand Ballroom of the Doubletree Hotel in Colorado Springs. You must be a CD7 Delegate to attend this event The Doubletree Hotel is at 1775 E. Cheyenne Mountain Blvd in Colorado Springs | | | Colorado Republican Committee Centennial Dinner Friday Apr 8th 6:00PM The Colorado Republican Committee presents the Centennial Dinner at the Doubletree Hotel in Colorado Springs. Tickets are $140 per person The Doubletree Hotel is at 1775 E. Cheyenne Mountain Blvd in Colorado Springs | | | Colorado Republican State Assembly Saturday Apr 9th 9:00AM The Republican State Assembly begins Saturday morning in the World Arena in Colorado Springs. Check-in and credentialing begins at 7:00AM. The Assembly and Convention will convene at 9:00AM to designate Republican candidates for Governor, Secretary of State, Treasurer, Attorney General and U.S. Senate primary candidates. You must be a State Delegate to attend this event World Arena is at 3185 Venetucci Blvd in Colorado Springs | | | | | | == == == | PO Box 630552 Littleton, CO 80163 (720) 464 4488 | | Aadland For Congress | PO Box 630552, Littleton, CO 80163 | | Sent by mailto:staff@aadlandforcolorado.com powered by

body:
GOP leadership is FURIOUS!
| _To make the most powerful lasting impact and help us oust Republicans who attack our right to vote, make a[monthly sustaining contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/8073?t=1&akid=1774%2E878179%2EiPx2e3)._

**Team, Liz Cheney just made our day:** [ ](https://act.protectvoting.org/survey/stand_LC_PET_April/?source=VPP_20220409_EMPET_E2_T0_AC_RS&t=7&akid=1774%2E878179%2EiPx2e3) While we don’t always agree with Liz Cheney, **we LOVE that she isn’t afraid to hold Trump accountable for his role in the January 6th insurrection.**

_But GOP leadership is FURIOUS._ They’re ramping up their attacks on Cheney to FORCE her off the Jan. 6th Commission and to let Trump get off scot-free. [Unless 35,000 good Democrats stand with Liz Cheney by MIDNIGHT, she could fold to far-right MAGA attacks – SIGN NOW TO STAND WITH LIZ CHENEY »](https://act.protectvoting.org/survey/stand_LC_PET_April/?source=VPP_20220409_EMPET_E2_T0_AC_RS&t=8&akid=1774%2E878179%2EiPx2e3) | [SIGN NOW: Stand with Liz Cheney »](https://act.protectvoting.org/survey/stand_LC_PET_April/?source=VPP_20220409_EMPET_E2_T0_AC_RS&t=9&akid=1774%2E878179%2EiPx2e3)

after raising concerns over Black Lives Matter/critical race theory being taught in his daughter’s seventh-grade ancient history class. (The Court has also set a hearing on Defendants’ Motion for Summary Judgment for Monday, April 11). name: =?utf-8?q?George=E2=80=99s_iPhone?=
subject: I need a quick favor
body:
| Peter, As we get closer to the May primary, I’m sure you have been getting a lot of emails. You and I both know how important this race is. It could change the future of our country. But, we have run into a bump in the road with the upcoming Senate debate that will be held on April 25th. The debate organizers have now set an arbitrary public polling threshold in order to be admitted to the debate. It’s just another stunt to try and undermine our conservative, grassroots campaign. Will you sign our petition to help me stand up to these phony rules right now? [https://secure.winred.com/bochetto-for-senate/debate](https://bochettoforsenate.nationbuilder.com/r?u=K115QJUsYIJk1EqYiO2oYhRECXP9zpGAeiJcLx1o7CFxRyGLgQBGzjK4pI1wax-OS4hyZY3Hz7KOFTUYu9NGAg&e=674a0be7cca5db25cb3914af0eb7eb00&utm_source=bochettoforsenate&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=debate_email_2&n=1) Without you, our campaign wouldn’t be where it is today. We need your help now more than ever, please donate now - even as little as $20 - to help me fight back and get our message out to PA voters: [https://secure.winred.com/bochetto-for-senate/fightback](https://bochettoforsenate.nationbuilder.com/r?u=K115QJUsYIJk1EqYiO2oYhRECXP9zpGAeiJcLx1o7CFFPtuewKeicOw2OZyISYhT3gfAK9iaYrRSnM-z1WMtAg&e=674a0be7cca5db25cb3914af0eb7eb00&utm_source=bochettoforsenate&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=debate_email_2&n=2) George Bochetto _Sent from my iPhone_
---
-=-=- Bochetto for Senate · PA 19102, United States
This email was sent to [dpwillis67@gmail.com](mailto:dpwillis67@gmail.com). To stop receiving emails, [click here](https://bochettoforsenate.nationbuilder.com/unsubscribe?e=674a0be7cca5db25cb3914af0eb7eb00&utm_source=bochettoforsenate&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=debate_email_2&n=3). -=-=-
Created with [NationBuilder](https://bochettoforsenate.nationbuilder.com/r?u=8ZU0Lizkf4ldaLE4eHvP4jrdVLeo6TMxn9HZ_FOKnho&e=674a0be7cca5db25cb3914af0eb7eb00&utm_source=bochettoforsenate&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=debate_email_2&n=4), software for leaders.

name: Derek Marshall
subject: A stamp of approval
body:
[https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP21/1/88122/images/Derek%20Marshall%20Logo%20-%20Standard%20Stacked%20Lockup%20JTree%20MAIN%20COLOR.png]
Derek Marshall is running in California's newly-created 23rd Congressional District, against incumbent Jay Obernolte, not Kevin McCarthy, who represents the former 23rd district. You may be receiving these emails because you've previously indicated you support progressive and Democratic candidates. Emails are the best way we update our supporters, but y ou can always unsubscribe: https://email.ngpvan.com/unsubscribeUnique/428669bb-68b7-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a/99d1157e-26b8-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODEyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5OWQxMTU3ZS0yNmI4LWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=fseoTWOtCoKwt02-dAyHG90klGM-yIQDg2fzKu_WWlI=&id=124407521 here.
Peter,
I have exciting news to share. As you know, in recent weeks, we've been spending all our time coordinating with political partners, training volunteers, and connecting with voters at their doors and to register them to vote. In other words, we've been busy doing the work.
And that work continues to pay off. In the past week, we have been endorsed by not one, but TWO prominent groups in California's 23rd.
If you want to support the Democratic frontrunner in this race, consider joining these organizations and donate to my campaign today! [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dm-april?refcode=4-9&amount=38]
[https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP21/1/88122/images/IMG_6629.JPG] [https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP21/1/88122/images/IMG_02F7553FED2A-1.jpeg]
San Bernardino is one of the largest counties in the district , and a concentrated area of constituents. The Chicano Latino Caucus of San Bernardino Caucus endorsed me, and I was the only Congressional candidate they endorsed.
33% of voting-age people in my district are Latino, and this endorsement is a huge stamp of approval from a prominent caucus, who know that I will work hard to represent ALL members of my district.
I also received the endorsement of the Inland Empire DSA, our local chapter of Democratic Socialists of America. I have been a DSA member for many years that I've been a political organizer, and I'm thrilled to have their full support.
Join them in showing your support for my campaign by chipping in today! Remember, monthly donations are the best way to maximize your impact. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dm-april?refcode=4-9&amount=38&recurring=1]
If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:
Express Donate: $5 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dm-april?express_lane=true&amount=5&refcode=express_lane_5]
Express Donate: $15 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dm-april?express_lane=true&amount=15&refcode=express_lane_15]
Express Donate: $25 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dm-april?express_lane=true&amount=25&refcode=express_lane_25]
Express Donate: $38 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dm-april?express_lane=true&amount=38&refcode=express_lane_38]
Express Donate: Other [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dm-april?express_lane_other=true&refcode=express_lane_other]
Or, maximize your impact and make your donation monthly. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dm-april?refcode=4-9&amount=38&recurring=1]
These endorsements show that our campaign has broad appeal and widespread support from many different kinds of organizations throughout the district. As our campaign continues to gather more steam, it's crucial we maintain our momentum and stay competitive. I'll need your support in the coming weeks.
Are you in?
In solidarity,
Derek Marshall
Candidate for U.S. Congress, CA-23
Donate Now [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dm-april?refcode=4-9&amount=38]
Meet Derek [www.DerekMarshallCA.com]

P.O. Box 2836, Victorville, CA 92395 • (760) 486-2416 [tel:(760) 486-2416]
Twitter [https://twitter.com/derekmarshallca] | Facebook [https://www.facebook.com/DerekMarshallCA] | Instagram [https://www.instagram.com/derekmarshallca]

name: Esther
subject: my son, Marco
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Marco Lopez for Governor Authorized by Marco Lopez
body:
| | | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43963153/339484230/1742512187?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk607-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTQ2MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3ZDliODJiOS00OGI4LWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=vA-zwqhfntckrZ8JeY_emBKQq5W_7UmWhLwn9KLJ2TI=)
---
Friend – **I am so excited to be reaching out to you on behalf of my son, Marco Lopez, who's running for governor of Arizona.**
Fifty years ago, Marco's dad and I made the decision to move our family from Mexico to Arizona. We came here for the promise of greater opportunity – for the promise of Arizona. But I never could have imagined where that promise would take Marco.
**From becoming the mayor of our hometown of Nogales, Arizona, to serving in the Obama administration, Marco has always been a champion for the people of this state. And today, he's following in my footsteps – running his own small business, creating jobs and opportunity in his community. **

As a mother, I couldn't be more proud of Marco – and as an Arizonan, I couldn't be more excited for the vision he has for our great state. From defending voting rights to fixing our broken education system to increasing access to affordable health care, Marco is dedicated to making Arizona a state that works for _all_ people.
**But it won't be easy. He's running against a Trump-backed Republican – and she cares more about pushing her extremist agenda than fixing the problems of our state. Simply put, she's the exact _opposite_ of my son.**

That's why I'm reaching out to you today. Even though Marco fights day after day to make Arizona's promise a reality for everyone, he has many more fights ahead of him. And while our family has plenty of love and support to go around, he's counting on grassroots folks like you to help power this campaign to victory.

**Last time he called, he mentioned he was falling a few thousand dollars short of his midnight fundraising goal, and I don't want to let him down.** **So I wanted to reach out on his behalf and humbly ask:[Friend, will you please give $5 or more today so we can elect Marco as our next governor and build a state that works for all people?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43963154/339484231/1742512187?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk607-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTQ2MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3ZDliODJiOS00OGI4LWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=vA-zwqhfntckrZ8JeY_emBKQq5W_7UmWhLwn9KLJ2TI=)**

clean_body: | | | = Friend – I am so excited to be reaching out to you on behalf of my son, Marco Lopez, who's running for governor of Arizona. Fifty years ago, Marco's dad and I made the decision to move our family from Mexico to Arizona. We came here for the promise of greater opportunity – for the promise of Arizona. But I never could have imagined where that promise would take Marco. From becoming the mayor of our hometown of Nogales, Arizona, to serving in the Obama administration, Marco has always been a champion for the people of this state. And today, he's following in my footsteps – running his own small business, creating jobs and opportunity in his community. As a mother, I couldn't be more proud of Marco – and as an Arizonan, I couldn't be more excited for the vision he has for our great state. From defending voting rights to fixing our broken education system to increasing access to affordable health care, Marco is dedicated to making Arizona a state that works for all people. But it won't be easy. He's running against a Trump-backed Republican – and she cares more about pushing her extremist agenda than fixing the problems of our state. Simply put, she's the exact opposite of my son. That's why I'm reaching out to you today. Even though Marco fights day after day to make Arizona's promise a reality for everyone, he has many more fights ahead of him. And while our family has plenty of love and support to go around, he's counting on grassroots folks like you to help power this campaign to victory. Last time he called, he mentioned he was falling a few thousand dollars short of his midnight fundraising goal, and I don't want to let him down. Peter,

body:
Morgan crushed it this morning on MSNBC and demonstrated the strength of this movement to flip Ohio blue
# [](https://act.morganharper.org/go/1512?refcode=em20220409-923-footer-ak&t=2&akid=923%2E90090%2EDR0RbG)
Hi,
We’ll keep this really short because we want to let you hear from Morgan directly: **We’re so excited because this morning Morgan appeared on MSNBC to talk about the race and how we can flip Ohio blue THIS YEAR.**
This is a big opportunity and we can’t afford to let it pass by with only 24 days left until the primary – and with voters already casting their ballots during early voting. **[Watch the video and then please chip in whatever you can to boost the campaign in this final stretch before the primary.](https://act.morganharper.org/go/31067?t=3&akid=923%2E90090%2EDR0RbG)**
[](https://act.morganharper.org/go/31067?t=4&akid=923%2E90090%2EDR0RbG)
We can send Morgan to the Senate to be a progressive champion for Ohio and the country, but we need your help to make sure we have the resources to win.
**[Can you donate today to help us keep up the pace on TV and with our organizing team?](https://act.morganharper.org/go/31067?t=5&akid=923%2E90090%2EDR0RbG)**
Onwards,
Team Morgan

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mh-email?refcode=em20220409-923-footer&t=6&refcode2=923_90090_DR0RbG&akid=923%2E90090%2EDR0RbG)**

name: Mckayla Wilkes
subject: Team Mckayla's Weekly Volunteer Email
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY MCKAYLA 2022 AND PROUDLY POWERED BY THE PEOPLE
body:
| | | Team, The past few weeks have been an extremely exciting time for our campaign. **Maryland now has a brand-new map after redistricting, and the new MD-05 is the _most leftward-shifting district_ in the entire country.** That’s really, really promising. But that’s not all. Malcolm Thomas Colombo is a progressive candidate who was originally running in MD-03. The new map redrew his hometown in our district, MD-05. Just minutes after the map was confirmed, he issued the following statement: _“After the latest redistricting, our campaign would now be centered in MD-05. Seeing as we have a strong progressive already in Mckayla Wilkes already running, our campaign is going to refocus our efforts to help ensure she gets elected.”_ We are appreciative of Team Colombo’s dedication to the progressive movement and we’re already looking forward to working with them! Meanwhile, we’ve been out in the community. Our team did the Polar Bear Plunge on March 26th, plunging into the icy waters of the Chesapeake Bay to raise funds for the Special Olympics Maryland. The next day, we hosted an event here in the DMV called Black Women Run alongside four other terrific Black women candidates. Congresswoman Cori Bush came on stage and made it clear: she needs help on the Hill! We held a team call this week about the exciting new map: we’re fired up and ready to go! **[_Sign up to join us at a phonebank or canvass soon._](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTGqUUvizGNcDfVwUp_3c-niY275Gpqj-WXRYd5ZFsYALLBsd2gjGrpL0WiQ4MI3NYdVvPuQlT2LPY1acRqpGtCjR9nKPEMFDuuQLt_UIbOVt0432CrXROMaiSZV8NM6B9STptL7vz-SkDaihHWl5GCdr9kO4lOXaXZ8DIX-sG73w5FWlD9hWH6LbOWtDjMTW8YgbRgcOLE4iLkcikPdvtoIDayUlwEUyLsflWo5kXgS8p-56wEJHlUNPcR7adTxPQm2XXyJcqkUsHMLx8xvP32Y-69u-R5xOrlo0Wok_Iyv3lHJA9hw966vjqKX3P_b31A/3l2/Ext5vBLFQQuJxMpMtoiNDA/h0/vZpSzDX2VUoUyuK7DKd50N8qwuyzHhCF-0vFis7nZ9c)** We just have 101 days until Election Day. We need your help! **[_Can you support our field operation to reach all the promising new voters that just got moved into our district?_](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTGqUUvizGNcDfVwUp_3c-niY275Gpqj-WXRYd5ZFsYALLBsd2gjGrpL0WiQ4MI3NYfJDvn-apcgbv3BVhz5Bqq_BsGMi2Vz2iJIvdf6F1cnJ9FhXfIOmmlvx7dc1_vl_fwrlKZ_Q2C8Gmxav2PZyk5qJSYgeqaxzMmcncbir5ElSWcpOV1JoBcRQkrwj1b7xOP7ns5GhvVWKce2P69Fc-kd4psWnTxt1wgCW9G1d6-U6aMwD43Pbay-dHyrDLiB5pFilb3wGSK8upeCXW-mD0KjzmFiE2VxQCZO-c7W0szXg1fPFRjag5nvSX6AHRTy6ug/3l2/Ext5vBLFQQuJxMpMtoiNDA/h1/SibatFoFqKog_ZmqYxQY8_pZZWPgZ8C2ycdE43R3wIM)** Thank you so much for being part of this movement with us! In solidarity, Mckayla Wilkes
---

name: Maggie Hassan
subject: What this race means for our Senate majority
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Maggie for NH |
body:
Losing this seat means losing our narrow Senate majority.
| | | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43963755/339488246/-1829049351?refcode=mh-jtk890-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODg1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkYTRkM2IxYi01MWI4LWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=R9WQu4c9eKQW_9SKWMg5mLuqZLpQLUi6PwDsg2CSNBo=)

Before you scroll away, please, can you read this?
I wanted to take a minute to explain what this race means for our Senate majority and our country.
Right now, the Senate is split 50-50, and Mitch McConnell is laser-focused on New Hampshire. Losing this seat means losing our narrow Senate majority.
**If Republicans take control, they will try to gut the Affordable Care Act, which would strip millions of Americans of their health coverage.**_1,017 votes_ in New Hampshire won this seat in the Senate—allowing me to cast a deciding vote to save the ACA in 2017. And this November, it's going to come down to the Granite State again to save health care protections for millions.
But that's not all that's on the line:******If Mitch McConnell becomes the majority leader, he won't allow President Biden to fill a potential Supreme Court vacancy.** And Lindsey Graham said this week that if the GOP controlled the Senate, Judge Ketanji Brown Jackson _wouldn't_ _have_ _even received a hearing_. With Donald Trump’s three ultra-conservative justices already skewing the balance of the Court, that’s not a chance we can afford to take.
I hate asking for money, but I really need your help. [**If you can, please chip in $3 today.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43963757/339488248/-947982778?amounts=3,25,50,100,250&refcode=mh-jtk890-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODg1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkYTRkM2IxYi01MWI4LWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=R9WQu4c9eKQW_9SKWMg5mLuqZLpQLUi6PwDsg2CSNBo=)

Peter,

The Oregon governor's race is up for grabs.

Republicans and their special interests are working hard to snag a win here, so we need a candidate who's ready to fight back — and who's ready to deliver for Oregon families. That's why I've endorsed Tina Kotek to be Oregon's next governor.

Tina can win, but she needs this team to fight by her side. There's a lot at stake — reproductive rights, affordable child care, climate change, and more.

**[The Oregon primary is only a month away, so this is the time to go all out. Her nomination should have been drama-free. | | | [](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953ylv71NjtRp9uAvapwZeG5Fwod7vf2Q19deFkSzINQB7pYO7Ed0TOwyvjuedJ39zpHIgPjZTod5LVCLRGJ5EuVnvDHqljinnhSRx27Y-QsvG6M20ZQaQYFyLcafJBZA0q9KEjijF8oJsWCaGnXaioe29E2BU30smwJXsSbhPnieLDvVaHp79m0WHcbWEiw22mt3M25RvBiPF-12jM4sPvRLht2-KwAR_agBD_aAH4NvUOb7xCPFGvYJU7ZpexgZiriZzH3U3eWn_7YvasMpkRrt9FhutgrHRAik21rcq84hNUdL-vzjTofXB6kIYpI5rsydr44dXXM-RgmfBfUQOWkvswqjSr2dVc4NbNGXi5gGc2TuungzPHRYkPRVF29vAk8/3l2/z81JFXoGQCSCcb0Wcc2JSA/h0/m5NdVVA-u8SiiPAnK6P_sn-Wt6lfRyMfZ-WMPqaWoho)
This was a historic week, Peter: **Ketanji Brown Jackson****has been confirmed as a Supreme Court Justice, and will be the first Black woman to sit on our nation’s highest court.** However, amid the celebration, there was needless drama, of course caused by Kyrsten Sinema: She waited until after _three_ REPUBLICAN Senators announced their support for Justice Jackson before she announced her own yes vote at the very last minute. It’s a reminder that nothing will ever be easy with Sinema — even a Democratic victory as unifying as the vote to confirm President Biden’s historic and popular Supreme Court nominee. **_[Help us put a stop to Sinema’s distractions, obstruction, and unwillingness to cooperate with fellow Democrats. Chip in a donation to the Primary Sinema Project today to help replace her with a real Democrat.](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953wsEvCNw9RRN8fJ6P2o2MeSSp_CuDUYYEYaIIZDytStwBeEGtAhBSXGqpus8AltEZhOBBP38bNgKe-cWCCL2K1tKNX5-IInPgso_FPgqRqd6bRrqimHR4sjsMz7wHXpf1tTHDPN936QulW1K02Egvq7aV4aWNrsKLUU72L90a6JX4SOR3yynx-vp0W7AmyY8aDFIDBNXGZN6XJiBCFh1HPP8OWa1VkZmR87mAE9SVBywV4k8TlK8vUR_FmUAvgBlj1MBHoEAYdZzYdmLswLSg9sVS_KUjHcuO8Sq1fzJMO9GgfEV3X8uGTo8x9Dz26bUoakHqw2wRthzaDSyFICQ5edgDdQVMxQQCA3G_Ks3M-ugOfXYPvAwqkELfNA4XfZTWw/3l2/z81JFXoGQCSCcb0Wcc2JSA/h1/OeKq_9yXmQBWVNYOG8VbaDaopFo9tJ-CJzM5lXL_mTo)_** **[Contribute](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953wsEvCNw9RRN8fJ6P2o2MeSSp_CuDUYYEYaIIZDytStwAb6IPDkh9OC7gBkGHGADQF1gnGrpphut7RmIgE4U-d6s8G_xbVjZXDaUvg273Yy8ko_Ci9_iGZ9lmmeO6vroop98gIhf6KlwAp9sxug1s0LfzqO9GIEMVMyG70uCpQ_DWqy_-IaUH9LKrf5kXDM_fik4aJtBWGlvifewGP2eVx8XB0wD7WZ5tbb2dUqZWtOVtwstrcRxVUZfVafsy2zkEyEMhtHWX7Japox51XYJ7yaTANeOTmLsax8YK0t54VU5A6WUiuqL3LZ9hKCj3dY6HgmmjUeG9tmBZPIxf56IcEEgoKmQo0ZmIWXvz2KtCfsU3BCRFsT3BTOiHw4YazMqTA/3l2/z81JFXoGQCSCcb0Wcc2JSA/h2/QOH4pBxO93CpaA-HbmDRt7W1JGiIzW1xFw3fAV_U7Q0)** **** Let’s zoom back out to the big picture here. Justice Ketanji Brown Jackson’s confirmation fulfills President Biden’s historic promise to the American people, and is a reminder of the importance of having a strong and united Democratic majority in the U.S. Senate. After all, Justice Jackson will rule on transformative issues like civil rights and reproductive rights for generations to come — the very same issues that Kyrsten Sinema has blocked progress on again and again by siding with Republicans. By working to strengthen Democrats’ majority in future sessions of Congress via replacing Kyrsten Sinema, we’re fighting for a future where we don’t only put Democratic nominees on the Supreme Court, we’re also able to enact progressive legislation that improves millions of American lives. _[**We hope you’ll consider donating $3 or any amount today to fuel our work in this historic moment. clean_body: Her nomination should have been drama-free. | | | This was a historic week, Peter: Ketanji Brown Jacksonhas been confirmed as a Supreme Court Justice, and will be the first Black woman to sit on our nation’s highest court. However, amid the celebration, there was needless drama, of course caused by Kyrsten Sinema: She waited until after three REPUBLICAN Senators announced their support for Justice Jackson before she announced her own yes vote at the very last minute. It’s a reminder that nothing will ever be easy with Sinema — even a Democratic victory as unifying as the vote to confirm President Biden’s historic and popular Supreme Court nominee. ** Let’s zoom back out to the big picture here. Justice Ketanji Brown Jackson’s confirmation fulfills President Biden’s historic promise to the American people, and is a reminder of the importance of having a strong and united Democratic majority in the U.S. Senate. After all, Justice Jackson will rule on transformative issues like civil rights and reproductive rights for generations to come — the very same issues that Kyrsten Sinema has blocked progress on again and again by siding with Republicans. By working to strengthen Democrats’ majority in future sessions of Congress via replacing Kyrsten Sinema, we’re fighting for a future where we don’t only put Democratic nominees on the Supreme Court, we’re also able to enact progressive legislation that improves millions of American lives. Peter, we’re so grateful to experience history in the making alongside every grassroots member of our team, including you. — Primary Sinema Project | This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options: PAID FOR BY CHANGE FOR ARIZONA 2024 PAC | | Sent via . name: Fetterman HQ
subject: The average donation to our campaign might surprise you
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fetterman for PA
body:
Could buy you a Penguins (or Flyers) t-shirt or half a ticket to Hersheypark.
#
$29 🤑
That’s not an eye-popping sum of money, Derek. Could buy you a Penguins (or Flyers) t-shirt or half a ticket to Hersheypark.
**But $29 is a really important number to John because it’s the average amount of a donation to our campaign in the first quarter of this Election Year.****[Click here to make a $29 donation (or an amount of your choosing!) to our people-powered campaign today.](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/47039?refcode=em20220409-5324&t=1&akid=5324%2E434096%2EShHggq)**
Unlike other campaigns in this primary, our average donation is *this* low because our campaign is 100% grassroots-funded. John does not accept money from corporate PACs or shady fossil fuel interests.
Running a people-powered campaign allows candidates like John to stand a chance at defeating self-funding candidates, *especially* in a highly competitive statewide race like this one.
Plus, it means people like you, Derek, will have a direct and immediate impact on the historic campaign we’re building. **When you make a donation to our campaign — like $29, our average donation — you’re making a stake in our race to elect John Fetterman to the U.S. Senate in Pennsylvania.**
**[Will you make your first donation of $29 or another amount to our campaign today? John is counting on grassroots donors like you to come through, and we wouldn’t ask if it weren’t important!](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/47039?refcode=em20220409-5324&t=2&akid=5324%2E434096%2EShHggq)**

name: Lizzie Pannill Fletcher
subject: Justice Ketanji Brown Jackson!
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ELIZABETH PANNILL FLETCHER FOR CONGRESS
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lpfe220311?refcode=lpfe220311_m [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lpfe220311?refcode=lpfe220311_m]
Friend,
Justice Ketanji Brown Jackson’s confirmation to the Supreme Court is a proud and historic moment for our country.
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lpfe220408?refcode=lpfe220408_m [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lpfe220408?refcode=lpfe220408_m]
Justice Jackson makes history as the first Black woman to serve on the highest court in our country. She’s also only the third Black justice and the sixth woman in the Supreme Court’s more than 200-year history. This moment is long overdue.
As an American, I am so proud. I have seen — we have all seen — her faith in our Constitution and in us as a people that our country and the Court need at this moment.
As a lawyer, I know that Justice Jackson is well qualified for this position — with her impeccable educational credentials, her professional accomplishments, including a Supreme Court clerkship, and her deep experience in public and private practice and as a judge at the district and appellate court. That is why it was so deeply troubling to me to see lawyers in the Senate who know better —not who should know better, who do know better — treat her with such contempt during her confirmation process. Especially my own junior Senator from Texas.
In his remarkable speech during the confirmation process, Senator Cory Booker reminded us all that those who engaged in these acts could not steal his joy, or our joy as Americans in this important, historic moment, and that “the United States will be better” because of Justice Jackson’s confirmation to the Supreme Court.
Watching the vote on Thursday brought tears of joy to my eyes — as I know it did for so many others. And while I want to focus on the joy, I also won’t forget that the confirmation process showed us just how broken our politics are, and how important it is that we elect good people to public office. What we saw from some members of the Senate in this process was a disservice to Justice Jackson, and to all of us.
That’s why those of us who are engaged in campaigns must continue our efforts — to elect good people to office, to put our country on a better path, and to continue the work we witnessed with Justice Jackson’s confirmation this week of making ours a more perfect union.
Together, we can do anything,
[https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP10/1/82676/images/sigblock200.png]
Donate [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lpfe220408?refcode=lpfe220408_m]
PAID FOR BY ELIZABETH PANNILL FLETCHER FOR CONGRESS
Lizzie Fletcher for Congress
3262 Westheimer Road, PMB 636
Houston, TX 77098
United States

name: Josh Riley
subject: incredible momentum behind our campaign
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Josh Riley for Congress
body:
Five months ago today, I announced our campaign for Congress in Upstate New York.

| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43961615/339474074/-1015964469?refcode=BLU-JRFC-20220409-1-EM&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85Mzg5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0OGU5Zjg0Mi0zN2I4LWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=xjk-KOt6VHHJqAbnKxtD9e7oS-pNWO9P4rngl8-BWj4=)
---
| Peter,

Five months ago today, I announced our campaign for Congress in Upstate New York.

A lot has changed since we first started this journey together (including the district lines!)—but one thing has not changed: we are committed to running a positive campaign that offers an optimistic and bold vision for the future.

I’m so hopeful for what Upstate New York can accomplish in the future because of all we’ve done in the past. Whenever the world has faced big challenges, Upstate New Yorkers have risen to meet them–and I know we can do it again. We made the equipment our troops used to defeat fascism in the World Wars, the machines America needed to usher in the New Deal, and the computers that brought the world a technology revolution.

I know that we can do it again. We’ll create the jobs of the future that address the world’s biggest challenges–and we’re going to do it right here in Upstate New York.

**Peter, our campaign is building momentum. Here’s how I know:**

**1\. Grassroots Fundraising.** Thanks to grassroots supporters like you, our campaign raised over $360,000 in the first three months of 2022, which is over $100,000 more than our next closest competitor. And I’m especially proud that two-thirds of our contributions in the first quarter were $50 or less. The grassroots energy is only growing, with over half of all our campaign’s contributions coming in the two months since the New York State Legislature approved the new district lines.

**2\. Ballot Access.** Candidates are required to submit 1,250 signatures to the Board of Elections to get on the ballot for the Democratic Primary. Our campaign submitted over 3x that amount! And we did it with a volunteer-driven effort, with petitions carried in all eight counties across New York’s 22nd Congressional District.

**3\. Endorsements.** March was a great month for our campaign, gaining five endorsements I’m proud to have. The New York Working Families Party, former two-time Democratic nominee Dana Balter, the Cortland County Democratic Committee, Defend the Vote, and the local Tompkins County chapter of the New York Progressive Action Network _ALL_ endorsed our campaign!

As you can see, momentum is building behind our hopeful vision for Upstate New York’s future.

And Peter, none of it would be possible without your support. So thank you, thank you, thank you.

We’re going to win this race and deliver a people-first agenda for Upstate New York’s working families, and we’re going to do it together.

With gratitude & high hopes,

Josh Riley
---

name: Jim Jordan
subject: The only thing fake was the news
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jim Jordan for Congress
body:
The mainstream media is finally admitting Hunter Biden's laptop was real. It's time to get to the bottom of what they were covering up. It’s Rep. Jim Jordan. We were just reviewing our records and noticed your status is still pending. Will you please confirm before midnight tonight?

| [](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=3ba0b84a8191452caf123bdfbf210dfa&_e=685Ug-5SPm7lEMeLBvBH2nKyUa4AnVS5CLvxhuXxOODM6acOLC17UINU84jEGvN-MWl-kRosdj16tytlkkskPOwMoEU7tzOjOAJpzkafnlCFQxbspr4qiTIkaKt-CDJ-0aE5Glup6G8yWd47sNWM6SzNhQ4b5Bu00fAmzB6Q9aioc6QxUAcou6SkPFR1a8wiPjucIQhNM-Y0dEplLrg3DoBgut3JzeS0Wm97jIprdF_1sSDn9kYIxsL0sO5FDoU3T6UzYQoWuPkqnJ4Mhc1DuKPWBthwCNZDURYKN8QHKn1W1PSo8JamGiNELqnUQamCtf652Yc_lT9NclxJymovcsNlyM9ivS_4sK4oopW_y9H6WtP3yA60cruMUN85K9Z5yDxf9ozJPds0se7SKNxT5yjuRzuOyAmc37sRwAt-T_bxSRIIx-xUEnCexn_QG0eRixa85IwBDh67ZFBw1rJ1jj2WQ72jmtdaEFMrUQNjBEQKZREDdAnAxK1l-25UXD51oBRuKKoiwC5YyKeURiLeHg%3D%3D)
---

Peter,

Why now? We’ve known for MONTHS that Hunter Biden’s laptop was real. The emails on the laptop were real.

**Why all of a sudden is there a focus on Hunter Biden and his laptop? Why more than a year after the story originally broke are mainstream media outlets reluctantly talking about what the New York Post reported to be true about the authenticity of Hunter Biden’s laptop back in October 2020?**

In the leadup to the 2020 election, the mainstream media and the Washington swamp kept important information about President Biden and his family out of the news.

**We need to get to the bottom of this!** To that end, I’ve got a couple of questions for you – namely, do you believe Democrats and the mainstream media colluded to cover up this information before the 2020 election, and now that the truth is out, would you as a patriotic American expect Congress to get to the bottom of the matter?

[**SHOULD THIS ISSUE BE INVESTIGATED?
LET ME KNOW -> **](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=3ba0b84a8191452caf123bdfbf210dfa&_e=685Ug-5SPm7lEMeLBvBH2nKyUa4AnVS5CLvxhuXxOODM6acOLC17UINU84jEGvN-MWl-kRosdj16tytlkkskPOwMoEU7tzOjOAJpzkafnlCFQxbspr4qiTIkaKt-CDJ-0aE5Glup6G8yWd47sNWM6SzNhQ4b5Bu00fAmzB6Q9aioc6QxUAcou6SkPFR1a8wiPjucIQhNM-Y0dEplLrg3DoBgut3JzeS0Wm97jIprdF_1sSDn9kYIxsL0sO5FDoU3T6UzYQoWuPkqnJ4Mhc1DuKPWBthwCNZDURYKN8QHKn2BfwKoP9iAGtfGSv4RBoLRv_oC0xH-thGz65b4zU9_7KP5J_F05niH0xZYHoABvxv6Jw0QrRNB-zQeS-glpbrdt4H1xwlGqmZZmAh3XZUJjMB-UhrLg4X_LVPs5jyhRcYi_p5cLJYLM5B5qg-iftr5dnedWvpWn8D5IA4D1j3SIC-imoOueO2n-mgzgScNE0a7Xw3X_AqfOWzDcmpjDrZxv1YDEaElM8ThOGUvQTdPyw%3D%3D)

**In the weeks following the New York Post article, elite liberal “intelligence” officials told us Hunter Biden’s laptop was fake, Big Tech censored the story, and Big media refused to cover it at all.

How can we trust anyone**?
Oh and, don’t forget while everyday Americans struggle to make ends meet, the Bidens are planning to host a family member’s wedding at the White House.

**[Thanks for letting us know where you stand on Hunter Biden and his laptop](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=3ba0b84a8191452caf123bdfbf210dfa&_e=685Ug-5SPm7lEMeLBvBH2nKyUa4AnVS5CLvxhuXxOODM6acOLC17UINU84jEGvN-MWl-kRosdj16tytlkkskPOwMoEU7tzOjOAJpzkafnlCFQxbspr4qiTIkaKt-CDJ-0aE5Glup6G8yWd47sNWM6SzNhQ4b5Bu00fAmzB6Q9aioc6QxUAcou6SkPFR1a8wiPjucIQhNM-Y0dEplLrg3DoBgut3JzeS0Wm97jIprdF_1sSDn9kYIxsL0sO5FDoU3T6UzYQoWuPkqnJ4Mhc1DuKPWBthwCNZDURYKN8QHKn3Ag3XpfyY0tQKxqftxD0Nqr-EpEZHu-syWRpL1wYbwcJpNPAsESo19yalHHjQFdmfg2871aDW_gVm_orT4W5XnRjBdP9IDqbZ02YoEh4FIsZh0FQYO-2agGnXmyNpYB-Fa7p0ZEMpOw56rxafy0bJ6t9OAqA1ctbSSYQuJaa964zcbMKhotG2nxQZswG54smlLeVMfdegtfgTwj7ZvnNy-2LmKyP6gHnaUhP-XyJt19g%3D%3D)**.

Thank you so much,
Jim Jordan

We need **real leadership** at all levels of government who are committed to American energy independence. Read more >> | | | Peter, Thanks to President Biden ending our American energy independence through his backwards and destructive energy policies, we’re now dependent on countries like RUSSIA for our oil and gas. THIS SHOULD NOT HAVE HAPPENED. America SHOULD NOT be dependent on Russia for our energy! Please add your name to our petition now if you agree. We need real leadership at all levels of government who are committed to American energy independence. There are energy companies right here in Oklahoma that are standing by, ready to produce the oil and gas we need to keep our nation running. All we need to do is unleash them. With gas prices only continuing to rise, the time for action is NOW! It is critical that we end President Biden’s anti-energy policies and END our dependence on Russian oil. name: Admiral Mike Franken
subject: people like me aren’t supposed to run and win
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Michael Franken for Iowa, Inc
body:
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43964427/339490991/301434390?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDI4MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjMzFlNjU2My01YmI4LWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=CjQab3YC2aFbez_NfBn9IcKpQ_Jliyq1P8Q2waaFktA=&emci=de7fe8cb-58b8-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&emdi=c31e6563-5bb8-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&ceid=6371843)
[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43964428/339490992/301434390?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDI4MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjMzFlNjU2My01YmI4LWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=CjQab3YC2aFbez_NfBn9IcKpQ_Jliyq1P8Q2waaFktA=&emci=de7fe8cb-58b8-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&emdi=c31e6563-5bb8-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&ceid=6371843)
Hello,
Growing up in rural Iowa, I thought we were well-to-do because we had a piano, a well-used sewing machine, a big garden, and a flag pole. Our house was small, one bathroom, for a family of ten. I was surprised to know that not every family struggled with affording the $7 meal ticket each kid needed for school.
Lebanon, Iowa, had eight houses, a church, and a small feed store. My life centered on helping my dad, school, and exploring Dry Creek, a wonderland of aquatic life down the hill. The nearest town was Hudson, SD, nine miles west down a gravel road.
We were the prototypical rural Iowa family. Breakfast, lunch, dinner, lunch, then supper kept the house full of aromas. “Read a book,” would be mom’s terse direction if you showed any idleness. It is from this humble beginning, work as a welder, farmhand, then in a slaughterhouse, that brought me into the U.S. Navy.
America must present an opportunity for its citizens to achieve great things. From homemade clothes (I’m the littlest one) to a three-star Admiral is just one such journey. The next step is to use life’s experiences to continue a lifetime of service to this nation and my state of Iowa.
**I’m running for U.S. Senate against Chuck Grassley here in Iowa because I can represent people from all walks of life. My life’s experiences provided an innate understanding for what it means to be a Democrat:_to care as much for those I’ve never met as I do for those I know_. Obviously, Chuck Grassley is not a Democrat; he seems to only care about what Trump and his corporate PAC donors want.**
People like me aren’t supposed to be able to run and win. Mitch McConnell and his Super PACs are already raising millions from corporate special interests to try to make sure I don’t.
If there’s one thing I’ve learned in life, though, it’s that anything is possible when a group of people work together to make it happen. I’m not taking one dime from corporate PACs; instead, I’m running my campaign entirely with support from over 41,000 grassroots donors like you.
[**So please, if you’re able to, will you consider making a donation to my campaign today to help me defeat Chuck Grassley and turn Iowa blue? Senate control is on the line in my race, and whatever amount you can spare today would go a long way in protecting our Democratic majority in the Senate.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43964429/339490993/-42398318?refcode=em20220409pm-nd&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C35%2C50%2C100%2C250&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDI4MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjMzFlNjU2My01YmI4LWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=CjQab3YC2aFbez_NfBn9IcKpQ_Jliyq1P8Q2waaFktA=)

Mike Franken, VADM, U.S. Navy (ret.)

name: Sen. Rick Scott
subject: I need your opinion
body:
Peter,
I’m working to set up our game plan for 2022, and I wanted your input.

We know there’s a _ton_ of issues with Joe Biden’s America, but I need to know which one YOU think is the most important.**

Hunt For Congress,
clean_body: Peter, When the Left sees me, they’re OUTRAGED. They want black men like me to be victims in need of government help... ... but instead I’m a proud father, conservative, West Point graduate, and U.S. Army veteran. Don’t be fooled - it’s not just me they want to see fail. They want all of us driven to desperation and reliant on the government and the socialist Left. In America, anyone can make it if they work hard and have faith, and I’m running for Congress to keep that American Dream alive for my daughter, but I can’t do it without your help. I’m not afraid to say it: I love America. And I know you do too, Peter. But the socialist Left wants to raise the next generation to hate our great country. I won’t let them pollute our children’s minds without a fight. I need you on my team to SAVE the next generation from socialism, and we need to act quickly before it’s too late. President Carter has worked tirelessly to protect and establish democracy across the world.
He knows the warning signs of a democracy in peril and he’s seeing those signs in America today. We have to heed the warning before it’s too late! [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dasspac-april22?amount=10&refcode=EM_FR_040922_B3_AC_30D]
Carter says it’s crucial to make sure everyone can “participate easily in transparent, safe and secure electoral processes”.
That’s exactly what DASS is working to protect every single day – but we can’t keep up with the far-right’s dark money without supporters like you. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dasspac-april22?amount=10&refcode=EM_FR_040922_B3_AC_30D]

body:
The NY Times suggested the main reason Herschel is doing well in the Senate race is because he’s a Black Republican. How insulting. The NY Times suggested the main reason Herschel is doing well in the Senate race is because he’s a Black Republican. How insulting. |
[](http://links.ourbestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=80ebb41732384ac087921d8b617f32bf&_m=8a922fbce66c4d82baff773d83fd8004&_e=d1b3b2lfPFer9pqfyWXkzG3-eVmYHRty5vMPcqQ4405cjTQRu7FnWN3sqpTmg1fK_ZtvOmFahCf7QY89ERrdCTc8v3x4ii1aDlhrHK8FM5RQ9lHLW5ls10_nhH7LMFAwAQBCyO9Mxe8GV7zGb-mXVqSyTv7Kq4apxHU5Fzld7uhoS3gmccQQQhNjfojOcesoeW4WHVYjJL-GjjNvY9_nV7uChPoHwg-RtkkiWG3oZ7X4Ql9cmkdwI2qvqWD1FHakggOU0TXTsDR7ytLTbMd9j-B55fwKSx7TKBHVwiGnrCK5LZkKyu2_klnDVAxSrdXK1PXrIzFabhfQBxqzORsBrzHBj6qcHzt-SOqOOeuue5VF5ZITTL5FUJMxNJF8cYCG5Kq7Gr-MLR3jqDYcdRuYQaT29GsLKIP4U7GEHYdV8dVaPKP3q9Yu0gPYbvlrCwlzwJ4TaNMRA_hF1xZZXThqx7H6BaOOhX5-Ek6aEAqnQRs%3D)

---
Fellow American - This time _The New York Times_ has gone too far - which really says a lot given how much liberal propaganda they spew on a daily basis!

As Team Herschel’s Communications Director, I am on the frontlines taking on media bias every day. **But this attack from _The New York Times_ is beyond the pale. **

They printed an op-ed that suggested the main reason Herschel is doing well in the Georgia Senate race is because he’s a Black Republican. _**[Do you find this as insulting and disgusting as I do?](http://links.ourbestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=80ebb41732384ac087921d8b617f32bf&_m=8a922fbce66c4d82baff773d83fd8004&_e=d1b3b2lfPFer9pqfyWXkzG3-eVmYHRty5vMPcqQ4405cjTQRu7FnWN3sqpTmg1fK_ZtvOmFahCf7QY89ERrdCTc8v3x4ii1aDlhrHK8FM5RQ9lHLW5ls10_nhH7LMFAwAQBCyO9Mxe8GV7zGb-mXVqSyTv7Kq4apxHU5Fzld7uhoS3gmccQQQhNjfojOcesoeW4WHVYjJL-GjjNvY9_nV7uChPoHwg-RtkkiWG3oZ7X4Ql9cmkdwI2qvqWD1FHakggOU0TXTsDR7ytLTbMd9j7XXkOCa6vdL6edmZ-eMRRDtCqCszIMlucwwafZefB2KJbt-ngOafZZP5pJdKyhqfeTQsivuJVb45hVBBe1fFHj6FKa2qYJqHp9LCtvHrWcx3L62-mLaAWtw5iRRDPxm84g3fZ5HJ5-ieej5vuIcEnn9IOjGXCME0d0TJ-o3YHcKqNEftBt1r7bPjRbLupfIXzIPmIuWLjvYn8VD6lqlO1o%3D)**_

Take a look at what was written:

[](http://links.ourbestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=80ebb41732384ac087921d8b617f32bf&_m=8a922fbce66c4d82baff773d83fd8004&_e=d1b3b2lfPFer9pqfyWXkzG3-eVmYHRty5vMPcqQ4405cjTQRu7FnWN3sqpTmg1fK_ZtvOmFahCf7QY89ERrdCTc8v3x4ii1aDlhrHK8FM5RQ9lHLW5ls10_nhH7LMFAwAQBCyO9Mxe8GV7zGb-mXVqSyTv7Kq4apxHU5Fzld7uhoS3gmccQQQhNjfojOcesoeW4WHVYjJL-GjjNvY9_nV7uChPoHwg-RtkkiWG3oZ7X4Ql9cmkdwI2qvqWD1FHakggOU0TXTsDR7ytLTbMd9j2xDYHEjhWI_4jxV5ANvn4PRObk7rUOdPdLXqOUUMWSMK7vJQpgvxtMga1y4w43qg4yDEbywnyDa8k6xVHkpIPS6PRAl571tzFKD2nE2oCO0rewMpjT4pvTjioq4XxFYqbyqnWPIE1ekS1miT3fn19ehLsJQ4ymmmMoqe72mSwd5h60AiplJASe7FR1i3BIeU5w-td4p4BShGaTWLNqEUZg%3D)
Is it possible that Herschel is in a dead heat with our Democrat opponent because he’s a uniter who wants to bring people together? Or that Herschel’s conservative values are more in line with Georgians than our opponent? Or that Herschel has lived the American Dream and is inspiring because of his success in athletics and business?

**Nope. According to The Times, Herschel is doing well because of his skin color.**

_**How offensive, demeaning, and utterly ridiculous.**_

**[Fellow American, we need to stand up to outrageous attacks like this from the Left, and we need to show Herschel we’ve got his back.](http://links.ourbestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=80ebb41732384ac087921d8b617f32bf&_m=8a922fbce66c4d82baff773d83fd8004&_e=d1b3b2lfPFer9pqfyWXkzG3-eVmYHRty5vMPcqQ4405cjTQRu7FnWN3sqpTmg1fK_ZtvOmFahCf7QY89ERrdCTc8v3x4ii1aDlhrHK8FM5RQ9lHLW5ls10_nhH7LMFAwAQBCyO9Mxe8GV7zGb-mXVqSyTv7Kq4apxHU5Fzld7uhoS3gmccQQQhNjfojOcesoeW4WHVYjJL-GjjNvY9_nV7uChPoHwg-RtkkiWG3oZ7X4Ql9cmkdwI2qvqWD1FHakggOU0TXTsDR7ytLTbMd9j8LKVMwzn-CJ9v4ytzwNQGVI7TSdsRy-ASlid01Tm4ymAXjZsGQzWGgF1oRrPYj0YAeOPVX7yeJfq9ig_OboV0Jq51FKR3401Vo7l4lZuuTaUSuG92u_bjSppweYLjgwNsy7FCUtd37ICj_ai8nmo3kOPA6umRvAeCN551ubM6HXgO5CGIFGfFJFzAsi7ULn3QDroCC8DwyuQtSEhjdYLok%3D)**

We’re pleading with you - **[please chip in to let Herschel know how much we appreciate and admire his accomplishments, values, and character- not the ridiculous garbage the Left is spewing.](http://links.ourbestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=80ebb41732384ac087921d8b617f32bf&_m=8a922fbce66c4d82baff773d83fd8004&_e=d1b3b2lfPFer9pqfyWXkzG3-eVmYHRty5vMPcqQ4405cjTQRu7FnWN3sqpTmg1fK_ZtvOmFahCf7QY89ERrdCTc8v3x4ii1aDlhrHK8FM5RQ9lHLW5ls10_nhH7LMFAwAQBCyO9Mxe8GV7zGb-mXVqSyTv7Kq4apxHU5Fzld7uhoS3gmccQQQhNjfojOcesoeW4WHVYjJL-GjjNvY9_nV7uChPoHwg-RtkkiWG3oZ7X4Ql9cmkdwI2qvqWD1FHakggOU0TXTsDR7ytLTbMd9j5lRFwMsP3ab9mPotXiEZpv9X3uIE-Q9fWQgy0knFyeh8H55xASuOjuMBJb8GoCsiEX6J7NojHs1GjGZF0tl5L6HCryiwliaHIRsiEKIwG3z_dn1qq7svu_2QLdVyHMgoQvbWOGDA6KRsr1OviepGf2OzFw_bCrsiqw39hdA4S5nGaTj0yZ_aw977IxhpU1Kxud0L4JrvelPIcyXDFo08Ww%3D)**

Thanks,

Mallory Blount
Communications Director

clean_body: The NY Times suggested the main reason Herschel is doing well in the Senate race is because he’s a Black Republican. How insulting. The NY Times suggested the main reason Herschel is doing well in the Senate race is because he’s a Black Republican. How insulting. | Fellow American - This time The New York Times has gone too far - which really says a lot given how much liberal propaganda they spew on a daily basis! As Team Herschel’s Communications Director, I am on the frontlines taking on media bias every day. But this attack from The New York Times is beyond the pale. They printed an op-ed that suggested the main reason Herschel is doing well in the Georgia Senate race is because he’s a Black Republican. Take a look at what was written: Is it possible that Herschel is in a dead heat with our Democrat opponent because he’s a uniter who wants to bring people together? Or that Herschel’s conservative values are more in line with Georgians than our opponent? Or that Herschel has lived the American Dream and is inspiring because of his success in athletics and business? Nope. According to The Times, Herschel is doing well because of his skin color. How offensive, demeaning, and utterly ridiculous. We’re pleading with you - Thanks, Mallory Blount Communications Director Team Herschel | | PAID FOR BY TEAM HERSCHEL, INC. Don't want to receive any more of our emails? We hate to see you go, but .

name: Brian Burley
subject: Election Fraud Fighter
body:
No matter how you feel about past elections – ANY election fraud is too much fraud. We should all want legitimacy and trust in our voting process!
| | | |
---
[](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001miOZjqQwfcbCSpo3Hm0F8top8-ACaGTqfoM_kPzPPx-it4AfqKqo31vHY9ub7xgaXb3WbLIRy9AB-xxes2N1wRfV_3hU8lxDsuN_hV4jEi_nxb8VG8bjSvnm22-869QWadNm0fHOeZAFqXutDEReLoz0xzCECgtjT5OaceJKTQiu32TJyzoeCr_mQNgydJOxZZLzBaVGP0EF-dRAFTF8QQ==&c=raYYIQBlurXKX5gVrnruY-mh-_-EkW06qILkZLIy_w0u7mGt5Es0fg==&ch=1CIXEyQf9AJvH0CIQ4skhDNhucV8fH6cpauBfBSEc3yhCDXEi_JZiw==)
---
---
| The top question I receive on the campaign trail is election integrity. Let me be clear - I am the Election Fraud Fighter we desperately need in Congress! We must restore trust in our voting process.
When I am in Congress I will fight for:
* Voter ID Laws
* Mandatory Universal Audits
* One Day of Voting that is Primarily In-Person

No matter how you feel about past elections - ANY election fraud is too much fraud. We should all want legitimacy and trust in our voting process!
---
| | [SUPPORT ELECTION INTEGRITY](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001miOZjqQwfcbCSpo3Hm0F8top8-ACaGTqfoM_kPzPPx-it4AfqKqo3w5CDJA0NJaxOP24RZMmDy40rrG6veEmC_szKjeMYJdtROfln1r3SriEJFrdYp63sYxYIGs2vsJbjpT0JVqfJUx1BbgIPJZKm5fQ7wT8n2SuzbdPKgSvaglEOGI1kZyhK5eSKO9oegMpjN6GDwVbjaITzHNee6DNBg==&c=raYYIQBlurXKX5gVrnruY-mh-_-EkW06qILkZLIy_w0u7mGt5Es0fg==&ch=1CIXEyQf9AJvH0CIQ4skhDNhucV8fH6cpauBfBSEc3yhCDXEi_JZiw==)
---
| I am the fighter we need in Congress that will deliver the results and change voters deserve. Once we take back the House in November there will be a great opportunity to secure our elections!
I am running against a criminal RINO that has committed election fraud and a radical socialist that wants to extend voting rights to illegal immigrants and minors!
We will send a message to the radical left and to the establishment that their inaction and corruption is unacceptable.
We have just one month until our next election. I need the urgent help of PATRIOTS like yourself to spread the word about Election Integrity.
[Chip in your best donation of $10, $25, $50, $100, $250, $1000 or even the federal maximum $8,600 per individual/$17,200 per couple that my campaign can receive!](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001miOZjqQwfcbCSpo3Hm0F8top8-ACaGTqfoM_kPzPPx-it4AfqKqo31vHY9ub7xgaXb3WbLIRy9AB-xxes2N1wRfV_3hU8lxDsuN_hV4jEi_nxb8VG8bjSvnm22-869QWadNm0fHOeZAFqXutDEReLoz0xzCECgtjT5OaceJKTQiu32TJyzoeCr_mQNgydJOxZZLzBaVGP0EF-dRAFTF8QQ==&c=raYYIQBlurXKX5gVrnruY-mh-_-EkW06qILkZLIy_w0u7mGt5Es0fg==&ch=1CIXEyQf9AJvH0CIQ4skhDNhucV8fH6cpauBfBSEc3yhCDXEi_JZiw==)
Our goal is to raise $30k by the end of April to combat election fraud!
I am putting my money where my mouth is - I will personally match every contribution made to help our election integrity movement! Rush your best gift today!
---
| | [SUPPORT AN ELECTION FRAUD FIGHTER!](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001miOZjqQwfcbCSpo3Hm0F8top8-ACaGTqfoM_kPzPPx-it4AfqKqo3w5CDJA0NJaxOP24RZMmDy40rrG6veEmC_szKjeMYJdtROfln1r3SriEJFrdYp63sYxYIGs2vsJbjpT0JVqfJUx1BbgIPJZKm5fQ7wT8n2SuzbdPKgSvaglEOGI1kZyhK5eSKO9oegMpjN6GDwVbjaITzHNee6DNBg==&c=raYYIQBlurXKX5gVrnruY-mh-_-EkW06qILkZLIy_w0u7mGt5Es0fg==&ch=1CIXEyQf9AJvH0CIQ4skhDNhucV8fH6cpauBfBSEc3yhCDXEi_JZiw==)

name: Theresa Kerg
subject: Lincoln Day Dinner
body:
Republican Voters,

We wanted to invite you to our annual Lincoln Day Dinner which is coming up on April 21st. Our guest speakers are Congressman Jim Jordan and Congressman Warren Davidson. Besides having a delicious dinner at Shelby Oaks, you will have the opportunity to meet and talk with many statewide elected officials and candidates. It's sure to be a wonderful evening!

The registration deadline is Tuesday, April 12th. You can register online or send your check in the mail. The flyer with all of the information is attached. Please take time to register today. We look forward to seeing you there!

Best,
Theresa

\--

_Theresa Kerg_
_Chairman_
_Shelby County Republican Party
_

name: Beto HQ
subject: Why we send so many emails:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Beto for Texas
body:
A donation today will help ensure we have the resources to keep Beto on the road, go toe-to-toe with Abbott's mega-donors, and defeat this failed governor once and for all.
#
We know we send a lot of emails, but it's only because this race to elect Beto as Texas' next governor couldn't be more urgent. **The future of our state is on the line.**
Our team is working hard to make sure we have the grassroots resources we need to travel across Texas, advertise online, hire campaign organizers, and compete with Abbott's $50 million in the bank. _That's where you come in._
To defeat Abbott and his dangerous, extreme policies, we're going to build the largest grassroots campaign Texas has ever seen. We'll need the support of as many people as possible — including you! **But according to our records, it looks like you have yet to chip in to power this campaign.**
We understand you may not have been in a position to donate before, but we're hoping we can count on support today.
**[Will you consider making your first donation to help elect Beto as Texas' next Governor today? It's donations of $3, $10, and $25 that are powering this campaign.](https://act.betoorourke.com/go/54960?refcode=ema20220409-184159&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=3&akid=184159%2E444211%2EJokuup)**
**[Contribute $3](https://act.betoorourke.com/go/54960?refcode=ema20220409-184159&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=4&akid=184159%2E444211%2EJokuup)**
Beto believes in running a people-powered campaign, and here's what that actually means: We don't accept a cent from corporate PACs or their special interests — 100% of our donations come from folks like you who believe in our vision for a bigger, bolder Texas.
We took a look at our notes, and we can stay on track with today's fundraising goal if everyone reading this email who hasn't chipped in before makes their first donation of $3 or more right now.
**[If you're able, please make your first $3 donation today to ensure we have the resources to keep Beto on the road, go toe-to-toe with Abbott's mega-donors, and defeat Abbott once and for all.](https://act.betoorourke.com/go/54960?refcode=ema20220409-184159&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=5&akid=184159%2E444211%2EJokuup)**
Everyone in Texas deserves a big, unifying vision for this state. Big enough for all of us to live to our full potential.
Thank you,
Beto for Texas
_*This data only reflects donations made online with this email address. If you’ve made a previous contribution via check or with a different email address, you may not see it here — but know that Beto and our entire team are deeply grateful for your support._

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bft-em-footer?refcode=em20220409-184159-footer&t=6&refcode2=184159_444211_Jokuup&akid=184159%2E444211%2EJokuup)**
---
Email us: info@betofortexas.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Grassroots supporters like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Beto for Texas, PO Box 302647, Austin, TX 78703.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.betoorourke.com/signup/bft-receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.betoorourke.com/sign/bft-personal-info/?t=7&akid=184159%2E444211%2EJokuup)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.betoorourke.com/unsubscribe/bft-unsubscribe/?t=8&akid=184159%2E444211%2EJokuup)

| | | Friend,
****
The _“leadership”_ we’re getting from out-of-touch Democrat politicians like Hassan and Schumer simply isn’t working. Look no further than your record-high gas bill, or at the excessive spending that’s leaving unsustainable debt for your kids and grandkids. They’re not serving our country... They’re **TRANSFORMING** our country, into something that none of us recognize, and _none of us want._ And it’s only going to continue unless freedom-loving states like New Hampshire stand up to D.C. and say enough is enough. So I’m taking that stand for the regular folks that are getting left behind by the Washington elites - **will you join me? >>**

---
---
| |
---
| | [JOIN ME: HELP ME STOP THE FAILED DEM POLICIES](https://click.mlsend2.com/link/c/YT0xOTI0ODkxOTc5NjMyNjEzNjE4JmM9ZDRrNiZlPTAmYj05NTQ5ODk3NTImZD16NGgweTl6.-BzUPHVbsZS_EyLVze5ArWMyG9aIVno9EIL6moM_8rY)

| __Here are the kinds of policies that DO actually work... Passing a pro-jobs, pro-growth, pro-family agenda. Lowering poverty rates. Not letting discriminatory teaching be pushed in our schools. Giving tax relief to working families. _What do all of these have in common?_ They’re the conservative policies that I fought to pass as State Senate President in New Hampshire. And now, I’m going to make sure Washington politicians like Hassan stop holding back this progress. Because right now, New Hampshire along with the rest of the country is experiencing the consequences of failed Democrat leadership. Families are struggling and they need to be supported. **I’m ready to get to work for you and your family come November - if you’re tired of Democrat policies holding you back,****will you help me turn things around by supporting my campaign? >>**__

They’re TRANSFORMING our country, into something that none of us recognize, and none of us want. And it’s only going to continue unless freedom-loving states like New Hampshire stand up to D.C. and say enough is enough. So I’m taking that stand for the regular folks that are getting left behind by the Washington elites - will you join me? >> | | | | | | | | | | Here are the kinds of policies that DO actually work... Passing a pro-jobs, pro-growth, pro-family agenda. Lowering poverty rates. Not letting discriminatory teaching be pushed in our schools. Giving tax relief to working families. What do all of these have in common? They’re the conservative policies that I fought to pass as State Senate President in New Hampshire. And now, I’m going to make sure Washington politicians like Hassan stop holding back this progress. Because right now, New Hampshire along with the rest of the country is experiencing the consequences of failed Democrat leadership. Families are struggling and they need to be supported. I’m ready to get to work for you and your family come November - if you’re tired of Democrat policies holding you back,**will you help me turn things around by supporting my campaign? >> | | | | | | | | | | | Thank you, Chuck Morse | | | | | | | Paid for by Friends of Chuck Morse | | | Friends of Chuck Morse | | PO Box 106 North Salem, NH 03073 | You received this email because you signed up on our website or made a purchase from us.

subject: We're officially on the ballot!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by David Ocampo Grajales for Congress
body:
Peter this is a huge step, but it's only the beginning. | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/ocampo2022/fec-deadline-16052421?e=adc835fab2)
---
| | [ ](https://ocampo2022.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=393ee15136117a7b203988279&id=60cdf3ab45&e=adc835fab2)
---
| | Peter — we're officially on the ballot for the June 7th primary!

This is a huge step, but it's only the beginning. These next eight weeks will be critical and I'm going to need your help.

Our team is working overtime to connect with as many voters as possible. In the coming days, we'll be:
* Ordering 60,000 union-made prints (palm cards, door hangers, posters)
* Scaling up our phone banking and texting operation
* Running more social media and search ads

**[Can we count on you to chip in whatever you can to help us finish strong?](https://ocampo2022.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=393ee15136117a7b203988279&id=371409995e&e=adc835fab2)**

We need all hands on deck and we know not everyone can contribute, but there are other ways to help! Please consider sharing this with two of your friends to help us spread the word.

Thank you,
David

name: Wisconsin Senate Update
subject: The Washington Post reports:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Sarah for Wisconsin
body:
**The good news:** Wisconsin will be the tipping point for Senate control and major election forecasters like _CNN_ , _Roll Call_ , and _The Cook Political Report_ are all calling Ron Johnson the most vulnerable GOP Senator up for re-election.

**Even better news:** The most recent head-to-head poll shows Sarah Godlewski is the only Democrat who can beat him. _The Washington Post_ even reported that she’s “the best chance to rid the Senate of Ron Johnson.”

**The bad news:** Ron Johnson has more cash on hand than anyone in this race. Combined with Donald Trump and national Republicans, they have raised more than $200 million to take back the Senate majority.

**Even worse news:** Mitch McConnell's Super PAC is going "all-in" to protect Ron Johnson. Wisconsin could end up being the most expensive Senate race in the country, which means we need to have enough resources to compete with the GOP. [**Can you rush a donation to Sarah Godlewski's U.S. Senate campaign to help us take on the millions Ron Johnson and the Republicans will spend in our race?
